1001404473.english: Guest~ Are you done- Guest? Are you asleep? … …I can't hold back anymore, I won't! How could I resist with something like this right in front of my eyes…! I'm just going to have a tiny taste… so please don't wake up… ?
1001404473.korean: 손님~ 다 끝났- 손님? 주무세요? …...이제 못 참아,&n안 참아! 이런 걸 눈 앞에 두고 어떻게 참아…!&n아주 살짝 맛만 볼 테니까…&n제발 깨지 말아주세요…?

1001404474.english: This is Captain Marie's heart... Ah, no. I'm not quite sure yet. Could you tell me a little more?
1001404474.korean: 이게 마리 대장님의 마음…&n아, 아뇨. 아직은 잘 모르겠습니다.&n저에게 좀 더 알려주시겠습니까?

1001404475.english: Nya ha ha, so doing it with Poi is the best, isn't it? Of course I am~ When I'm with Poi, I don't have to worry about this and that... I just have to think about making you feel good, Master. Until Poi... becomes a complete mess.
1001404475.korean: 냐하핫, 역시 포이랑 하는 게 제일 좋으신거죠?&n그럴 수 밖에요~ 포이랑 할 때는 이것저것&n신경 쓸 필요 없이… 주인님이 기분 좋아지는 것만&n생각하면 되니까요. 포이가… 엉망진창이 될 때까지.

1001404476.english: Ugh… You don’t need to worry. I have always endured such penance… The Savior… taking my sins…? …That cannot be. How could I commit such disrespect to the Savior, the Agent of Light…
1001404476.korean: 윽… 걱정하지 않으셔도 괜찮습니다.&n이런 고행은 언제나 해온 일이기에…&n구원자님께서… 제 죄를 대신…? ...그건, 안 됩니다.&n빛의 대리인이신 구원자님께 어찌 그런 불경을...

1001404477.english: You don't have to feel sorry. Even if that act... wasn't really forgiveness of sins, I was saved like this.
1001404477.korean: 미안해하지 않으셔도 괜찮아요.&n그 행위가... 정말 죄사함이 아니었다고 해도,&n저는 이렇게 구원받았으니까요.

1001404478.english: Now, now, sir! Stop messing around and stay still!
1001404478.korean: 자자, 손님~! 장난치지 마시고 얌전히 계세요~

1001404480.english: Nya ha ha. As expected, it's Poi rather than beer, right? Don't drink beer~ Get drunk on Poi♡
1001404480.korean: 냐하핫. 역시 맥주보다는 포이죠?&n맥주말고~ 포이한테 취해♡

1001404481.english: If you are a creature of light, no one must lay a hand on me.
1001404481.korean: 빛의 피조물이라면 누구도&n제게 손을 대서는 안됩니다.

1001404482.english: Sob... sniffle, no... I'm crying because I'm so happy and relieved. So... I don't want to stop...
1001404482.korean: 흑… 훌쩍, 아뇨… 너무 행복하고 안심돼서&n눈물이 나는 거예요. 그러니까…&n멈추는건, 싫어요...

1001404483.english: Kyaa… um… the massage is done! Anyway, it's over! Now I'll close the door… You can do whatever you want, dear guest.
1001404483.korean: 꺅… 저, 저기… 마, 마사지 다 끝났어요!&n아무튼 끝났어요! 이제 문 닫을 거니까아…&n손님이 하고 싶은 거 계속, 해요.

1001404484.english: Ah… I worried you wouldn't feel the same for me, but to be liked this much…
1001404484.korean: 아… 저에겐 마음이 동하지&n않으실거라 걱정했었습니다만,&n이렇게나… 좋아해 주실줄은...

1001404485.english: You've probably noticed by now, haven't you? Poi, I'm already burning up… Just think about feeling good, Master. Hurry♡
1001404485.korean: 슬슬 주인님도 눈치 채셨죠?&n포이, 이미 뜨거워져 있으니까…&n주인님은 그냥 마음껏 기분 좋아지는 것만&n생각해도 돼요. 빨리♡

1001404486.english: Today, my savior cleanses my sins personally… Yes. I'm always ready, so please take care of me…
1001404486.korean: 오늘도 구원자님께서 직접&n제 죄를 씻어주시는 거군요…?&n네. 저는 언제든지 준비되어 있으니,&n부탁드립니다...

1001404487.english: Sniffle… no, I'm crying because I'm so happy and relieved. So… I don't want this to stop…
1001404487.korean: 흑… 훌쩍, 아뇨… 너무 행복하고 안심돼서&n눈물이 나는 거예요. 그러니까…&n멈추는건, 싫어요...

1001404488.english: There's something I want to do with you, Big Brother… Eh? Can we do it now? Big Brother, you're really, really the best!
1001404488.korean: 나 오빠랑 하고싶은게 있는데…&n엣? 지금 해도 돼?&n오빠 정말 정말 최고야!

1001404489.english: In front of the Commander, I wanted to be a woman, not a soldier… My dream has come true.
1001404489.korean: 사령관님 앞에서는 군인이 아니라&n여자이고 싶었는데... 제 꿈이 이루어졌군요.

1001404490.english: Poi doesn't like getting wet, but~ she loves it when Master sprinkles lots of water on her♡
1001404490.korean: 포이는 물에 닿는 건 싫지만~&n주인님이 잔뜩 뿌려주는 건 좋아♡

1001404491.english: Savior really is… a ‘Savior.' If I hadn't met you… sniff… I'm crying because I'm so happy…
1001404491.korean: 구원자님은 정말로… ‘구원자’셨군요.&n저는… 구원자님을 만나지 못했다면… 흑…&n으으응, 이건 기뻐서… 훌쩍, 우는 거예요...

1001404492.english: The light was an illusion. Even when the Order and the world were in danger, he did not reveal himself. The Savior who gave hope to us in despair is the one with the right to establish a new order and discipline. And realizing that will is my duty.
1001404492.korean: 빛은 허상이었다. 교단이, 세계가 위험에 처해도&n그는 모습을 드러내지 않았다. 절망에 빠진&n우리에게 희망을 준 구원자야말로 새로운&n질서와 규율을 세울 권리가 있다.&n그리고 그 뜻을 실현하는 것은, 나의 의무다.

1001404493.english: ...I cannot understand. I merely followed the Savior's orders because he commanded me to 'destroy the enemy command unit.' There must be a deep meaning behind every word and action of the Savior. That command clearly meant to annihilate the enemy forces, including the command unit, and strike at the heart of the enemy power.
1001404493.korean: ...이해할 수 없군. 구원자가 ‘적 지휘 유닛을 격파하라’&n고 했기에 그 말에 따랐을 뿐이다. 구원자의 모든&n말과 행동엔 깊은 뜻이 담겨 있을 터. 그 명령엔 분명&n지휘 유닛을 포함한 적 부대를 섬멸하고, 적 세력의&n심장부를 타격하라는 뜻이 담겨있었다.

1001404494.english: The Savior's whisper of 'I love you' truly makes me happy. And depending on the meaning and expectations contained in those sweet words… I am ready to gladly accept the Savior at any time.
1001404494.korean: 구원자의 ‘사랑한다’는 속삭임은 나를 정말로&n기쁘게한다. 그리고 그 달콤한 말에 담긴 의미와&n기대에 따라… 나는 언제든지 구원자를 기쁘게&n받아들일 준비가 되어있다.

1001404495.english: The light was an illusion. Even when the Order and the world were in danger, he did not reveal himself. The Savior who gave hope to us in despair is the one with the right to establish a new order and discipline. And realizing that will is my duty.
1001404495.korean: 빛은 허상이었다. 교단이, 세계가 위험에 처해도&n그는 모습을 드러내지 않았다. 절망에 빠진&n우리에게 희망을 준 구원자야말로 새로운&n질서와 규율을 세울 권리가 있다.&n그리고 그 뜻을 실현하는 것은, 나의 의무다.

1001404496.english: ...I cannot understand. I merely followed the Savior's orders because he commanded me to 'destroy the enemy command unit.' There must be a deep meaning behind every word and action of the Savior. That command clearly meant to annihilate the enemy forces, including the command unit, and strike at the heart of the enemy power.
1001404496.korean: ...이해할 수 없군. 구원자가 ‘적 지휘 유닛을 격파하라’&n고 했기에 그 말에 따랐을 뿐이다. 구원자의 모든&n말과 행동엔 깊은 뜻이 담겨 있을 터. 그 명령엔 분명&n지휘 유닛을 포함한 적 부대를 섬멸하고, 적 세력의&n심장부를 타격하라는 뜻이 담겨있었다.

1001404497.english: The Savior's whisper of 'I love you' truly makes me happy. And depending on the meaning and expectations contained in those sweet words… I am ready to gladly accept the Savior at any time.
1001404497.korean: 구원자의 ‘사랑한다’는 속삭임은 나를 정말로&n기쁘게한다. 그리고 그 달콤한 말에 담긴 의미와&n기대에 따라… 나는 언제든지 구원자를 기쁘게&n받아들일 준비가 되어있다.

1001404498.english: Hmph... To think that I would feel pleasure- ...Is that so? If that is the Savior's will, I will do so.
1001404498.korean: 흐윽… 내가, 쾌락을 느껴서는-&n...그런가. 구원자의 뜻이 그러하다면,&n그렇게 하겠다.

1001404499.english: Hic… If I'm feeling pleasure—… If that's the Savior's will, then I shall obey.
1001404499.korean: 흐윽… 내가, 쾌락을 느껴서는-&n...그런가. 구원자의 뜻이 그러하다면,&n그렇게 하겠다.

1001404500.english: We have analyzed your ship's electronic warfare response system. We propose a software upgrade based on intrusion and breach simulations.
1001404500.korean: 귀함의 전자전 대응 체계를 분석 했습니다.&n침입 및 돌파 시뮬레이션을 통한 소프트웨어&n업그레이드를 제안합니다.

1001404501.english: I express my gratitude for enabling me to preserve the ancient doctrines. Even if the Savior blesses me, I feel a resistance to wearing unholy garments like others.
1001404501.korean: 옛 교리를 지킬 수 있게 해준 것에&n감사를 표한다. 아무리 구원자가&n축성을 해준다고 해도, 다른 이들처럼&n불경한 의복을 입는 것에는&n저항감이 있으니까.

1001404502.english: M-Savior. Without the scroll inscribed with the Words of Light, I will be tainted by darkness- Ah... You're saying you'll bless me...? P-Please, I beg of you...
1001404502.korean: 구, 구원자님. 빛의 말씀이 적힌&n스크롤이 없으면 저는 어둠에 물들어버-&n아... 축성을 해주시겠다구요...?&n부, 부탁드릴게요...

1001404503.english: For the sake of the suffering Savior, I have prepared something humble so that you can rest. Now, please do not be shy and come up here.
1001404503.korean: 고생한 구원자를 위해, 부족하지만&n휴식을 취할 수 있도록 준비했어요. 자아,&n부끄러워하지 마시고 이리 올라오세요.

1001404504.english: The physical armament of this unit is highly reliable but not powerful. We recommend using it only for its intended purpose.
1001404504.korean: 본기의 물리적 무장은 신뢰성이 높으나,&n위력적이지는 않습니다.&n원래 용도대로만 사용하시기를 권고드립니다.

1001404505.english: Although I acknowledged the Savior, that was only as a judge. Do not mistake it for me opening my heart as a woman like Azazel did. ...Yes, I admit it. I am a little curious, too.
1001404505.korean: 내가 구원자를 인정했다고는 하나,&n그것은 심판관으로서일뿐.&n아자젤처럼 여성으로서 마음을 열었다고&n착각하진 마라. ...그래, 인정하지.&n나도 약간의 호기심은 있다.

1001404506.english: To think you saved me and cherish me so much… *sob*… How can I ever repay you for this grace, Savior…? I… know nothing but penance and atonement…
1001404506.korean: 저를 구원해주시고, 이렇게나 아껴주시다니…&n흑... 구원자님의 이 은혜에&n어떻게 보답해야 할까요...?&n저는... 고행과 속죄밖에 할 줄 아는 것이 없어서...​

1001404507.english: Put on a relaxed expression just as practiced… offer a seat when your partner arrives, and have a drink together… Yes. Prepared for… for a very long time…? A, a savior…? Since when…?
1001404507.korean: 연습한대로 여유로운 표정을 짓고…&n반려가 오면 자리를 권하고, 같이 술 한 잔…&n네. 엄청 오랫동안 준...비...?&n구, 구원자...? 언제부터...?

1001404508.english: Searching for "Spider Queen" personality. ...Failed. No matching entry exists in the database.
1001404508.korean: "거미 여왕" 인격 검색 중입니다.&n...실패. 귀함의 데이터베이스에&n해당 사항이 존재하지 않습니다.

1001404509.english: Do I have to adapt to the changed law...? I don't know about the other things, but to think it doesn't prohibit lust and sexual desire between men and women. If things continue like this, won't the meaning of the blessing fade away?
1001404509.korean: 바뀐 율법에 적응해야 하는 건가…&n다른 건 모르겠지만, 남녀간의 정욕과&n애욕을 금지하지 않다니. 이래서야&n축복의 의미가 퇴색되지 않는가.

1001404510.english: Ah, even if I have received forgiveness from the Savior… you shouldn’t be this close to me… Ah, because there might still be fragments of sin remaining…
1001404510.korean: 아, 아무리 구원자님께&n죄사함을 받았다고 해도…&n이렇게 제게 가까이 계시면 안 돼요…&n아, 아직 죄의 편린이 남아 있을 지도&n모르니까요...​

1001404511.english: Shall we have a drink together in this nice atmosphere? Hehe, just one glass will be fine. You shouldn't drink too much and get drunk.
1001404511.korean: 분위기 있게 같이 한 잔 할까요?&n후후, 딱 한잔이면 괜찮을 거예요.&n너무 많이 마시고 취하면 안 돼요.

1001404512.english: We have analyzed your ship's electronic warfare response system. We propose a software upgrade based on intrusion and breach simulations.
1001404512.korean: 귀함의 전자전 대응 체계를 분석 했습니다.&n침입 및 돌파 시뮬레이션을 통한 소프트웨어&n업그레이드를 제안합니다.

1001404513.english: Beautiful, huh... So I seduced Azazel with such sweet words. It’s not a bad feeling.
1001404513.korean: 아름답다, 라…&n이런 달콤한 말로 아자젤을 미혹했나.&n나쁘지 않은 기분이로군.

1001404514.english: Really pretty clothes… Oh, Veronica helped with the makeup and accessories. While taking this and that out of the drawer… she said, “Lady Ramiel, you must not end up like that.”
1001404514.korean: 정말 예쁜 옷… 아, 화장이랑&n장신구는 베로니카가 도와줬어요.&n서랍에서 이것저것 꺼내면서… &n"라미엘님은 저렇게 되시면 안 됩니다."&n라고 하던데...

1001404515.english: Th-now, the next part... I mean... now that I'm self-conscious, I feel embarrassed. I think I'll just do it comfortably like usual.
1001404515.korean: 이, 이제 다음이... 그러니까…&n의식해버리니까 부끄럽네요.&n그냥 평소처럼 편하게 할까봐요.

1001404516.english: The physical armament of this unit is highly reliable but not powerful. We recommend using it only for its intended purpose.
1001404516.korean: 본기의 물리적 무장은 신뢰성이 높으나,&n위력적이지는 않습니다.&n원래 용도대로만 사용하시기를 권고드립니다.

1001404517.english: I am well aware that my body stirs the heart of a man like a savior. I am willing to do as the savior pleases—no, let me correct myself. I… am longing for the savior’s touch.
1001404517.korean: 내 육체가 구원자와 같은 남성의 마음을&n동하게 한다는 사실은 잘 알고 있다.&n얼마든지 구원자의 뜻대로- ...아니, 정정하지.&n내가… 구원자의 손길을 바라고 있다.​

1001404518.english: Um, this is my first time swimming... Ah, are you... going to hold my hand...? ...Yes. This makes me feel safe.
1001404518.korean: 저, 저는 수영은 처음이라…&n아, 손을… 잡아주시는 건가요...? ...네.&n이러면 안심할 수 있어요.​

1001404519.english: My dear... I love you so much... *hiccup*. I prepared all of this... but I keep making mistakes... Ugh, I'm such an idiot... You fool...
1001404519.korean: 반려가아... 너~무 죠아서어…&n딸꾹. 이런 거 다~ 준비했는데에…&n자꾸 실수만하구…&n우웅, 나는 바보야... 이 멍충이...​

1001404520.english: Searching for "Spider Queen" personality. ...Failed. No matching entry exists in the database.
1001404520.korean: "거미 여왕" 인격 검색 중입니다.&n...실패. 귀함의 데이터베이스에&n해당 사항이 존재하지 않습니다.

1001404521.english: Faith is blindness. If one can turn one's eyes elsewhere, how can that be called faith? Right now, only the Savior exists in my eyes and heart. Yes... as a judge and as a woman, both sides.
1001404521.korean: 믿음은 곧 맹목이다.&n다른 곳으로 눈을 돌릴 수 있다면,&n어찌 그것을 믿음이라고 하겠는가.&n지금 내 눈과 마음엔 구원자만이 존재한다.&n그래... 심판관으로서와 여성으로서, 양쪽 모두.

1001404522.english: Is my becoming happy... the way to repay you...? Then... please allow me to harbor even more affection for you, Savior, than I do now. That... is my happiness.
1001404522.korean: 제가 행복해지는게... 보답인건가요...?&n그럼... 제가 지금보다도 더,&n구원자님께 애정을 품는 것을 허락해주세요.&n그게... 제 행복이에요.

1001404523.english: I worked so hard to prepare to take the lead... but in the end, it turned out like this again... I wanted to show the Savior a beautiful and elegant side of myself... Why, why, you ask? ...Because every time the Savior shows me a new side of themselves, I fall for them all over again. So I, too... Ugh...
1001404523.korean: 제가 리드하려고 열심히 준비했는데…&n결국 또 이렇게 되어버리네요…&n구원자에게 아름답고 우아한 모습을&n보여주고 싶었는데… 왜, 왜냐구요?&n...구원자가 제게 새로운 모습을 보여줄&n때마다, 새삼스레 반하게 되니까요.&n그래서 저도... 으으...​

1001404524.english: Good, Savior. Fill me with your blessings.
1001404524.korean: 좋다, 구원자여.&n그대의 축복으로 나를 가득 채워라.

1001404525.english: Ah, no...! If the Savior falls because of me... *sob*...
1001404525.korean: 아, 안 돼요...!&n저 때문에 구원자님께서 타락하시면…&n흑...​

1001404526.english: Wait— A savior...? Ah, I still have something prepared...
1001404526.korean: 잠- 구원자...?&n아, 아직 준비한 게 남았는, 데...

1001404527.english: I've known all along that this isn't a blessing. As a woman… I only want a man as my Savior.
1001404527.korean: 축복이 아니란 것 따위, 예전부터&n알고 있었다. 여성으로서의 내가…&n남성으로서의 구원자를 원할 뿐이다.​

1001404528.english: Ah… it's hot… Just a little more, can you stay like this? It's a gentle, soft kind of heat, different from the original sin I carry… It feels good…
1001404528.korean: 아... 뜨거워… 조금만 더,&n이대로 있어주시면 안 될까요...?&n제가 지고 있던 원죄와는 다른,&n상냥하고 부드러운 뜨거움이라…&n기분, 좋아요... ​

1001404529.english: Savior, stay still. Today I'll take care of everything—Eek?! If this keeps up, just like usual… I won't have a choice. Love me like always, partner.
1001404529.korean: 구원자는 가만히 있어요. 오늘은&n제가 다 알아서- 꺅?! 이, 이러면&n평소처럼 또… 어쩔 수 없겠네요.&n평소처럼 저를... 사랑해줘요, 반려.

1001404530.english: How can the Savior of the cult blush just from linking arms? Yes, that's affection. I have feelings for you. And you for me, right?
1001404530.korean: 어찌 교단의 구원자가&n팔짱 정도로 얼굴을 붉히는가.&n그래, 애정 표현이라는 거다.&n나는 그대에게 애정을 품고 있으니까.&n그건 피차 마찬가지 아니던가?

1001404531.english: Can I really be spoiled even more...? If you keep doing this, my heart will weaken… I might ask to hold your hand all day or want you to say you love me before I sleep… Such unreasonable requests, maybe…?
1001404531.korean: 저, 정말로 더 어리광 부려도 되나요...?&n자꾸 그러시면 저, 마음이 약해져서…&n하루종일 손을 잡고 있어 달라거나,&n잠들기 전에는 꼭 사랑한다고 말해 달라거나…&n이, 이런 무리한 부탁을 드릴지도 몰라요...?

1001404532.english: Partner, let's spend this holiday alone in the room again. …Yes? Well… watch movies, eat, nap, hold hands… and kiss… like usual.
1001404532.korean: 반려, 이번 휴일에도 방에서 단 둘이&n보내요. ...네? 그야... 영화도 보고,&n밥도 먹고, 낮잠도 자고, 손도 잡고…&n키, 키스도… 네. 평소처럼요.

1001404533.english: T-Tuna cans? W-why are you asking Us that? We... steal things... Eek... Y-you'll keep it a secret, right? Huh? Commander~
1001404533.korean: 차, 참치캔? 그, 그걸 왜 짐에게 묻는 것이지?&n짐은 도둑질 같은 건…  엑…&n비, 비밀로 해 줄 거지? 응? 사령관~

1001404534.english: Aqua wants to grow up like her older sisters, too. Then wouldn't she become flawlessly perfect? ​​...You said it's okay to be only half like them? Why?
1001404534.korean: 아쿠아도 언니들처럼 어른이 되고 싶어.&n그럼 빈틈없이 완벽해지지 않을까?&n...언니들은 반만 닮아도 된다구? 왜?

1001404535.english: There are things you can only see on Mars while it is being terraformed. Phobos, Deimos, and Mount Olympus. I really want to go see them with you, Commander.
1001404535.korean: 테라포밍 중인 화성에서만 볼 수 있는 것도&n있어요. 포보스와 데이모스, 올림푸스 산.&n꼭 사령관님이랑 같이 보러가고 싶네요.

1001404536.english: Will you give me a tight hug? Yeah... It's really strange. Whenever I'm in the Commander's arms, I gain strength I didn't have before. ...Can I ask you to do this sometimes in the future too?
1001404536.korean: 꼭 안아줄래? 응… 참 이상해.&n사령관 품에만 안기면 없던 힘이 생겨.&n...앞으로도 가끔씩 부탁해도 돼?

1001404537.english: Um, Commander...? Is something wrong...? You look down... Shall I, shall I pat your head? Th-This is a special reward bestowed by the Princess of the True Ancestors!
1001404537.korean: 저, 사령관…? 안 좋은 일 있어…? 기운 없어 보이는데…&n내, 내가 머리라도 쓰다듬어 줄까?&n지, 진조의 프린세스가 특별히 내리는 상이로다!

1001404538.english: Aqua wants to become a fairy rather than a hero now. A fairy who always stays by the side of our hero, Master, and helps him... that kind of fairy.
1001404538.korean: 아쿠아는 이제 영웅보단 요정이 되고 싶어.&n항상 우리의 영웅인 주인님 곁을 지키고&n도움을 주는… 그런 요정.

1001404539.english: How about we make the White Shell huge? So that the Commander and I can ride it together. ...Ask the engineers directly? I think I'll get scolded.
1001404539.korean: 화이트 쉘을 커다랗게 개조하면 어떨까요?&n사령관님이랑 저랑 둘이서도 탈 수 있게요.&n...엔지니어분들한테 직접 부탁이요?&n혼날 것 같아요.

1001404540.english: If there were a prince in a fairy tale, wouldn't the Commander be it? Because the Commander is the only human who saved me. Thank you for letting me see the sun.
1001404540.korean: 동화 속 왕자님이 있다면 사령관이 아닐까?&n날 구원해 준 인간은 사령관뿐이니까.&n내가 해를 볼 수 있게 해줘서 고마워.

1001404541.english: Hmph, I wish I could dance a waltz with you in this garden of profusely blooming giraffe flowers... W-what do you mean? Hmph, Commander, you idiot...
1001404541.korean: 흐, 흐드러지게 피어난 기린초 정원에서&n그대와 함께 왈츠를 추고 싶구나...&n무, 무슨 뜻이냐구? 히잉, 사령관 바보...

1001404542.english: If Master is happy every time I bring flowers, I’ll fill an entire hill with them. Then Master will smile, right? Aqua likes it best when Master smiles.
1001404542.korean: 꽃을 가져올 때마다 주인님이 기뻐해준다면&n꽃으로 언덕 하나를 가-득 채울 거야.&n그러면 주인님이 웃어주겠지? 아쿠아는&n주인님이 웃을 때가 제일 좋아.

1001404543.english: Will you still like me, Commander, even when I grow up? I used to want to grow up quickly, but now I hope you like me, Commander. ...Hehe, really?
1001404543.korean: 어른이 돼도 사령관님이 절 좋아해주실까요?&n옛날엔 빨리 어른이 되고 싶었는데, 이젠&n사령관님이 절 좋아해주셨으면 좋겠어요.&n...헤헤, 진짜요?

1001404544.english: Can... hold my hand? ...My hand isn't rough or anything, is it? That's a relief... Thank you, Commander. It really is a good day...
1001404544.korean: 손... 잡아줄 수 있어? ...혹시 내 손이 거칠다거나&n그렇진 않지? 다행이다… 고마워, 사령관.&n정말, 좋은 날이야…

1001404545.english: T-Tuna cans? W-why are you asking Us that? We... steal things... Eek... Y-you'll keep it a secret, right? Huh? Commander~
1001404545.korean: 차, 참치캔? 그, 그걸 왜 짐에게 묻는 것이지?&n짐은 도둑질 같은 건…  엑…&n비, 비밀로 해 줄 거지? 응? 사령관~

1001404546.english: Aqua wants to grow up like her older sisters, too. Then wouldn't she become flawlessly perfect? ​​...You said it's okay to be only half like them? Why?
1001404546.korean: 아쿠아도 언니들처럼 어른이 되고 싶어.&n그럼 빈틈없이 완벽해지지 않을까?&n...언니들은 반만 닮아도 된다구? 왜?

1001404547.english: There are things you can only see on Mars while it is being terraformed. Phobos, Deimos, and Mount Olympus. I really want to go see them with you, Commander.
1001404547.korean: 테라포밍 중인 화성에서만 볼 수 있는 것도&n있어요. 포보스와 데이모스, 올림푸스 산.&n꼭 사령관님이랑 같이 보러가고 싶네요.

1001404548.english: Will you give me a tight hug? Yeah... It's really strange. Whenever I'm in the Commander's arms, I gain strength I didn't have before. ...Can I ask you to do this sometimes in the future too?
1001404548.korean: 꼭 안아줄래? 응… 참 이상해.&n사령관 품에만 안기면 없던 힘이 생겨.&n...앞으로도 가끔씩 부탁해도 돼?

1001404549.english: Um, Commander...? Is something wrong...? You look down... Shall I, shall I pat your head? Th-This is a special reward bestowed by the Princess of the True Ancestors!
1001404549.korean: 저, 사령관…? 안 좋은 일 있어…? 기운 없어 보이는데…&n내, 내가 머리라도 쓰다듬어 줄까?&n지, 진조의 프린세스가 특별히 내리는 상이로다!

1001404550.english: Aqua wants to become a fairy rather than a hero now. A fairy who always stays by the side of our hero, Master, and helps him... that kind of fairy.
1001404550.korean: 아쿠아는 이제 영웅보단 요정이 되고 싶어.&n항상 우리의 영웅인 주인님 곁을 지키고&n도움을 주는… 그런 요정.

1001404551.english: How about we make the White Shell huge? So that the Commander and I can ride it together. ...Ask the engineers directly? I think I'll get scolded.
1001404551.korean: 화이트 쉘을 커다랗게 개조하면 어떨까요?&n사령관님이랑 저랑 둘이서도 탈 수 있게요.&n...엔지니어분들한테 직접 부탁이요?&n혼날 것 같아요.

1001404552.english: If there were a prince in a fairy tale, wouldn't the Commander be it? Because the Commander is the only human who saved me. Thank you for letting me see the sun.
1001404552.korean: 동화 속 왕자님이 있다면 사령관이 아닐까?&n날 구원해 준 인간은 사령관뿐이니까.&n내가 해를 볼 수 있게 해줘서 고마워.

1001404553.english: Hmph, I wish I could dance a waltz with you in this garden of profusely blooming giraffe flowers... W-what do you mean? Hmph, Commander, you idiot...
1001404553.korean: 흐, 흐드러지게 피어난 기린초 정원에서&n그대와 함께 왈츠를 추고 싶구나...&n무, 무슨 뜻이냐구? 히잉, 사령관 바보...

1001404554.english: If Master is happy every time I bring flowers, I’ll fill an entire hill with them. Then Master will smile, right? Aqua likes it best when Master smiles.
1001404554.korean: 꽃을 가져올 때마다 주인님이 기뻐해준다면&n꽃으로 언덕 하나를 가-득 채울 거야.&n그러면 주인님이 웃어주겠지? 아쿠아는&n주인님이 웃을 때가 제일 좋아.

1001404555.english: Will you still like me, Commander, even when I grow up? I used to want to grow up quickly, but now I hope you like me, Commander. ...Hehe, really?
1001404555.korean: 어른이 돼도 사령관님이 절 좋아해주실까요?&n옛날엔 빨리 어른이 되고 싶었는데, 이젠&n사령관님이 절 좋아해주셨으면 좋겠어요.&n...헤헤, 진짜요?

1001404556.english: Can... hold my hand? ...My hand isn't rough or anything, is it? That's a relief... Thank you, Commander. It really is a good day...
1001404556.korean: 손... 잡아줄 수 있어? ...혹시 내 손이 거칠다거나&n그렇진 않지? 다행이다… 고마워, 사령관.&n정말, 좋은 날이야…

1001404557.english: My familiar. Read to me until I fall asleep… Ah, no, until I wake up in the morning. ...Really? You won't leave me behind, will you…? Yes. Thank you, Commander...
1001404557.korean: 권속이여. 짐이 잠들 때까지… 아, 아니,&n아침에 깰 때까지 책을 읽어 주도록 해라.&n...진짜지? 날 두고 어디 가버리지 않을 거지…?&n응. 고마워, 사령관...

1001404558.english: Whining, I had a dream where Master hated me. It's scary. Can't you read me a storybook tonight? I think I'd fall into a deep sleep then...
1001404558.korean: 히잉, 주인님이 날 싫어하는 꿈 꿨어. 무서워,&n오늘 밤에 동화책 읽어주면 안돼?&n그럼 푹 잠들 것 같은데...

1001404559.english: Even when I grow up, I hope you will pet me every day, Commander. Because there is nothing happier than this.
1001404559.korean: 제가 어른이 돼도 사령관님이 매일&n쓰다듬어주셨으면 해요.&n이것보다 행복한 일은… 없으니까요.

1001404560.english: I don't really like getting my hair messed up, but I'm happy when the Commander does it. So... please keep doing it. Yes. Like this...
1001404560.korean: 머리카락 헝클어지는 거 별로 안 좋아하는데,&n사령관이 해주는 건 기뻐. 그러니까... 계속해줘.&n응. 그렇게...

1001404561.english: My servant, read me a book until I fall asleep… No, until morning. …Really? You won't leave me alone? Thank you, Commander.
1001404561.korean: 권속이여. 짐이 잠들 때까지… 아, 아니,&n아침에 깰 때까지 책을 읽어 주도록 해라.&n...진짜지? 날 두고 어디 가버리지 않을 거지…?&n응. 고마워, 사령관...

1001404562.english: Hii, I dreamed Master hated me. Scary. Can you read me a fairy tale tonight? Then I think I'll sleep well…
1001404562.korean: 히잉, 주인님이 날 싫어하는 꿈 꿨어. 무서워,&n오늘 밤에 동화책 읽어주면 안돼?&n그럼 푹 잠들 것 같은데...

1001404563.english: Even when I'm an adult, I want Commander to pet me every day. There's nothing happier than that.
1001404563.korean: 제가 어른이 돼도 사령관님이 매일&n쓰다듬어주셨으면 해요.&n이것보다 행복한 일은… 없으니까요.

1001404564.english: I don't usually like messy hair, but I'm happy when Commander does it. So… keep going. Yes, like that…
1001404564.korean: 머리카락 헝클어지는 거 별로 안 좋아하는데,&n사령관이 해주는 건 기뻐. 그러니까... 계속해줘.&n응. 그렇게...

1001404566.english: I like it when Commander pets me… Hah! To catch the true princess off guard… Not bad, servant.
1001404566.korean: 사령관이 쓰다듬어주니 좋아… 핫!&n지, 진조의 프린세스를 방심시키다니…&n제법이구나, 권속이여.

1001404568.english: When I grow up, Commander's petting will lessen, right? Then please do it a lot before that.
1001404568.korean: 언젠가 어른이 되면 쓰다듬어주시는 것도&n덜해지겠죠? 그럼, 그 전에 많이 부탁드려요.

1001404570.english: Yes… it's meaningful. Keep petting me. So Commander's warmth never fades.
1001404570.korean: 응… 의미있는 일이구나. ...계속 쓰다듬어줘.&n사령관의 온기가 사라지지 않게.

1001404571.english: I know everything too… Just think of it as a privilege before I become an adult, okay, Big Brother?
1001404571.korean: 나도 알 거 다 아는데… 어른이 되기 전 &n특권이라고 생각하면 돼, 오빠?

1001404573.english: …I think I just fell asleep for a moment. …Can I sleep more? Yes. Commander… I really love you…
1001404573.korean: ...잠깐 잠들었던 것 같아.&n...더 자도 돼? 응. 사령관…&n정말 좋아해…

1001404574.english: Big Brother, Big Brother. I had a great idea. Let's just stay like this forever. So close that other girls get jealous!
1001404574.korean: 오빠, 오빠. 나 좋은 생각 났어,&n우리 계속 이러고 있자. 다른 언니들이&n질투할 정도로 꼭 붙어 있는 거야!

1001404576.english: Haam… I don't care… I'll just hug Commander tight and sleep… so warm…
1001404576.korean: 하암… 모르겠다… 대신 나도…&n사령관 꼭 껴안고 잘 거야… 따뜻하다아…

1001404577.english: It's a big problem… Now I can't sleep without Commander… When did you come…? The seat next to me is free… Let's sleep together until morning…
1001404577.korean: 큰일이야… 이제 사령관이 없으면 잠이 안 와…&n언제 왔어...? 마침 옆자리 비었는데…&n아침까지 쭉, 같이 자자…​

1001404579.english: Really… maybe it's okay? For some reason, I can sleep deeply when Commander is nearby…
1001404579.korean: 정말… 오히려 괜찮나…?&n이유는 몰라도, 사령관이 곁에 있으면…&n깊이 잠들 수 있으니까…

1001404580.english: B-11 Night Angel? Hehe, of course I, the older sister, am better. Though she would never admit it.
1001404580.korean: 나이트 앤젤이요? 후후, 당연히&n언니인 제가 더 뛰어나죠. 본인은&n절대로 인정 안하겠지만요.

1001404581.english: Ahaha, my cute gentleman. I wonder where you are looking right now~? If you promise to be with me for the rest of your life... I can show you a little more.
1001404581.korean: 아하핫, 귀여운 젠틀맨. 지금 어디를 보고&n계시는 걸까요~? 평생 저와 함께 하겠다고&n약속해주시면... 좀 더 보여드릴 수 있어요.

1001404582.english: I expected you to find this surprising. After all, I haven't deliberately shown it to you until now. As you said, the on-off status might be quite distinct.
1001404582.korean: 의외라고 생각하실 줄 알았습니다.&n지금까지는 일부러 보여드리지 않았으니까요.&n말씀대로, 온오프가 확실한 걸지도 모르겠습니다.

1001404583.english: I ended up saying things I didn't mean again today... I didn't mean to... I'm sure you thought it was annoying- Ah. P-Commander?! H-hehe... Did something come up that only someone as talented as me can handle?
1001404583.korean: 오늘도 맘에 없는 말을 해버렸어... 그러려던 게&n아닌데... 분명 짜증난다고 생각- 앗. 사, 사령관님?!&n후, 후후... 뛰어난 저밖에 못하는 일이 생겼나요?

1001404584.english: Since magical girls exist for everyone, if they end up loving only one man... hehe, they end up looking like this. Gentleman, which Magical MoMo do you like more? Even if you don't answer... I think I know.
1001404584.korean: 마법소녀는 모두를 위해 존재하니까, 한 남자만을&n사랑하게되면... 후후, 이런 모습이 되어 버려요.&n젠틀맨은 어떤 모모가 더 마음에 드세요?&n대답하지 않으셔도... 알 것 같지만.

1001404585.english: Savior. Since you accepted my date request, may I be unreasonable about just one more thing? During this vacation... all you have to do is hang out with me however I want.
1001404585.korean: 구원자님. 데이트 신청을 받아주신 김에, 한 가지만&n더 억지를 부려도 되겠습니까? 이번 휴가때는...&n제가 원하는 대로 어울려 주시면 됩니다.

1001404586.english: I have no choice but to be confident. There isn't another bioroid like me, with such great proportions, beauty, and outstanding skills, right? Even in the past, whenever I appeared in the skies— *Screams*?! W-why are you suddenly touching my stomach?!
1001404586.korean: 당당할 수밖에요. 저처럼 비율 좋고, 아름답고,&n실력도 출중한 바이오로이드는 없잖아요?&n예전에도 제가 상공에 나타났다 하면-&n꺅?! 가, 갑자기 배는 왜 만지시는거죠?!

1001404587.english: A lunar ritual? We don't need that. We can just go straight to the end in one go... There's no need to keep each other in suspense, is there?
1001404587.korean: 달의 의식이요? 그런 건 필요 없어요.&n단번에 끝까지 가버리면 되는데...&n굳이 서로를 애태울 필요, 없잖아요?

1001404588.english: Even in this attire, my faith remains unchanged, Savior. You may... verify it for yourself.
1001404588.korean: 이런 차림일지라도 제 신앙심은 변하지 않습니다,&n구원자님. 직접... 확인해 보셔도 괜찮습니다.

1001404589.english: A-87 Bansheealways listens well to my stories. The admirable Wraith tells me she respects me. Sigh, I wish you were a little bit like them, Colonel.
1001404589.korean: 밴시는 항상 제 이야기를 잘 들어줘요.&n기특한 레이스는 존경한다고 말해주고요. 하아,&n대령님도 조금은 이런 분들을 닮았으면 좋겠는데.

1001404590.english: How was my performance? I'm Black Magical MoMo, the one who surprised everyone by appearing in the 4th movie! I-I'm a little embarrassed by the costume... but the current Magical MoMo won't be defeated. Because a magical girl who fell into love and became corrupted is strong!
1001404590.korean: 제 연기 어떠셨어요? 극장판 4기에서 등장해&n모두를 놀라게 했던! 블랙 모모랍니다~&n의, 의상이 조금 부끄럽기는 한데...&n지금의 모모는 지지 않아요.&n사랑에 빠져 타락한 마법소녀는 강하니까요!

1001404591.english: I don't really remember how I came to have this hobby... but for now, let's just say it's because I wanted to appeal to you, Savior, as a woman rather than an Inquisitor.
1001404591.korean: 어쩌다 이런 취미를 갖게 되었는지는 잘 기억나지&n않습니다만... 일단은 구원자님에게 이단심문관이&n아닌 여성으로서의 저를 어필하고 싶어서...&n인걸로 해두겠습니다.

1001404592.english: Ah... I-I'm sorry. During this training, uh, I made a mistake... so even if you end up hating me— What? ...Yes. From next time... I'll do better... It's the first time I've heard someone say it's okay not to do well every time...
1001404592.korean: 아... 죄, 죄송합니다. 이번 훈련에서는, 그,&n실수를 해서... 저를 싫어하게 되셔도-&n네? ...네. 다음부터는... 잘 할게요...&n매번 잘하지 않아도 괜찮다는 말...&n처음 들어봤어...

1001404593.english: Hehehe, actually, the step-by-step Moon Ritual is just a workaround created by the first magical girl who fell in love to avoid falling into corruption. As for me now... I wouldn't be able to wait for something like that, though.
1001404593.korean: 에헤헤, 사실 단계별로 치르는 달의 의식은&n사랑에 빠져버린 초대 마법소녀가 타락하지&n않기 위해 만들어낸 편법 같은 거예요.&n지금의 저는... 그런 거, 못 기다리겠지만요.

1001404594.english: Are you feeling awkward because I'm being more proactive than usual? There isn't a woman who wouldn't be excited spending a vacation alone with a man she has a deep affection for, dressed casually. After all, opportunities like this... to have you all to herself are rare.
1001404594.korean: 평소와 달리 적극적이라 어색하십니까?&n깊은 연정을 품은 남성과, 가벼운 차림으로&n단둘이 휴가를 보내는데, 들뜨지 않을 여성은&n없겠죠. 이렇게... 구원자님을 독점할 기회는&n흔치 않으니까요.

1001404595.english: Um, Commander. I have something to tell you... What? I haven't said anything yet...? Why do you keep telling me it's okay? ...Sniff, yes. Then, I, the beautiful and outstanding one, will assist you, Commander.
1001404595.korean: 저, 사령관님. 드릴 말씀이... 네? 아직 아무 말도&n안 했는데요...? 왜 자꾸, 괜찮다고 해주시는 거예요.&n...훌쩍, 네. 그러면, 아름답고 뛰어난 제가&n사령관님을 보좌해 드릴게요.

1001404596.english: Even though I look like this, please know that I am still me. If there is just one thing different from before... it is that I no longer hide my feelings for you, Commander.
1001404596.korean: 이런 모습이 되어도, 저는 저라는 걸 알아주세요.&n이전과 다른게 딱 하나 있다면... 사령관님에 대한&n제 마음을, 더이상 숨기지 않는다는 것 뿐이에요.

1001404597.english: The Savior did not forbid the love and lust between men and women. However... there still remain many things and actions in this world that the Savior did not foresee and therefore did not permit. Whatever they may be... I will gladly accept them.
1001404597.korean: 구원자님께선 남녀간의 애욕과 정욕을 금하지&n아니하셨습니다. 다만... 이 세상엔 구원자님께서&n미처 생각치 못하셔서 허가하지 않으신 것과 행위도,&n아직 많이 남아 있습니다. 그 어떤 것이라도 저는...&n기쁘게 받아들이겠습니다.

1001404598.english: *Gasp*...! Ah... was it you...? Uh, feel free to do as you please. It's my pride, after all. Haha...
1001404598.korean: 흡...! 아... 그쪽, 이었나요...?&n어, 얼마든지 마음대로 하셔도 괜찮아요.&n제 자랑이니까요. 하하...

1001404599.english: Cook, okay. Let's... become corrupted together with Magical MoMo.
1001404599.korean: 쿡, 좋아요. 모모랑 같이... 타락해 버려요.

1001404600.english: I will do as I please today. Please stay still.
1001404600.korean: 오늘은 제가 원하는 대로 하겠습니다.&n가만히 있어 주세요.

1001404601.english: Ah… um… because I'm shy… please keep my clothes on as much as possible…
1001404601.korean: 아... 저, 저기... 부끄러우니까...&n옷은 가급적 그대로, 부탁드려요...

1001404602.english: If you do this… Magical MoMo might never be caught by the magic again…?
1001404602.korean: 이렇게 해버리시면... 모모는 더 이상,&n마법에 걸리지 않게 되어버릴지도...?

1001404603.english: I think this pace is enough for me. Now… yes. Everything is according to the Savior's will.
1001404603.korean: 제 페이스는 이걸로 충분한 것 같습니다.&n이제는... 네. 모든 것은 구원자님의 뜻대로.

1001404604.english: Right now, more than the praise of others, it's the simple ‘good job' from my husband that makes me happiest. Am I doing well?
1001404604.korean: 지금은 다른 분들의 인정보다도, 서방님의...&n잘했다는 가벼운 말 한마디가 더 기쁜걸요?&n저... 잘 하고 있나요?

1001404605.english: It's a bit embarrassing to act like this now… but thanks to the gentleman, Magical MoMo can no longer return to being a magical girl… You're responsible♡
1001404605.korean: 이제와서 이런 연기를 하기는 좀 부끄럽지만...&n젠틀맨 때문에 모모는, 더이상 마법소녀로&n돌아갈 수 없는 몸이 되어버렸으니까...&n책임지세요♡

1001404606.english: Partner… you want me to call you that? It's not difficult, but it feels like you're testing my affection, which is unpleasant. I'll prove it in another way…
1001404606.korean: 반려... 라고 불러달라는 말씀이십니까? 어려운&n일은 아닙니다만, 제 애정을 시험받는 것 같아&n불쾌하군요. 다른 방식으로... 증명해드리겠습니다.

1001404607.english: Me? I had the alcohol ready and was waiting for you, husband. I drank way too much last time, so I'm going to have just a little today. You drink only a little today, too, husband.
1001404607.korean: 나 말이야?&n술을 챙겨두고 남편을 기다리고 있었지.&n저번에는 너무 많이 마셔버렸으니까,&n오늘은 조금만 먹을 거야.&n나, 남편도 오늘은 조금만 먹어.

1001404608.english: I still haven't been able to get rid of my habit of waddling... What? You say it doesn't matter because it's cute... Commander, I really... really like that about you.
1001404608.korean: 아직도 뒤뚱뒤뚱 걷는 버릇을 못 고쳤어요… 네?&n귀여워서 상관없다니… 사령관님의 그런 점,&n정말로… 정말로 좋아해요.

1001404609.english: It’s a bit tough, but… I can endure it for the Commander. Because I have to show you a prettier side of myself.
1001404609.korean: 조금 힘들지만…&n사령관님을 위해서 참을 수 있어요.&n좀 더 예쁜 모습을 보여 드려야 하니까요.

1001404610.english: Lately... I keep wondering what it would feel like to be a mom. N-don't joke around saying it's possible right now. ...Later, please make sure you make me a real mom, honey.
1001404610.korean: 요새... 엄마가 되면 어떤 기분일까하는&n생각이 자꾸 들어요. 지, 지금도 가능하다니,&n농담하지 말아요. ...나중에 꼭,&n여보가 저를 진짜 엄마로 만들어줘요.

1001404611.english: How is your husband doing these days? Everything's alright, right? Just let me know if you're having a hard time. I'll do whatever I can to help.
1001404611.korean: 남편은 요즘 어때? 별일 없는거지?&n힘든 일 있으면 내게 말만 해.&n내가 할 수 있는 거라면 뭐든 해줄 테니까.

1001404612.english: I hope you had a decent day today. Let's keep up the good work tomorrow. P-Commander, fighting!
1001404612.korean: 오늘 하루도 별일 없으셨죠?&n우리, 내일도 힘내요.&n사, 사령관님 파이팅!

1001404613.english: Snacks are prohibited with tea for the time being. You will cooperate, won't you? P-but to tell me to sit on the Commander's lap... What are you talking about...
1001404613.korean: 당분간 차 마실 때 간식은 금지예요. 협조해&n주실 거죠? 대, 대신 사령관님 무릎에 앉으라니…&n무슨 말씀을 하시는 건가요...

1001404614.english: You mean yesterday? Yes. I like to be comfortable when I'm resting... What? Th-that T-shirt was yours, honey? Uh, no wonder...
1001404614.korean: 어제 말인가요? 네.&n쉴 때는 편하게 있는 걸 좋아해서… 네?&n그, 그 티셔츠가 여보 거였나요? 어, 어쩐지…

1001404615.english: If you want to kiss... uh, just do it. Don't ask every single time; just do whatever your husband wants.
1001404615.korean: 키, 키스가 하고 싶으면...&n그, 그냥 하면 되잖아. 일일이 물어보지 말고&n그냥 남편 하고 싶은 대로 해.

1001404616.english: Please tell me if there is anything you want. I can supply you with everything from ammunition and sleeping bags to all kinds of daily necessities. ...M-m-of course, me too...
1001404616.korean: 원하는 게 있다면 뭐든 말씀해주세요.&n탄약도, 침낭도, 각종 생활 비품까지 모두 보급해&n드릴 수 있어요. ...무, 물론 저도요...

1001404617.english: So you're saying massaging helps you lose weight? You're just trying to play a trick on me, aren't you? … … But, just in case, could you please do it just a little bit?
1001404617.korean: 주무르면 살이 빠진다니, 저를 골탕먹이려고&n그러시는 거죠? ……그, 그래도 혹시 모르니까,&n조금만 해주시겠어요?

1001404618.english: Please don't be like that when the kids are around. I'm already worried because they keep calling me 'Mom' lately... Uh, does it suit me...?
1001404618.korean: 아이들이 있을 때는 너무 그러지 말아요.&n안 그래도 요새 자꾸 엄마라고 불러서&n고민인데… 어, 어울리나요…?

1001404619.english: Me? I had the alcohol ready and was waiting for you, husband. I drank way too much last time, so I'm going to have just a little today. You drink only a little today, too, husband.
1001404619.korean: 나 말이야?&n술을 챙겨두고 남편을 기다리고 있었지.&n저번에는 너무 많이 마셔버렸으니까,&n오늘은 조금만 먹을 거야.&n나, 남편도 오늘은 조금만 먹어.

1001404620.english: I still haven't been able to get rid of my habit of waddling... What? You say it doesn't matter because it's cute... Commander, I really... really like that about you.
1001404620.korean: 아직도 뒤뚱뒤뚱 걷는 버릇을 못 고쳤어요… 네?&n귀여워서 상관없다니… 사령관님의 그런 점,&n정말로… 정말로 좋아해요.

1001404621.english: It’s a bit tough, but… I can endure it for the Commander. Because I have to show you a prettier side of myself.
1001404621.korean: 조금 힘들지만…&n사령관님을 위해서 참을 수 있어요.&n좀 더 예쁜 모습을 보여 드려야 하니까요.

1001404622.english: Lately... I keep wondering what it would feel like to be a mom. N-don't joke around saying it's possible right now. ...Later, please make sure you make me a real mom, honey.
1001404622.korean: 요새... 엄마가 되면 어떤 기분일까하는&n생각이 자꾸 들어요. 지, 지금도 가능하다니,&n농담하지 말아요. ...나중에 꼭,&n여보가 저를 진짜 엄마로 만들어줘요.

1001404623.english: How is your husband doing these days? Everything's alright, right? Just let me know if you're having a hard time. I'll do whatever I can to help.
1001404623.korean: 남편은 요즘 어때? 별일 없는거지?&n힘든 일 있으면 내게 말만 해.&n내가 할 수 있는 거라면 뭐든 해줄 테니까.

1001404624.english: I hope you had a decent day today. Let's keep up the good work tomorrow. P-Commander, fighting!
1001404624.korean: 오늘 하루도 별일 없으셨죠?&n우리, 내일도 힘내요.&n사, 사령관님 파이팅!

1001404625.english: Snacks are prohibited with tea for the time being. You will cooperate, won't you? P-but to tell me to sit on the Commander's lap... What are you talking about...
1001404625.korean: 당분간 차 마실 때 간식은 금지예요. 협조해&n주실 거죠? 대, 대신 사령관님 무릎에 앉으라니…&n무슨 말씀을 하시는 건가요...

1001404626.english: You mean yesterday? Yes. I like to be comfortable when I'm resting... What? Th-that T-shirt was yours, honey? Uh, no wonder...
1001404626.korean: 어제 말인가요? 네.&n쉴 때는 편하게 있는 걸 좋아해서… 네?&n그, 그 티셔츠가 여보 거였나요? 어, 어쩐지…

1001404627.english: If you want to kiss... uh, just do it. Don't ask every single time; just do whatever your husband wants.
1001404627.korean: 키, 키스가 하고 싶으면...&n그, 그냥 하면 되잖아. 일일이 물어보지 말고&n그냥 남편 하고 싶은 대로 해.

1001404628.english: Please tell me if there is anything you want. I can supply you with everything from ammunition and sleeping bags to all kinds of daily necessities. ...M-m-of course, me too...
1001404628.korean: 원하는 게 있다면 뭐든 말씀해주세요.&n탄약도, 침낭도, 각종 생활 비품까지 모두 보급해&n드릴 수 있어요. ...무, 물론 저도요...

1001404629.english: So you're saying massaging helps you lose weight? You're just trying to play a trick on me, aren't you? … … But, just in case, could you please do it just a little bit?
1001404629.korean: 주무르면 살이 빠진다니, 저를 골탕먹이려고&n그러시는 거죠? ……그, 그래도 혹시 모르니까,&n조금만 해주시겠어요?

1001404630.english: Please don't be like that when the kids are around. I'm already worried because they keep calling me 'Mom' lately... Uh, does it suit me...?
1001404630.korean: 아이들이 있을 때는 너무 그러지 말아요.&n안 그래도 요새 자꾸 엄마라고 불러서&n고민인데… 어, 어울리나요…?

1001404631.english: Ugh... Is my husband taking the lead again today? I'm ready anytime... so go ahead and attack me as much as you want.
1001404631.korean: 읏… 오늘도… 남편이 리드하는 거야?&n난 언제든 준비돼 있으니까… 맘껏 덤벼줘.

1001404632.english: Constantly whispering that I'm pretty... that's cheating. Every time I hear it... my whole body tingles...
1001404632.korean: 자꾸 예쁘다고 속삭이시는 거... 반칙, 이에요.&n들을 때마다… 온몸이 간질거려서...

1001404633.english: If you tell me I'm pretty even now, I get soft-hearted...
1001404633.korean: 지금도 예쁘다고 말해주시면 저,&n마음이 약해져 버려요...

1001404634.english: Really… Honey, when are you going to get any work done? To think it’s because of me… I guess it can’t be helped. Just a little bit…?
1001404634.korean: 정말… 여보, 일은 언제 하려고 그래요?&n저, 저 때문이라니, 그런… 어쩔 수 없네요.&n조금만… 이에요?

1001404635.english: Ugh… today too… is my husband taking the lead? I'm always ready… come at me as much as you want.
1001404635.korean: 읏… 오늘도… 남편이 리드하는 거야?&n난 언제든 준비돼 있으니까… 맘껏 덤벼줘.

1001404636.english: You keep whispering that I'm pretty... it's unfair. Every time I hear it… my whole body tickles...
1001404636.korean: 자꾸 예쁘다고 속삭이시는 거... 반칙, 이에요.&n들을 때마다… 온몸이 간질거려서...

1001404637.english: Even now, if you tell me I'm pretty, my heart will become weak...
1001404637.korean: 지금도 예쁘다고 말해주시면 저,&n마음이 약해져 버려요...

1001404638.english: Really… honey, when are you going to work? Because of me? That's... I can't help it. Just a little… okay?
1001404638.korean: 정말… 여보, 일은 언제 하려고 그래요?&n저, 저 때문이라니, 그런… 어쩔 수 없네요.&n조금만… 이에요?

1001404639.english: I am the Empress's hound; I obeyed only her commands and cut off the lifelines of those who stood in her way. Yes, now the Empress can no longer give me orders. ...And the same goes for you.
1001404639.korean: 나는 여제님의 사냥개, 여제님의 명령만을&n따르고, 여제님을 방해하는 것들의 숨통을&n끊었지. 그래, 이제 여제님은 나한테 명령을&n내릴 수 없어. ...그리고 그건 너도 마찬가지야.​

1001404640.english: Now you are the reason for my life... So, give me a little more— ...Where are you looking right now? Why are you looking away from me? Why? Why...!
1001404640.korean: 이제 네가 내 삶의 이유야...&n그러니까, 좀 더 내게-&n...너, 지금 어딜 보는 거야?&n왜 나를 두고 한눈파는 거야?&n왜? 왜...!​

1001404641.english: Rhea? ...I was just sick and tired of her showing up day after day to spout nonsense about family and all that.
1001404641.korean: 레아? ...하루가 멀다하고 찾아와서 가족이니&n뭐니 헛소리를 늘어놓는 거에&n진절머리가 났을 뿐이야.

1001404642.english: Are you an agent of light, and a savior who has descended upon a chaotic world? Hmm, I can sense deep faith in the savior. I pledge my loyalty right here and now.
1001404642.korean: 빛의 대리인이자, 혼란한 세상에 강림한&n구원자인가. 음, 구원자를 향한 깊은 신앙심들이&n느껴지는군. 지금 이자리에서 충성을 서약하겠다.​

1001404643.english: No, do you really think doing this will change anything about me? You're seriously mistaken. No matter what you do, I don't feel anything.
1001404643.korean: 아니, 이렇게 한다고 내가 뭐라도 바뀔 거라고 생각해?&n착각이 심하시네. 네가 무슨 짓을 해도, 내겐&n아무것도 느껴지지 않아.​

1001404644.english: Was it a lie that you would give me love? Why do you keep hanging out with other guys? As expected of someone like me— Ah… If you do that again... I’ll kill you all… all of you...
1001404644.korean: 내게 사랑을 주겠다는 건 거짓말이었어?&n왜 계속 다른 녀석들하고 가까이 지내는거야?&n역시 나 같은 건- 아… 다음에 또 그러면...&n전부... 전부, 죽여버릴거니까...

1001404645.english: You're really persistent, aren't you? … Fine. I'll play along just this once. Go ahead, make the Queen happy just as you said you would.
1001404645.korean: 너, 정말 끈질기구나? …알았어.&n이번 한 번만 장단에 맞춰줄게.&n어디, 말한대로 여왕을 행복하게 만들어 봐.​

1001404646.english: Magical Girl? Great Demon King? I don't know what you're talking about. I, Captain of the Royal Guard Goltarion, follow the will of the Holy Light.
1001404646.korean: 마법소녀? 대마왕? 무슨 말을 하는지 모르겠군.&n나, 근위대장 골타리온은 성스러운 빛의 의지를 따른다.​

1001404647.english: I’ve lived wandering a ruined world, killing everything I see. You think you understand me? What do you know about me?
1001404647.korean: 나는 망해버린 세상을 떠돌면서, 보이는 모든 걸&n죽여버리면서 살아왔어. 나를 이해한다고?&n네가 나에 대해 뭘 알아.​

1001404648.english: You want me to say I… love you? I… I love you. I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you. … As expected, this isn’t enough, is it?

1001404649.english: Alcohol? I don't get drunk on this much. ...Why? If you got drunk, were you planning to do something to the Queen?
1001404649.korean: 술? 이정도로는 안 취해. ...왜?&n취하면, 여왕한테 무슨 짓이라도 하려고 했어?​

1001404650.english: The sword of light descending from the heavens at my request is the proof of my faith. And crushing pagans and defending the sanctuary is the light's reward for my faith.
1001404650.korean: 요청에 따라 하늘에서 내려오는&n빛의 검이야말로 내 신앙의 증명이노라.&n그리고 이교도를 분쇄하고, 성역을 수호하는 것은&n내 신앙에 대한 빛의 보답이지.​

1001404651.english: Ha, Mom and all that. Are you playing family? What? You're saying I can be part of the family too? Don't talk nonsense! I don't need that...
1001404651.korean: 하, 엄마니 뭐니. 가족 놀이라도 하는 거야?&n뭐? 나도 가족이 될 수 있다고? 헛소리 하지 마!&n그런 거, 필요 없어...

1001404652.english: Now you are the reason for my life... So, give me a little more— ...Where are you looking right now? Why are you looking away from me? Why? Why...!
1001404652.korean: 이제 네가 내 삶의 이유야...&n그러니까, 좀 더 내게-&n...너, 지금 어딜 보는 거야?&n왜 나를 두고 한눈파는 거야?&n왜? 왜...!​

1001404653.english: If you intend to just spout nonsense like Rhea, I have no reason to see the Queen anymore. ...You say it's nice to see that things seem to be going well? Hehe, ahahahaha...! Seriously, are you out of your mind?
1001404653.korean: 너도 레아처럼 헛소리나 늘어놓을 생각이면,&n여왕은 더 볼 일 없어. ...잘 지내는 것 같아서&n보기 좋다고? 후후, 아하하하하...!&n너, 진짜 머리가 어떻게 된 거 아냐?

1001404654.english: Are you an agent of light, and a savior who has descended upon a chaotic world? Hmm, I can sense deep faith in the savior. I pledge my loyalty right here and now.
1001404654.korean: 빛의 대리인이자, 혼란한 세상에 강림한&n구원자인가. 음, 구원자를 향한 깊은 신앙심들이&n느껴지는군. 지금 이자리에서 충성을 서약하겠다.​

1001404655.english: After everything was gone, I kept wandering aimlessly. Yeah, because I wanted to find the meaning of life. ...Hmph. To think I'm telling a story like this, I must have caught it from you guys.
1001404655.korean: 모든 게 사라지고 나서, 나는 목적도 없이 계속&n떠돌아다녔어. 그래, 삶의 의미를 찾고 싶어서.&n...흥. 내가 이런 이야기를 하다니, 너희들한테&n옮았나 보네.​

1001404656.english: Was it a lie that you would give me love? Why do you keep hanging out with other guys? As expected of someone like me— Ah… If you do that again... I’ll kill you all… all of you...
1001404656.korean: 내게 사랑을 주겠다는 건 거짓말이었어?&n왜 계속 다른 녀석들하고 가까이 지내는거야?&n역시 나 같은 건- 아… 다음에 또 그러면...&n전부... 전부, 죽여버릴거니까...

1001404657.english: Alcohol isn't so bad. I’ve found one more way to forget the pain, even if just a little. Another one? ...Just think whatever you want.
1001404657.korean: 술도 나쁘지 않네. 조금이나마 아픈 걸 잊을 수&n있는 방법이 하나 더 생겼어. 다른 하나?&n...멋대로 생각해.​

1001404658.english: Magical Girl? Great Demon King? I don't know what you're talking about. I, Captain of the Royal Guard Goltarion, follow the will of the Holy Light.
1001404658.korean: 마법소녀? 대마왕? 무슨 말을 하는지 모르겠군.&n나, 근위대장 골타리온은 성스러운 빛의 의지를 따른다.​

1001404659.english: I... I don't really know how to feel. I feel relieved yet anxious, happy yet like I'm going crazy. You know, what am I supposed to do? You're staying here, right? Don't leave my side. Please, please, please, please...! ...Forget about that just now. It's... nothing.
1001404659.korean: 이런 기분은... 잘 모르겠어. 안심되면서도 불안하고,&n기쁘면서도 미쳐버릴 것 같아. 있지, 나는 어떻게&n해야 해? 너는 계속 여기에 있는 거지? 내 곁을&n떠나지 마. 제발, 제발제발제발...!&n...방금 건 잊어버려. 아무것도... 아니니까.​

1001404660.english: You want me to say I… love you? I… I love you. I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you. … As expected, this isn’t enough, is it?

1001404661.english: Ugh...! Haa, haa... Hehe, no, I'm not okay. My whole body hurts as if it's tearing apart. So... please, don't let go of my hand...
1001404661.korean: 윽...! 하아, 하아... 후후, 아니, 안 괜찮아.&n온 몸이, 찢어질 것 같이 아파. 그러니까…&n이 손, 놓지 말고 있어줘...​

1001404662.english: The sword of light descending from the heavens at my request is the proof of my faith. And crushing pagans and defending the sanctuary is the light's reward for my faith.
1001404662.korean: 요청에 따라 하늘에서 내려오는&n빛의 검이야말로 내 신앙의 증명이노라.&n그리고 이교도를 분쇄하고, 성역을 수호하는 것은&n내 신앙에 대한 빛의 보답이지.​

1001404664.english: Do you really love me? ...I see. Then, what do you want to do? Like strangling me, or tying my hands and feet? It’s all fine, so just do whatever you want.
1001404664.korean: 너, 정말 나를 사랑해?&n...그렇구나. 그럼, 어떤 걸 하고 싶어?&n목을 조른다든가, 손발을 묶는다든가?&n다 괜찮으니까, 네가 하고 싶은 대로 해줘.​

1001404665.english: ...The Queen I suspected was a fool. Why don't you just die?

1001404666.english: Haah, haah... do more. So that I can feel that I'm alive.
1001404666.korean: 하아, 하아... 더 해봐. 내가…&n살아있다는 실감을 느낄 수 있도록.

1001404667.english: Do you really love me? ...I see. Then, what do you want to do? Choke me, tie my hands and feet? Anything's fine, just do whatever you want.
1001404667.korean: 너, 정말 나를 사랑해?&n...그렇구나. 그럼, 어떤 걸 하고 싶어?&n목을 조른다든가, 손발을 묶는다든가?&n다 괜찮으니까, 네가 하고 싶은 대로 해줘.​

1001404668.english: I knew you'd think like this. …Do as you please. Because of the alcohol… even the queen sometimes feels like that.
1001404668.korean: 역시 이럴 생각일줄 알았어.&n…맘대로 해. 술 때문에…&n드물게 여왕도, 그럴 기분이 들었으니까.​

1001404669.english: I'm your bride, so it's only natural to be by your side, right? No matter what threats, I'll always be by your side… I'll protect you… huh, what's wrong?
1001404669.korean: 나는 너만의 신부니까, 네 곁에 있는 건 당연한&n일이잖아? 어떤 위협이 있어도 항상 네 곁에&n있을 거야… 너는 내가 지켜줄게…&n어, 왜 그래?

1001404670.english: It's not as big a deal as I thought. What else? The happiness you sang about…
1001404670.korean: 생각보다 별 거 아니네. 뭐긴.&n네가 그렇게 노래를 불렀던… 행복, 말야.

1001404671.english: You're saying I torment you, Master? But... you're just too cute not to torment me, Master?
1001404671.korean: 제가 주인님을 괴롭힌다구요?&n하지만 괴롭히지 않기엔…&n주인님이 너무 귀여우신걸요?

1001404672.english: A child? I want to have one right now... but I should hold back for now, right? Please be patient with me just a little bit, too.
1001404672.korean: 아이요?&n당장이라도 가지고 싶지만...&n지금은 참아야겠죠?&n자기도 조금만 참아줘요.

1001404673.english: What do I like about shopping? Well, the process is fun. Spending time with someone I like, figuring out what to wear to look pretty, or what to dress my boyfriend in to make him look even more handsome—each and every one of those things is precious to me.
1001404673.korean: 쇼핑의 어떤 점이 좋냐고? 음, 과정이 재밌잖아.&n좋아하는 사람이랑 같은 시간을 보내고,&n뭘 입어야 내가 예쁘게 보일지,&n뭘 입혀야 내 남자가 더 멋있어질지.&n그런 것들 하나하나가 내게 소중해.

1001404674.english: Ugh... Aren't you asking me to act like the Great Demon King too much lately...? ...Huh? Me? As for what I like... Hehe. I just like being the boss's wife.
1001404674.korean: 우으… 요새 너무 대마왕 연기&n해달라는 거 아니세요…?&n...네? 저요? 저는 뭐가 좋냐면…&n헤헷. 그냥 사장님의 아내인 게 좋아요.

1001404675.english: You don't have to do anything, Master. Fighting, eating, bathing, and… Hehe, even that. You just need to relax and enjoy yourself.
1001404675.korean: 주인님은 아무것도 하지 않으셔도 괜찮아요.&n전투, 식사, 목욕, 그리고… 후후, 그것까지.&n주인님은 그냥 편안히, 즐기기만 하시면 돼요.

1001404676.english: Hehe, I can't help but look forward to it. A child who looks just like me... I could... right now...
1001404676.korean: 후훗, 기대되는 건 어쩔 수 없네요.&n자기와 닮은 아이라니... 지금 당장이라도...

1001404677.english: Hmm... Commander, you seem to get cooler every day. It's really fascinating... I feel like I wouldn't get tired of looking at you all day long. Do you feel this way when you look at me too, Commander? Huh? What the heck, hurry up~
1001404677.korean: 흐음… 사령관은 어째 날이 갈수록&n더 멋있어지네. 참 신기해… 하루 종일 봐도&n질리지 않을 것 같아. 사령관도 날 보면 이런&n기분이 들어? 응? 뭐야아, 빨리~

1001404678.english: No, a song? I, I am practicing various things... I, I'll sing it for you in the room later!
1001404678.korean: 노, 노래요?&n여, 여러 가지 연습하고 있기는 한데요…&n이, 이따 방에서 불러드릴게요!

1001404679.english: I won't obsess over scolding Master anymore. Because even Master who torments me is cute.
1001404679.korean: 이젠 주인님을 혼내는 거엔 집착하지 않을래요.&n절 괴롭히시는 주인님도 귀여우니까요.

1001404680.english: You locked the door properly, right? Like last time... another child shouldn't see. I'm a little embarrassed too...
1001404680.korean: 문은 잘 잠근 거겠죠?&n저번처럼... 다른 아이가 보면 안 돼요.&n저도 조금은 부끄러우니...

1001404681.english: "Why are my lips sparkling? Huh? I haven't put on any lip balm... Right, I had a donut earlier— Oops...! ...Hehe, they're sweeter than usual."
1001404681.korean: 입술이 왜 반짝거리냐구?&n어? 립밤 바른 적 없는데…&n맞다, 아까 도넛 하나- 웁…!&n…헤헷, 평소보다 달콤해.

1001404682.english: I enjoy spending time with Magical BaekTo and Magical MoMo, but I am even happier when I spend time with the boss. It is a more brilliant time than ever before.
1001404682.korean: 백토랑 모모랑 있는 시간도 즐겁지만,&n사장님이랑 있는 시간이 더 행복해요.&n그 어느 때보다 찬란한 시간이에요.

1001404683.english: You're saying I torment you, Master? But... you're just too cute not to torment me, Master?
1001404683.korean: 제가 주인님을 괴롭힌다구요?&n하지만 괴롭히지 않기엔…&n주인님이 너무 귀여우신걸요?

1001404684.english: A child? I want to have one right now... but I should hold back for now, right? Please be patient with me just a little bit, too.
1001404684.korean: 아이요?&n당장이라도 가지고 싶지만...&n지금은 참아야겠죠?&n자기도 조금만 참아줘요.

1001404685.english: What do I like about shopping? Well, the process is fun. Spending time with someone I like, figuring out what to wear to look pretty, or what to dress my boyfriend in to make him look even more handsome—each and every one of those things is precious to me.
1001404685.korean: 쇼핑의 어떤 점이 좋냐고? 음, 과정이 재밌잖아.&n좋아하는 사람이랑 같은 시간을 보내고,&n뭘 입어야 내가 예쁘게 보일지,&n뭘 입혀야 내 남자가 더 멋있어질지.&n그런 것들 하나하나가 내게 소중해.

1001404686.english: Ugh... Aren't you asking me to act like the Great Demon King too much lately...? ...Huh? Me? As for what I like... Hehe. I just like being the boss's wife.
1001404686.korean: 우으… 요새 너무 대마왕 연기&n해달라는 거 아니세요…?&n...네? 저요? 저는 뭐가 좋냐면…&n헤헷. 그냥 사장님의 아내인 게 좋아요.

1001404687.english: You don't have to do anything, Master. Fighting, eating, bathing, and… Hehe, even that. You just need to relax and enjoy yourself.
1001404687.korean: 주인님은 아무것도 하지 않으셔도 괜찮아요.&n전투, 식사, 목욕, 그리고… 후후, 그것까지.&n주인님은 그냥 편안히, 즐기기만 하시면 돼요.

1001404688.english: Hehe, I can't help but look forward to it. A child who looks just like me... I could... right now...
1001404688.korean: 후훗, 기대되는 건 어쩔 수 없네요.&n자기와 닮은 아이라니... 지금 당장이라도...

1001404689.english: Hmm... Commander, you seem to get cooler every day. It's really fascinating... I feel like I wouldn't get tired of looking at you all day long. Do you feel this way when you look at me too, Commander? Huh? What the heck, hurry up~
1001404689.korean: 흐음… 사령관은 어째 날이 갈수록&n더 멋있어지네. 참 신기해… 하루 종일 봐도&n질리지 않을 것 같아. 사령관도 날 보면 이런&n기분이 들어? 응? 뭐야아, 빨리~

1001404690.english: No, a song? I, I am practicing various things... I, I'll sing it for you in the room later!
1001404690.korean: 노, 노래요?&n여, 여러 가지 연습하고 있기는 한데요…&n이, 이따 방에서 불러드릴게요!

1001404691.english: I won't obsess over scolding Master anymore. Because even Master who torments me is cute.
1001404691.korean: 이젠 주인님을 혼내는 거엔 집착하지 않을래요.&n절 괴롭히시는 주인님도 귀여우니까요.

1001404692.english: You locked the door properly, right? Like last time... another child shouldn't see. I'm a little embarrassed too...
1001404692.korean: 문은 잘 잠근 거겠죠?&n저번처럼... 다른 아이가 보면 안 돼요.&n저도 조금은 부끄러우니...

1001404693.english: "Why are my lips sparkling? Huh? I haven't put on any lip balm... Right, I had a donut earlier— Oops...! ...Hehe, they're sweeter than usual."
1001404693.korean: 입술이 왜 반짝거리냐구?&n어? 립밤 바른 적 없는데…&n맞다, 아까 도넛 하나- 웁…!&n…헤헷, 평소보다 달콤해.

1001404694.english: I enjoy spending time with Magical BaekTo and Magical MoMo, but I am even happier when I spend time with the boss. It is a more brilliant time than ever before.
1001404694.korean: 백토랑 모모랑 있는 시간도 즐겁지만,&n사장님이랑 있는 시간이 더 행복해요.&n그 어느 때보다 찬란한 시간이에요.

1001404695.english: Oh my, this is… a signal, isn't it? Hehe, then shall we head to the couple's space?
1001404695.korean: 어머, 이건… 신호인 거죠?&n후후, 그럼 부부의 공간으로 가볼까요?

1001404696.english: I assume you've taken care of what you needed to take care of... right? You still need to be careful.
1001404696.korean: 챙길 건... 챙긴 거겠죠?&n아직은 조심해야 해요.

1001404697.english: So this feels good, right? ...Me? No, I'm embarrassed. I won't tell you. Ugh... You know, if you look at how I usually...
1001404697.korean: 역시 이게 기분 좋은 거지? ...나?&n싫어, 부끄러워. 말 안 해줄래.&n으... 펴, 평소에 내가...&n어떻게 되는지 보면 알잖아...

1001404698.english: Ah... Ehehe. Now... I guess I've become someone who can't do without the boss...?
1001404698.korean: 앗… 에헤헷.&n이제는 제가… 사장님이 없으면&n안 되는 몸이 되어버렸네요…?

1001404699.english: Oh my, is this a signal? Hehe, then shall we go to the couple's space?
1001404699.korean: 어머, 이건… 신호인 거죠?&n후후, 그럼 부부의 공간으로 가볼까요?

1001404700.english: Did you pack everything...? We still have to be careful.
1001404700.korean: 챙길 건... 챙긴 거겠죠?&n아직은 조심해야 해요.

1001404701.english: This is the feeling, right? ...Me? No, I'm embarrassed. I won't say. Uh... you know what usually happens when I...
1001404701.korean: 역시 이게 기분 좋은 거지? ...나?&n싫어, 부끄러워. 말 안 해줄래.&n으... 펴, 평소에 내가...&n어떻게 되는지 보면 알잖아...

1001404702.english: Ah… ehehe. Now, I've become a body that can't live without the boss…?
1001404702.korean: 앗… 에헤헷.&n이제는 제가… 사장님이 없으면&n안 되는 몸이 되어버렸네요…?

1001404703.english: Shall I treat myself a bit for the first time in a while? The coat I usually wear isn't really suitable for a serious 'rough' operation. It doesn't quite suit my taste, either.
1001404703.korean: 간만에 기분 좀 내볼까?&n원래 입던 코트는 본격적으로&n'거친' 작전에는 어울리지 않거든.&n내 취향에도 조금 안 맞고.

1001404704.english: I don't prefer getting my hands dirty... but there are often people in the world who have no secrets. Commander... which side do you think you are?
1001404704.korean: 직접 손을 쓰는 건 선호하는 방식이 아니지만...&n세상에는 비밀이 없는 사람도 종종 있거든요.&n사령관님은... 어떤 쪽이실까요?

1001404705.english: I was also in charge of the education of the children of the nobility. I noticed some children who need etiquette training; would it be alright if I taught them?
1001404705.korean: 저는 귀족 자제분들의 교육도 담당했어요.&n예절 교육이 필요한 아이들이 보이던데,&n제가 가르쳐도 괜찮을까요?

1001404706.english: Sir... you look really tired. I'll get everything ready, so let's have some tea together. Shall I let you use my lap as a pillow?
1001404706.korean: 아저씨... 많이 피곤해 보여요.&n제가 다 준비할 테니까,&n같이 차라도 마셔요.&n무릎베개도 해드릴까요?

1001404707.english: Thanks for the outfit. This special operations suit, created with technical cooperation from the Bermuda Team, was my trademark. Of course, there were no witnesses.
1001404707.korean: 의상 고마워. 버뮤다 팀의 기술 협력을 받아&n만들어진 이 특수 작전복이야말로 내 트레이드&n마크였거든. 물론, 목격자는 없었지만.

1001404708.english: Would you like to make a bet? I pick a suitable night... and sneak into the captain's quarters. If I get on top of you while the Commander is asleep, I win. As for the price... I'll think about it.
1001404708.korean: 내기 하나 하시겠어요? 제가 적당한 밤을&n골라서... 함장실에 잠입하는 거예요.&n사령관님이 주무시는 동안, 제가 올라타면&n저의 승리. 대가는... 생각해 볼게요.

1001404709.english: I really, really love black tea. I like English Breakfast, Darjeeling, Assam, and Ceylon too, but out of all of them, I like Earl Grey the best. Ha. Please forget what I just said...
1001404709.korean: 저는 홍차가 정~말 좋아요.&n잉글리쉬 브렉퍼스트, 다즐링, 아삼, 실론도&n좋지만, 그중에서도 얼그레이가 좋아요.&n핫. 방금은 잊어주세요...

1001404710.english: Sometimes I’ve wanted to act a little spoiled like this, and now that you’re here, Uncle. I can do it to my heart's content, right? Hehe. I really love you, Uncle.
1001404710.korean: 가끔은 이렇게 어리광부리고 싶었는데,&n이제 아저씨가 있으니까. 마음껏 해도 되죠?&n헤헤. 아저씨, 정말 좋아해요.

1001404711.english: The standard procedure for smooth operation is to wear nothing underneath, but... the little Cardinal sighed deeply and earnestly pleaded with me. What do you think, Commander? Shouldn't proper functioning be the priority?
1001404711.korean: 원활한 기능 동작을 위해서는 안에 아무것도&n입지 않는 게 정석이지만... 조그마한 추기경님이&n한숨을 푹 쉬더니 간곡히 부탁하더라고. 사령관은&n어떻게 생각해? 잘 작동하는 게 우선 아닐까?

1001404712.english: You say it feels different than usual? Of course. The fact that I wore this means I concluded that this cannot be resolved through moderate means.
1001404712.korean: 평소와는 다른 느낌이라구요? 당연하죠.&n제가 이걸 입었다는 건, 온건한 방법으로는&n해결할 수 없다는 판단이 들었다는 거니까요.

1001404713.english: I know I was born to be sacrificed. But it is okay. Because it is my duty to protect and serve the common people.
1001404713.korean: 제가 희생당하기 위해 태어났다는 건,&n알고 있어요. 하지만 괜찮아요.&n서민을 지키고 봉사하는 것이 제 의무니까요.

1001404714.english: I want to grow up quickly. I want to become a lady that pleases you, Uncle, and continue to share our love. You will wait for me, won't you?
1001404714.korean: 빨리 어른이 되고 싶어요.&n아저씨 마음에 드는 숙녀가 돼서,&n아저씨랑 계속 사랑을 나누고 싶어요.&n기다려주실 거죠?

1001404715.english: Curious about how to operate it? You can adjust the optical camouflage function like this, and see this dial? With this—this? Well... if I press it, I wonder what will happen~?
1001404715.korean: 조작법이 궁금하다고?&n이렇게 하면 광학미채 기능을 조절할 수 있고,&n여기 다이얼 보이지? 이거로는- 이거?&n글쎄... 누르면, 어떻게 되려나~?

1001404716.english: Hmm. As expected, that was easy. Well then, now that I'm inside... the traces of those engaging in unspeakable acts with the Commander— Ah... the pajamas I gifted you... you're wearing them...
1001404716.korean: 흐음. 역시 손쉬웠네요. 그럼 들어왔으니...&n사령관님과 말 못할 짓을 벌이는 분들의 흔적을-&n앗... 선물해드린 잠옷... 입어주시는구나...

1001404717.english: LRL! T-13 Alvis! I told you not to run around in the hallway! ...I wish you would take a little bit of Miss C-33 Andvari's example.
1001404717.korean: LRL! 알비스! 복도에서 뛰어다니면&n안 된다고 했죠! ...조금은 안드바리 양을&n본받았으면 좋겠네요.

1001404718.english: Sir... you look really tired. I'll get everything ready, so let's have some tea together. Shall I let you use my lap as a pillow?
1001404718.korean: 아저씨... 많이 피곤해 보여요.&n제가 다 준비할 테니까,&n같이 차라도 마셔요.&n무릎베개도 해드릴까요?

1001404719.english: They are very sensitive, so please handle them carefully. Me, and the coat too♡

1001404720.english: Commander, you look really cute sleeping. If I took a picture of this, I could trade it favorably with the right people—......I guess I should just keep it to myself. Would you wake up if I poked your cheek?
1001404720.korean: 사령관님의 자는 모습, 정말 귀엽네요.&n이걸 찍어두면 적당한 분들과 유리하게 거래를-&n......그냥 혼자 간직해야겠군요.&n볼을 찌르면 깨시려나?

1001404721.english: Sometimes I’ve even wanted a Daddy-Long-Legs. Someone who would help me. Just like you, Commander... Oh, it’s nothing.
1001404721.korean: 가끔은 키다리 아저씨를 원했던 적도 있어요.&n저를 도와줄 그런 분이요. 마치, 사령관님처럼...&n아, 아무것도 아니에요.

1001404722.english: Sometimes I’ve wanted to act a little spoiled like this, and now that you’re here, Uncle. I can do it to my heart's content, right? Hehe. I really love you, Uncle.
1001404722.korean: 가끔은 이렇게 어리광부리고 싶었는데,&n이제 아저씨가 있으니까. 마음껏 해도 되죠?&n헤헤. 아저씨, 정말 좋아해요.

1001404723.english: It's a shame, but this is for one person. Even if you press your bodies against it like that, you can't hide the Commander. Well... not hiding is kind of my preference, though?
1001404723.korean: 아쉽지만 이건 1인용이야. 그렇게 몸을 딱 붙여도&n사령관까지 몸을 숨길 수는 없다구.&n뭐... 숨기지 않는 게, 내 취향이긴 하지만?

1001404724.english: Hehe, are you awake? ...Shh. Please don't ask how I got in. That's not important right now... I have work to do, you know?
1001404724.korean: 후후, 일어나셨나요? ...쉿.&n어떻게 들어왔는지는 묻지 말아주세요.&n지금은 그런 게 중요한 게 아니라...&n할 일이, 있잖아요?

1001404725.english: Commander! Rest is important sometimes, so would you like to have a cup of tea with me? W-A date invitation? I didn't mean it that way... Th-Then. Would you like to escort me?
1001404725.korean: 사령관님! 가끔은 휴식도 중요하니까,&n저랑 차 한잔 하실래요? 데, 데이트 신청이요?&n그런 뜻으로 한 건 아니었는데...&n그, 그럼. 사령관님이 에스코트 해주실래요?

1001404726.english: I want to grow up quickly. I want to become a lady that pleases you, Uncle, and continue to share our love. You will wait for me, won't you?
1001404726.korean: 빨리 어른이 되고 싶어요.&n아저씨 마음에 드는 숙녀가 돼서,&n아저씨랑 계속 사랑을 나누고 싶어요.&n기다려주실 거죠?

1001404727.english: Hmm... I guess I'll have to explain the controls a bit more.

1001404728.english: I will come visit you myself, so please wait for me.

1001404729.english: Uh, don't treat me like a child.

1001404730.english: I like it best when you pet me. It feels so warm and happy... Hehe. Please keep petting me.
1001404730.korean: 아저씨가 쓰다듬어 주시는 게 제일 좋아요.&n정말 따뜻하고, 행복한 기분이에요...&n헤헤. 계속 쓰다듬어 주세요.

1001404731.english: Before I knew it, the coat was gone? Soft and tender... feels good, right?
1001404731.korean: 어느샌가 코트는 안중에도 없어졌네?&n말랑말랑하고 부드러워서... 기분, 좋지?

1001404732.english: Since it's a situation like this, today is my usual revenge, Commander. I'll make you suffer a lot.
1001404732.korean: 마침 이런 상황이니까,&n오늘은 평소의 복수예요, 사령관님.&n잔뜩, 애태워 드릴게요.

1001404733.english: Actually, I've wanted to act spoiled like this all along. Please keep it a secret from others...?
1001404733.korean: 사실은 계속 이렇게 어리광부리고 싶었어요.&n다른 분들에게는 비밀로 해주세요...?

1001404734.english: What I like the most is when mister strokes me. It's really warm and makes me happy... Hehe. Keep stroking me.
1001404734.korean: 아저씨가 쓰다듬어 주시는 게 제일 좋아요.&n정말 따뜻하고, 행복한 기분이에요...&n헤헤. 계속 쓰다듬어 주세요.

1001404735.english: Honey, are you embarrassed? You've already seen my worse side~ I found a good spot. Let's do a ‘stealth mission' again today?
1001404735.korean: 자기야, 부끄러워?&n더한 모습도 봤으면서~&n내가 좋은 장소를 찾았으니까.&n오늘도 '잠입 임무' 하자?

1001404736.english: How was it? A different experience, right? Don't worry. Because I'm the Commander's, I could sneak in. ...What did I do while sneaking? Hehe, it's a se.cret.
1001404736.korean: 어떠세요? 색다른 경험이셨죠? 걱정 마세요.&n사령관님의 저라서 잠입할 수 있었던 거니까요.&n...잠입해서 뭘 했냐구요? 후후, 비.밀. 이에요.

1001404737.english: I still remember that day. The warm sunlight, those gentle hands... Hehe. Mister, I really like you.
1001404737.korean: 지금도 그날이 생각나요.&n포근한 햇살과, 상냥한 그 손...&n헤헷. 아저씨, 정말 좋아해요.

1001404738.english: You are the only one who has accepted me without hesitation, even after knowing my true self, Commander. Special Agent Shirayuri of Agency 080 will dedicate her all to you, Commander. I will complete any mission or order. Absolutely.
1001404738.korean: 제 본모습을 알고도 스스럼없이 받아들여준&n사람은 사령관님이 유일해요. 080기관의&n특수요원 시라유리는 사령관님에게 전부를&n바칠게요. 어떤 임무와 명령이라도&n완수해내겠어요. 반드시.

1001404739.english: Commander, Commander! By any chance, do you prefer a slim build? If that is really the case, I’ll cut back on my own food…! You know I’m enough just the way I am…? Hehe…! I love you just the way you are, Commander, too!
1001404739.korean: 사령관님, 사령관님!&n혹시 마른 체형이 취향이신가요?&n정말 그러시다면, 제가 먹는 걸 줄여서라도…!&n저는 저인 걸로 충분하다구요…? 히힛…!&n저도 있는 그대로의 사령관님이 너무 좋아요!​

1001404740.english: Commander, please stroke my belly again today! Mmm... Hehe... Sniff... Hah, I just dozed off for a moment!
1001404740.korean: 사령관님, 오늘도 제 배를 쓰다듬어주세요!&n우음… 헤헷… 쿠울…&n핫, 잠깐 잠들어버렸어요!

1001404741.english: I'm always afraid. Could it be... that everything up until now was just a dream... or that Your Excellency is teasing me— Ah. ...Could you let me hold you just a little longer...?
1001404741.korean: 늘 두려워요.&n혹시... 지금까지 모든 것이 꿈이 아닐지…&n아니면 각하께서 절 놀리시는 게- 앗.&n…조금만 더, 안겨있게 해주실래요…?

1001404742.english: H-Have you seen the notebook that fell here by any chance? The small, black one… Yes, that’s it! Thank you, Commander. But… H-You didn’t read it, did you…? Th-That’s right, isn’t it? What a relief… If I had been caught… Ugh…
1001404742.korean: 호, 혹시 여기에 떨어져 있던 수첩 못 보셨나요?&n검은색에 조그마한…네, 그거예요!&n감사드려요, 사령관님. 그런데… 호, 혹시&n읽어보시진 않으셨죠…? 그, 그렇죠?&n다행이다… 이런 걸 들켜버렸으면... 으으...​

1001404743.english: These days, no matter where you are or what you're doing, I worry about you, Commander. What if you were to fall... Ah! When I'm on board, do you two hug each other? Then I can protect you no matter what danger arises!
1001404743.korean: 요즘 어디서 뭘 하더라도 사령관님이 걱정돼요.&n혹시 넘어지기라도 하면… 아! 제가 함내에&n있을 땐 둘이서 포옹하고 있을까요?&n그럼 어떤 위험이 발생해도&n제가 지켜드릴 수 있는데!

1001404744.english: It’s not just a walk; it’s for the safety and security of others. So hurry up and leave, Commander— H-H-Ah… Scratching my chin like that is cheating…
1001404744.korean: 그냥 산책이 아니라 다른 분들의 안전과 치안을&n위한 거라구요. 그러니까 빨리 나가요, 사령-&n흐, 흐앗… 그렇게 턱을 긁어주시는 건&n반칙이에요오…​

1001404745.english: Your Excellency, is there a reason you chose me? Um... could you possibly tell me?
1001404745.korean: 각하께선 절 선택하신 이유가 있나요?&n저... 혹시 말해주실 수 있으신가요?​

1001404746.english: When I'm with you, Commander, I sometimes forget my duties. Like a girl in a novel... I can't concentrate on my work because I'm thinking about the person I like. Hehe... You know exactly how to cure lovesickness, don't you?
1001404746.korean: 사령관님과 함께 있으면 가끔 제 본분을&n망각하게 돼요. 소설 속에 등장하는 소녀처럼…&n좋아하는 사람 생각에, 일이 손에 잡히질 않아요.&n후훗… 상사병을 어떻게 치료하는지는&n잘 알고 계시죠?

1001404747.english: As expected, food tastes the best when I eat with you, Commander! It never tasted this good when I ate alone. I think I finally understand the saying that love is the best seasoning. You feel the same way, don't you, Commander? It’s delicious, isn't it?
1001404747.korean: 역시 사령관님이랑 같이 식사할 때가&n제일 맛있네요! 저 혼자서 먹을 땐 이렇게&n맛있지 않았는데. 최고의 조미료가 사랑이라는&n말을 이제야 알 것 같아요.&n사령관님도 그렇죠? 맛있으시죠?​

1001404748.english: Peace needs to come soon so I can become a mom... Commander, you want to be a dad too, right? I guess I need to try even harder!
1001404748.korean: 어서 평화로워져야 엄마가 될 수 있을텐데…&n사령관님도 아빠가 되고 싶으신거죠?&n제가 더 힘내야 겠네요!

1001404749.english: I would like to let Your Excellency know how I feel. Then you will understand why I am always so anxious, won't you?
1001404749.korean: 각하께 제 마음을 알려드리고 싶어요.&n그럼 각하께서도 제가 왜 늘 불안해 하는지&n아시겠죠?

1001404750.english: You are the only one who has accepted me without hesitation, even after knowing my true self, Commander. Special Agent Shirayuri of Agency 080 will dedicate her all to you, Commander. I will complete any mission or order. Absolutely.
1001404750.korean: 제 본모습을 알고도 스스럼없이 받아들여준&n사람은 사령관님이 유일해요. 080기관의&n특수요원 시라유리는 사령관님에게 전부를&n바칠게요. 어떤 임무와 명령이라도&n완수해내겠어요. 반드시.

1001404751.english: Commander, Commander! By any chance, do you prefer a slim build? If that is really the case, I’ll cut back on my own food…! You know I’m enough just the way I am…? Hehe…! I love you just the way you are, Commander, too!
1001404751.korean: 사령관님, 사령관님!&n혹시 마른 체형이 취향이신가요?&n정말 그러시다면, 제가 먹는 걸 줄여서라도…!&n저는 저인 걸로 충분하다구요…? 히힛…!&n저도 있는 그대로의 사령관님이 너무 좋아요!​

1001404752.english: Commander, please stroke my belly again today! Mmm... Hehe... Sniff... Hah, I just dozed off for a moment!
1001404752.korean: 사령관님, 오늘도 제 배를 쓰다듬어주세요!&n우음… 헤헷… 쿠울…&n핫, 잠깐 잠들어버렸어요!

1001404753.english: I'm always afraid. Could it be... that everything up until now was just a dream... or that Your Excellency is teasing me— Ah. ...Could you let me hold you just a little longer...?
1001404753.korean: 늘 두려워요.&n혹시... 지금까지 모든 것이 꿈이 아닐지…&n아니면 각하께서 절 놀리시는 게- 앗.&n…조금만 더, 안겨있게 해주실래요…?

1001404754.english: H-Have you seen the notebook that fell here by any chance? The small, black one… Yes, that’s it! Thank you, Commander. But… H-You didn’t read it, did you…? Th-That’s right, isn’t it? What a relief… If I had been caught… Ugh…
1001404754.korean: 호, 혹시 여기에 떨어져 있던 수첩 못 보셨나요?&n검은색에 조그마한…네, 그거예요!&n감사드려요, 사령관님. 그런데… 호, 혹시&n읽어보시진 않으셨죠…? 그, 그렇죠?&n다행이다… 이런 걸 들켜버렸으면... 으으...​

1001404755.english: These days, no matter where you are or what you're doing, I worry about you, Commander. What if you were to fall... Ah! When I'm on board, do you two hug each other? Then I can protect you no matter what danger arises!
1001404755.korean: 요즘 어디서 뭘 하더라도 사령관님이 걱정돼요.&n혹시 넘어지기라도 하면… 아! 제가 함내에&n있을 땐 둘이서 포옹하고 있을까요?&n그럼 어떤 위험이 발생해도&n제가 지켜드릴 수 있는데!

1001404756.english: It’s not just a walk; it’s for the safety and security of others. So hurry up and leave, Commander— H-H-Ah… Scratching my chin like that is cheating…
1001404756.korean: 그냥 산책이 아니라 다른 분들의 안전과 치안을&n위한 거라구요. 그러니까 빨리 나가요, 사령-&n흐, 흐앗… 그렇게 턱을 긁어주시는 건&n반칙이에요오…​

1001404757.english: Your Excellency, is there a reason you chose me? Um... could you possibly tell me?
1001404757.korean: 각하께선 절 선택하신 이유가 있나요?&n저... 혹시 말해주실 수 있으신가요?​

1001404758.english: When I'm with you, Commander, I sometimes forget my duties. Like a girl in a novel... I can't concentrate on my work because I'm thinking about the person I like. Hehe... You know exactly how to cure lovesickness, don't you?
1001404758.korean: 사령관님과 함께 있으면 가끔 제 본분을&n망각하게 돼요. 소설 속에 등장하는 소녀처럼…&n좋아하는 사람 생각에, 일이 손에 잡히질 않아요.&n후훗… 상사병을 어떻게 치료하는지는&n잘 알고 계시죠?

1001404759.english: As expected, food tastes the best when I eat with you, Commander! It never tasted this good when I ate alone. I think I finally understand the saying that love is the best seasoning. You feel the same way, don't you, Commander? It’s delicious, isn't it?
1001404759.korean: 역시 사령관님이랑 같이 식사할 때가&n제일 맛있네요! 저 혼자서 먹을 땐 이렇게&n맛있지 않았는데. 최고의 조미료가 사랑이라는&n말을 이제야 알 것 같아요.&n사령관님도 그렇죠? 맛있으시죠?​

1001404760.english: Peace needs to come soon so I can become a mom... Commander, you want to be a dad too, right? I guess I need to try even harder!
1001404760.korean: 어서 평화로워져야 엄마가 될 수 있을텐데…&n사령관님도 아빠가 되고 싶으신거죠?&n제가 더 힘내야 겠네요!

1001404761.english: I would like to let Your Excellency know how I feel. Then you will understand why I am always so anxious, won't you?
1001404761.korean: 각하께 제 마음을 알려드리고 싶어요.&n그럼 각하께서도 제가 왜 늘 불안해 하는지&n아시겠죠?

1001404762.english: I’ve got another secret today… one that I can’t tell anyone, a special one just between the Commander and me…
1001404762.korean: 오늘도 비밀이 하나 생겼네요…&n아무에게도 말할 수 없는,&n사령관님과 저만의 특별한…​

1001404763.english: That tickles, Commander...! If you wanted corn, there's plenty right next to you— So you wanted something else...? I'm glad I stocked up on nutrients.
1001404763.korean: 간지러워요, 사령관님...!&n옥수수가 드시고 싶으신 거라면 옆에 많이-&n다른 걸 원하셨던 거군요…?&n영양 보충해 두길 잘했네요.​

1001404764.english: Mm... do you like this that much...? Commander, you really... are a pervert♥
1001404764.korean: 으응… 이게 그렇게 좋으신 거예요…?&n사령관님은 정말…&n변.태♥​

1001404765.english: You're serious, aren't you...? Yes. It's fine. Anytime...

1001404766.english: Another secret was born today… something only the Commander and I can know…
1001404766.korean: 오늘도 비밀이 하나 생겼네요…&n아무에게도 말할 수 없는,&n사령관님과 저만의 특별한…​

1001404767.english: It tickles, Commander...! If you want corn, I have plenty beside you- Oh, you wanted something else...? Good thing I stocked up on nutrients.
1001404767.korean: 간지러워요, 사령관님...!&n옥수수가 드시고 싶으신 거라면 옆에 많이-&n다른 걸 원하셨던 거군요…?&n영양 보충해 두길 잘했네요.​

1001404768.english: Ugh… is this really that good...? Commander, you're really... a per.vert ♥.
1001404768.korean: 으응… 이게 그렇게 좋으신 거예요…?&n사령관님은 정말…&n변.태♥​

1001404769.english: Are you serious...? Yes. It's okay. As much as you want...

1001404770.english: My sister Cerestia… I suppose she would be your aunt. … You say she’s like a mother? Cerestia? Hmph. That is not motherhood. Please refrain from meeting Cerestia in the future.
1001404770.korean: 제 자매 세레스티아…&n폐하에겐 이모뻘이 되겠군요.&n…엄마 같다고요? 세레스티아가? 흥.&n그런 건 모성이 아닙니다.&n앞으로 세레스티아와 만나는 건 삼가주세요.

1001404771.english: Th-that is rude! How can a child stroke their mother's head! Ah... Th-that is true; we are married now, but...! ...If you want to do that, please do it only once a day.
1001404771.korean: 무, 무례합니다! 어찌 자식이&n어미의 머리를 쓰다듬는단 말입니까! 아…&n그, 그 말대로 지금은 부부이긴 합니다만…!&n…그렇게 하고 싶으면&n하루에 한 번만 하도록 하세요.​

1001404772.english: My older sisters prepared this dress for me. Everyone likes you, Master... is it okay for me to accept it?
1001404772.korean: 이 드레스는 언니들이 준비해주셨어요.&n다들 주인님을 좋아하는데…&n제가 받아도 괜찮은 걸까요?

1001404773.english: This ribbon? They say that two people connected by a red thread will always be together, no matter what happens. One side for me, and the other for Watson...
1001404773.korean: 이 리본? 붉은 실로 이어진 두 사람은&n무슨 일이 있어도 반드시 이어진다고 하더라구.&n한쪽은 나, 다른 한쪽은 왓슨한테...

1001404774.english: I am fully aware of Your Majesty's spirit. I am the only one who can handle it. From now on, I will take care of everything for Your Majesty, so please just rest easy.
1001404774.korean: 폐하의 기백은 익히 알고 있습니다.&n그것을 감당할 수 있는건 오직 저 뿐.&n앞으로 폐하의 모든 것은 이 어미가 챙길테니,&n그저 마음 편히 계시면 됩니다.

1001404775.english: The more I get to know Your Majesty day by day, the more I feel inadequate… Ugh, no. As a mother, I must find more strength… Ah, you have arrived. The clothes I picked out for you look very… Why are you smiling?
1001404775.korean: 하루하루 폐하를 알아갈수록, 점점 더&n역부족이라는 생각이 듭니다… 으으, 안돼요.&n어미된 자로서 더 힘을 내야… 아, 오셨습니까.&n제가 골라드린 옷이 아주 잘…&n왜 웃으시는 건가요?​

1001404776.english: The more my feelings for you grow, Master, the more my worry grows. Because it is truly sad when something happens to someone precious...
1001404776.korean: 주인님에 대한 마음이 커질수록&n걱정하는 마음도 커져만 가요.&n소중한 사람에게 무슨 일이 생긴다는 건&n정말 슬프니까요...​

1001404777.english: Do you remember the day we first met? I thought you were a good friend, but I never imagined things would turn out like this. I'm so glad Watson is by my side.
1001404777.korean: 우리가 처음 만난 날 기억해?&n좋은 친구라고 생각했었는데,&n이렇게 될 줄은 몰랐어.&n내 옆에 있는게 왓슨이라서 정말 다행이야.

1001404778.english: Now, as I mentioned, conversations with the other members, meals, attending to His Majesty, and even his duties—as for this task… Jo, please wait just a moment. I will go study it right away.
1001404778.korean: 자아, 말씀드린대로 다른 대원들과의&n대화, 식사, 시중과 폐하의 업무까지-&n이 업무는… 조, 조금만 기다리세요.&n금방 공부해 오겠습니다.

1001404779.english: Hehe... Your Majesty, are you... trying to... act spoiled again- Ack...? That you want me this much... As a woman, I couldn't be happier, but as a mother... I really don't know what to do...
1001404779.korean: 후후… 폐하, 또 응석을… 부, 부리시려는- 꺅…?&n저를 이렇게 원해주시는 것…&n여자로서는 더할나위 없이 기쁘지만,&n어미로서는… 대체 어찌해야 좋을지…​

1001404780.english: Master, you told me to live freely, but you felt sorry seeing me stay by your side, didn't you? It's okay if you don't feel that way because of me. Because this is what I truly wanted.
1001404780.korean: 주인님께서는 제게 자유롭게 살라고 하셨지만,&n제가 곁에 머무는 것을 보고 미안해 하셨죠?&n저 때문에 그러지 않으셔도 괜찮아요.&n이게 제가 정말로 원하던 거니까요.

1001404781.english: This outfit? I designed it myself. What do you think? Pretty, right? ...You're asking if it's too tight? Hmm~ What are you thinking, Watson?
1001404781.korean: 이 옷? 내가 직접 디자인했는데 어때?&n예쁘지? ...꽉 조이지 않냐고?&n흐음~ 무슨 생각 중이야, 왓슨?

1001404782.english: Your Majesty, where do you intend to go when the work isn't finished yet? This mother clearly— Ah, the restroom…? Ahem. I will go with you.
1001404782.korean: 폐하, 아직 일이 끝나지 않았는데&n어딜 가시려는 건가요. 이 어미가 분명히-&n아, 화장실…? 흠흠. 저도 같이 가겠습니다.

1001404783.english: Th-that is rude! How can a child stroke their mother's head! Ah... Th-that is true; we are married now, but...! ...If you want to do that, please do it only once a day.
1001404783.korean: 무, 무례합니다! 어찌 자식이&n어미의 머리를 쓰다듬는단 말입니까! 아…&n그, 그 말대로 지금은 부부이긴 합니다만…!&n…그렇게 하고 싶으면&n하루에 한 번만 하도록 하세요.​

1001404784.english: So, my sisters are doing this for me? I see... I will accept your kindness and make sure to be happy. But to do that, I need your help, Master...
1001404784.korean: 언니들이 저를 위해서? 그렇군요…&n그 마음을 받아서, 꼭 행복해질게요.&n그러려면 주인님의 도움이 필요한데…

1001404785.english: Finally, the day has come. We're becoming a family now… You think I look happy? Well… it's Watson, after all.
1001404785.korean: 드디어 이날이 왔네.&n이제 가족이 되는구나…&n기뻐보인다구?&n그야... 상대가 왓슨이니까.

1001404786.english: What are you doing, Your Majesty? Why aren't you eating? … This isn't a resurrection ritual; it is a nourishing dish called a hammam. Please, take your spoon— That's not scrambled eggs, it's fried eggs.
1001404786.korean: 뭐 하고 계신가요, 폐하. 어서 드시지 않고.&n…부활 의식이 아니라, 하맘이라는 보양식입니다.&n어서 수저를- 옆에 있는 건 스크램블드 에그가&n아니라, 계란 프라이입니다.​

1001404787.english: The more I get to know Your Majesty day by day, the more I feel inadequate… Ugh, no. As a mother, I must find more strength… Ah, you have arrived. The clothes I picked out for you look very… Why are you smiling?
1001404787.korean: 하루하루 폐하를 알아갈수록, 점점 더&n역부족이라는 생각이 듭니다… 으으, 안돼요.&n어미된 자로서 더 힘을 내야… 아, 오셨습니까.&n제가 골라드린 옷이 아주 잘…&n왜 웃으시는 건가요?​

1001404788.english: I feel most comfortable when I am with you, Master. And also when you pet me... So, if I marry you, I'll always be by your side, right?
1001404788.korean: 저는 주인님과 함께 있을 때가 가장 편안해요.&n그리고 쓰다듬어 주실 때도…&n그러니까 주인님과 결혼하면,&n항상 곁에 있을 수 있겠죠?

1001404789.english: Since Watson keeps doing that, I think I've started to like the tight feeling too. ...Huh? Me? Th-th-that's not like I'm doing it on purpose, I guess you could call it an unavoidable reaction... It's because of Watson, you know...
1001404789.korean: 왓슨이 자꾸 그러니까,&n나도 꽉 조이는게 좋아진 것 같아. ...응? 내가?&n그그그그건제가일부러그러는게아니라&n어쩔수없는작용이라고할까그게…&n왓슨 때문이잖아아...​

1001404790.english: Would there be a mother who would give up on her child? Your Majesty is indeed a figure too great to contain, but I will do my utmost to ensure that Your Majesty walks the right path. … So please stop teasing me about being clumsy.
1001404790.korean: 자식을 포기하는 어미가 있겠습니까.&n폐하는 담기에 버거울 정도로 커다란 분이시긴&n하나, 저는 그런 폐하가 올바른 길로 가실 수&n있도록 최선을 다할 겁니다. …그러니&n서툴다고 놀리는 건 적당히 하도록 하세요.

1001404791.english: Hehe... Your Majesty, are you... trying to... act spoiled again- Ack...? That you want me this much... As a woman, I couldn't be happier, but as a mother... I really don't know what to do...
1001404791.korean: 후후… 폐하, 또 응석을… 부, 부리시려는- 꺅…?&n저를 이렇게 원해주시는 것…&n여자로서는 더할나위 없이 기쁘지만,&n어미로서는… 대체 어찌해야 좋을지…​

1001404792.english: I am no longer afraid of losing anyone. Because you have let go of my fear, Master. And… your embrace is so warm.
1001404792.korean: 더는 누군가를 잃게 될까 봐 두렵지 않아요.&n주인님께서 제 두려움을 풀어주셨으니까요.&n그리고… 주인님의 품은 이렇게 따뜻하니까요.

1001404793.english: Sometimes I miss the days when we went around solving problems together... but it's okay because we'll build new memories from now on. Just the two of us, with Watson, whom I truly love.
1001404793.korean: 가끔은 같이 문제를 해결하며 다니던&n그때가 그립지만… 이제부터&n새로운 추억을 쌓을 테니까 괜찮아.&n정말 사랑하는 왓슨이랑, 단 둘이.

1001404794.english: You are just as spoiled as I heard. Fine. Please continue to be like that, spoiling only me, your mother.
1001404794.korean: 듣던대로 응석쟁이시군요.&n좋습니다. 앞으로도 그렇게,&n이 어미에게만 응석부리도록 하세요.
