1001404795.english: Your Majesty… My ability is merely to kill, but that does not mean I am incapable of conceiving Your Majesty’s descendants. Did you… truly understand what this mother has said…?
1001404795.korean: 폐하… 제 능력은 단지 죽일 뿐이지만,&n폐하의 후손을 잉태할 수 없다는 뜻은 아닙니다.&n이 어미의 말… 제대로 알아들으셨습니까…?​

1001404796.english: I am ready to accept you, Master, at any time... but can't I savor this moment just a little longer?
1001404796.korean: 언제든지 주인님을 받아들일&n준비는 되어 있지만…&n조금만 더 이 순간을 만끽하면 안될까요?

1001404797.english: Now, now, now, now, now! I, I'm happy, but could you wait just a moment? I have something to prepare...
1001404797.korean: 자자자, 잠깐잠깐잠깐!&n마, 마음은 기쁘지만, 조금만 기다려 줄래?&n준비할 게 있으니까...

1001404798.english: Can't you take it easy? At least give me a breather- Kyaa…?!
1001404798.korean: 적당히 하시지 못하겠습니까.&n하, 하다못해 숨 돌릴 시간을- 꺅…?!

1001404799.english: Your Majesty… my ability is only to kill, but that doesn't mean I can't bear Your Majesty's descendants. Did you understand this mother's words properly...?
1001404799.korean: 폐하… 제 능력은 단지 죽일 뿐이지만,&n폐하의 후손을 잉태할 수 없다는 뜻은 아닙니다.&n이 어미의 말… 제대로 알아들으셨습니까…?​

1001404800.english: …It's okay. The master's touch is warm and pleasant. So... please... caress me a little more...
1001404800.korean: …괜찮아요.&n주인님의 손길은 따스하고 기분 좋으니까요.&n그러니까... 좀 더... 어루만져 주세요...

1001404801.english: What's this string? Ahaha... You know, why do you ask? ...Tie me up quickly. So that I can't move at all.
1001404801.korean: 이 끈은 뭐냐고?&n아하하... 알면서 왜 그래.&n...빨리 묶어줘. 내가... 꼼짝도 못하게.

1001404802.english: I'm really glad to see Your Majesty grow day by day. Now, as a reward… a re.ward… if you do as usual, it will become a reward for me too, is that alright...?
1001404802.korean: 폐하가 나날이 성장하시는 것 같아 정말 기쁩니다.&n자아, 상으로… 상으, 로… 그, 평소에 하던대로라면&n제게도 상이 되어버리는데, 괜찮으시겠습니까…?

1001404803.english: I've always wanted to sleep looking at Master's face. That wish has come true, I'm really happy. Can I sleep in your arms again today?
1001404803.korean: 매일 주인님의 얼굴을 보며 자고 싶었는데&n그 소원이 이루어져서 정말 기뻐요.&n오늘도 주인님의 품 안에서 자도 될까요?

1001404804.english: I think marrying you was the right choice. I can express my affection without hiding anymore… Watson also endured so much- no wait. Now that I think about it, Watson didn't endure much, did he?
1001404804.korean: 결혼하길 잘한 것 같아.&n더는 숨기지 않고 애정 표현을 할 수 있고…&n왓슨도 그동안 참은 만큼- 아니지.&n생각해보니까, 왓슨은 안 참았던 것 같은데?

1001404805.english: The superiority of my genes has already been proven by countless experiments. And… what would happen if yours were mixed in with them…? Just imagining it makes me shiver.
1001404805.korean: 내 유전자의 우수함은 수많은 실험들로&n이미 증명됐어. 거기에… 당신의 것이 섞이면&n어떻게 되는 걸까…? 상상만해도, 몸이 떨리는걸?

1001404806.english: I don't want to show my weak side to anyone. But... I want to show the Commander everything—my weak side, my strong side, everything. Is that okay?
1001404806.korean: 약한 모습은 누구에게도 보이기 싫어. 하지만…&n사령관한테는 내 약한 모습도, 강한 모습도,&n전부 보여주고 싶어. 그래도 되지?

1001404807.english: The mysteries of the human body are truly amazing… Ah, is it special because it is a male body? ...Um, Commander. There is something I want to check… May I go a little further?
1001404807.korean: 인체의 신비는 정말 대단하군요…&n아, 남성의 신체라서 특별한 걸까요?&n...저, 사령관님. 확인해보고 싶은 게 생겼는데…&n좀 더, 해봐도 돼요?​

1001404808.english: Just one more, just one more! Haha, of course I know exactly how many you've done, Commander. But I believe in your potential. Alright, just two more!
1001404808.korean: 하나만 더, 하나만 더! 하핫, 당연히&n사령관님이 몇 개 하셨는지는 다 알죠.&n하지만 전 사령관님의 가능성을 믿고 있어요.&n자, 앞으로 2개만 더!

1001404809.english: A night with you? Well, it would be a lie to say it's not fun. Every single day... you show me pleasures I never knew existed. ...Hmph. It's not like I know every pleasure in the world. So... isn't that what makes it even more enjoyable?
1001404809.korean: 당신과의 밤? 뭐, 즐겁지 않다면 거짓말이겠지.&n매일매일… 당신은 내가 몰랐던 쾌락을 알려주니까.&n...흥. 나라고 이 세상 모든 쾌락을 다 아는 건 아냐.&n그래서… 더 즐거운 거 아니겠어?

1001404810.english: You want me to go outside and get moving? No way! Because the Commander is right here. Let's just hug each other tight for the rest of the day. I want to stay like this forever!
1001404810.korean: 밖에 나가서 좀 움직이라고? 싫어!&n왜~냐~면~ 사령관이 여기 있잖아. 오늘 하루도&n꼭~ 껴안고 있자. 평생 이러고 있고 싶다아~

1001404811.english: You want to reinforce your body parts? Just say the word. Shall I install titanium alloy for you? Or maybe lanthanum in a nickel-hydrogen battery— ...Aha?
1001404811.korean: 신체 부위를 보강하고 싶으시다구요?&n말만 하세요, 티타늄합금으로 달아드릴까요?&n아니면 니켈 수소 전지에 란타늄을- ...아하?​

1001404812.english: Commander, could you assist me for a moment? Lately, it feels like the weight is all shifted to one side— Whoa?! I told you it's dangerous to mess around while working out. Let's do that a little later.
1001404812.korean: 사령관님, 잠깐 보조 좀 해주시겠어요?&n요새 한쪽에만 중량이 쏠리는 것 같아서-&n우왓?! 운동할 때 장난치면 위험하다고 했잖아요.&n그런 건 조금 이따가 해요.​

1001404813.english: Don't worry so much, I won't eat you. I'm the type to savor delicious things for a long, long time... so I'll keep a wonderful man like you by my side until the end of the world.
1001404813.korean: 잡아먹지 않으니까 그렇게 걱정하지 마.&n나는 맛있는 건 오래오래, 아껴 먹는 주의니까…&n당신같이 훌륭한 남자는, 세상이 끝날 때까지&n곁에 둘 거야.​

1001404814.english: I told you not to touch me in front of the Captain! I'm really angry. Y-let go. I'm really angry, so... Y-I'll let it slide this one time. Got it?
1001404814.korean: 대장님 앞에서 만지지 말랬지! 나 진짜로 화났어.&n이, 이거 놔. 진짜로 화났으니까아…&n이, 이번만 봐줄거야. 알았지?​

1001404815.english: Commander, want to make a bet? The loser of this round must grant the winner's wish... Woohoo, hahahaha... A headshot on the first shot?!
1001404815.korean: 사령관님, 내기하실래요?&n이번 판에 진 사람은 이긴 사람 소원을&n반드시 들어주기로… 우후, 후후후…&n초탄 헤드샷?!​

1001404816.english: Hmm... Commander, you're getting better day by day. Already like this... Wow, you're so firm... Ah, ahaha. Did I touch you for too long?
1001404816.korean: 으음... 사령관님,&n몸이 하루가 다르게 좋아지시네요.&n벌써 이렇게... 우와, 엄청 단단해…&n아, 아하하. 너, 너무 오래 만지고 있었나요?

1001404817.english: The superiority of my genes has already been proven by countless experiments. And… what would happen if yours were mixed in with them…? Just imagining it makes me shiver.
1001404817.korean: 내 유전자의 우수함은 수많은 실험들로&n이미 증명됐어. 거기에… 당신의 것이 섞이면&n어떻게 되는 걸까…? 상상만해도, 몸이 떨리는걸?

1001404818.english: I don't want to show my weak side to anyone. But... I want to show the Commander everything—my weak side, my strong side, everything. Is that okay?
1001404818.korean: 약한 모습은 누구에게도 보이기 싫어. 하지만…&n사령관한테는 내 약한 모습도, 강한 모습도,&n전부 보여주고 싶어. 그래도 되지?

1001404819.english: The mysteries of the human body are truly amazing… Ah, is it special because it is a male body? ...Um, Commander. There is something I want to check… May I go a little further?
1001404819.korean: 인체의 신비는 정말 대단하군요…&n아, 남성의 신체라서 특별한 걸까요?&n...저, 사령관님. 확인해보고 싶은 게 생겼는데…&n좀 더, 해봐도 돼요?​

1001404820.english: Just one more, just one more! Haha, of course I know exactly how many you've done, Commander. But I believe in your potential. Alright, just two more!
1001404820.korean: 하나만 더, 하나만 더! 하핫, 당연히&n사령관님이 몇 개 하셨는지는 다 알죠.&n하지만 전 사령관님의 가능성을 믿고 있어요.&n자, 앞으로 2개만 더!

1001404821.english: A night with you? Well, it would be a lie to say it's not fun. Every single day... you show me pleasures I never knew existed. ...Hmph. It's not like I know every pleasure in the world. So... isn't that what makes it even more enjoyable?
1001404821.korean: 당신과의 밤? 뭐, 즐겁지 않다면 거짓말이겠지.&n매일매일… 당신은 내가 몰랐던 쾌락을 알려주니까.&n...흥. 나라고 이 세상 모든 쾌락을 다 아는 건 아냐.&n그래서… 더 즐거운 거 아니겠어?

1001404822.english: You want me to go outside and get moving? No way! Because the Commander is right here. Let's just hug each other tight for the rest of the day. I want to stay like this forever!
1001404822.korean: 밖에 나가서 좀 움직이라고? 싫어!&n왜~냐~면~ 사령관이 여기 있잖아. 오늘 하루도&n꼭~ 껴안고 있자. 평생 이러고 있고 싶다아~

1001404823.english: You want to reinforce your body parts? Just say the word. Shall I install titanium alloy for you? Or maybe lanthanum in a nickel-hydrogen battery— ...Aha?
1001404823.korean: 신체 부위를 보강하고 싶으시다구요?&n말만 하세요, 티타늄합금으로 달아드릴까요?&n아니면 니켈 수소 전지에 란타늄을- ...아하?​

1001404824.english: Commander, could you assist me for a moment? Lately, it feels like the weight is all shifted to one side— Whoa?! I told you it's dangerous to mess around while working out. Let's do that a little later.
1001404824.korean: 사령관님, 잠깐 보조좀 해주시겠어요?&n요새 한쪽에만 중량이 쏠리는 것 같아서-&n우왓?! 운동할 때 장난치면 위험하다고 했잖아요.&n그런 건 조금 이따가 해요.​

1001404825.english: Don't worry so much, I won't eat you. I'm the type to savor delicious things for a long, long time... so I'll keep a wonderful man like you by my side until the end of the world.
1001404825.korean: 잡아먹지 않으니까 그렇게 걱정하지 마.&n나는 맛있는 건 오래오래, 아껴 먹는 주의니까…&n당신같이 훌륭한 남자는, 세상이 끝날 때까지&n곁에 둘 거야.​

1001404826.english: I told you not to touch me in front of the Captain! I'm really angry. Y-let go. I'm really angry, so... Y-I'll let it slide this one time. Got it?
1001404826.korean: 대장님 앞에서 만지지 말랬지! 나 진짜로 화났어.&n이, 이거 놔. 진짜로 화났으니까아…&n이, 이번만 봐줄거야. 알았지?​

1001404827.english: Commander, want to make a bet? The loser of this round must grant the winner's wish... Woohoo, hahahaha... A headshot on the first shot?!
1001404827.korean: 사령관님, 내기하실래요?&n이번 판에 진 사람은 이긴 사람 소원을&n반드시 들어주기로… 우후, 후후후…&n초탄 헤드샷?!​

1001404828.english: Hmm... Commander, you're getting better day by day. Already like this... Wow, you're so firm... Ah, ahaha. Did I touch you for too long?
1001404828.korean: 으음... 사령관님,&n몸이 하루가 다르게 좋아지시네요.&n벌써 이렇게... 우와, 엄청 단단해…&n아, 아하하. 너, 너무 오래 만지고 있었나요?

1001404829.english: Hehe, fine. Today, tomorrow... we'll stay one body... until the pleasure gradually intensifies... until we eventually go insane.
1001404829.korean: 후후, 좋아. 오늘도, 내일도…&n계속 한 몸으로 있는 거야…&n점점 고조되는 쾌락에…&n결국 미쳐버릴 때까지.​

1001404830.english: Nooo, hug me tighter… Just stay pressed against me like this until tomorrow morning… Huh?
1001404830.korean: 싫어어, 더 꽉 안아줘…&n이대로 몸을 딱 붙이고&n내일 아침까지… 응?​

1001404831.english: Has it already gotten this late? Hardware today? Or software? Of course… a hybrid is fine too.
1001404831.korean: 벌써 시간이 이렇게 됐나요?&n오늘은 하드웨어? 아니면 소프트웨어?&n물론… 하이브리드도 괜찮아요.

1001404832.english: Th-Th-You've worked hard, Commander. Already- What? More? Ah, even so, more than 10 sets at once... Ugh...
1001404832.korean: 고, 고생 많으셨어요, 사령관님. 벌써-&n네? 더요? 아, 아무리 그래도&n한 번에 열 세트도 넘게는... 으...​

1001404833.english: Hehe, good. Today too, tomorrow too… we'll stay as one body… until the pleasure rises higher and higher… and we go crazy in the end.
1001404833.korean: 후후, 좋아. 오늘도, 내일도…&n계속 한 몸으로 있는 거야…&n점점 고조되는 쾌락에…&n결국 미쳐버릴 때까지.​

1001404834.english: Nooo, hug me tighter… keep your body pressed against mine until tomorrow morning… okay?
1001404834.korean: 싫어어, 더 꽉 안아줘…&n이대로 몸을 딱 붙이고&n내일 아침까지… 응?​

1001404835.english: Has it already gotten this late?&nToday, hardware? Or software?&nOf course… a hybrid is fine too.
1001404835.korean: 벌써 시간이 이렇게 됐나요?&n오늘은 하드웨어? 아니면 소프트웨어?&n물론… 하이브리드도 괜찮아요.

1001404836.english: Y-You've worked hard, Commander. Already—&nYes? More? Ah, no matter what,&nmore than ten sets at once is too much... uh...
1001404836.korean: 고, 고생 많으셨어요, 사령관님. 벌써-&n네? 더요? 아, 아무리 그래도&n한 번에 열 세트도 넘게는... 으...​

1001404837.english: Hehe. Commander~ What are you doing with that silly face again- Ack... I-I thought I was going to get a smack on the head! I was scared, so please pet me more quickly.
1001404837.korean: 히힛. 사령과안~&n또 바보같은 얼굴로 뭐하시는- 꺅…&n꾸, 꿀밤 맞는 줄 알았잖아요!&n저 놀랐으니까, 빨리 더 쓰다듬어주세요.

1001404838.english: I designed this uniform. I’ve heard for a long time that everyone goes crazy when a woman with a curvy figure like mine wears it~ Especially super perverts like the Commander♡
1001404838.korean: 이 제복은 제가 고안했어요. 예전부터&n저같이 쭉쭉빵빵한 몸매를 가진 여자가&n입으면 다들 사족을 못 쓴다고 하더라구요~&n사령관같은 왕변태는 특히 더요♡

1001404839.english: Hello, I'm Orangeade, the new employee! Now that I've officially joined the Orca, I'll work twice as hard as everyone else—no! Ten times harder!
1001404839.korean: 안녕하세요, 신입사원 오렌지에이드예요!&n정식으로 오르카 호에서 일하게 됐으니까&n남들의 2배, 아니! 10배는 더 열심히 할게요!

1001404840.english: When I first met you, I never imagined things would turn out this way. You are surrounded by so many charming people, Commander, so I never thought I would catch your eye. Thank you for liking me; I can't do without you, Commander.
1001404840.korean: 처음 봤을 땐, 이렇게 될 줄 몰랐어요.&n사령관님 곁엔 매력적인 분들이 잔뜩 계시는데,&n제가 눈에 찰 거라고는 생각지도 않았거든요.&n절 좋아해주셔서 감사해요,&n저도 사령관님이 없으면 안돼요.​

1001404841.english: It was tough today, wasn't it? Please eat and rest.

1001404842.english: I set out from the Mediterranean, rounded the Cape of Good Hope, and came here. There were many hardships, but… I was able to endure them for my precious twin sister, Sia. ...Yes. That is also why I developed a habit of saving money. After all, life wasn't exactly affluent, not only while I was wandering but even when I was living in Malta.
1001404842.korean: 지중해에서 출발해서 희망봉을 돌아&n이곳까지 왔습니다. 힘든 일도 많았지만…&n제 소중한 쌍둥이 동생, 시아를 위해&n이겨낼 수 있었습니다. ...네. 절약하는 습관이&n든 것도 그래서입니다. 떠도는 동안은 물론,&n몰타에서 지낼때도 풍족하지는 않았으니까요.

1001404843.english: The uniform is still fine, but I'll need to alter the underwear and loungewear... As for the Commander's... I guess I should buy him a new one. I just need to save a little more...
1001404843.korean: 제복은 아직 괜찮고,&n속옷이랑 실내복은 수선해야겠네…&n사령관님건... 역시 사드려야겠지.&n내가 조금만 더 아끼면 되니까...

1001404844.english: Emphi told me not to smile brightly at just anyone. Does Commander like smiling brightly? Sia likes it so much. Hehehe, smiling brightly~
1001404844.korean: 엠피 언니가 아무한테나 '방긋방긋' 하지 말래.&n전단장님은 '방긋방긋' 좋아? 시아는 엄~청 좋아.&n에헤헤, 방긋방긋~

1001404845.english: Ah! Is today the day Sia grants wishes? Yes. She's keeping up with her last wish. Practicing getting dressed once a day. What is it today? Eh...? Commander's wish is... for Sia to eat carrots...? Why...?
1001404845.korean: 아! 오늘 시아가 소원들어주는 날이야?&n응. 저번 소원은 잘 지키고 있어.&n하루에 한 번씩 옷 입기 연습하는 거.&n오늘은 뭐야? 에...? 전단장님 소원이…&n시아가 당근 먹는거야...? 어째서...?

1001404846.english: Since you confessed first, I won, right? ...Huh? Um, I don't really like you, Commander? It's just that you keep saying you like me... so... actually, I like you a lot, a lot...
1001404846.korean: 사령관이 먼저 고백했으니까 제가 이긴거죠?&n...네? 저, 저는 사령관 별로 안좋아하는데요?&n그냥 사령관이 자꾸 저 좋다고 하시니... 까…&n사실 엄청엄청 좋아해요...​

1001404847.english: First off, Cafe Thetis's menu features hugs, pecks, and kisses. And on top of that—a secret menu? Hmm... If you're that curious, go ahead and order it.
1001404847.korean: 카페 테티스의 메뉴는 일단~ 포옹하고 뽀뽀,&n그리고 키스가 있으시구요~ 거기에-&n시크릿 메뉴요? 흐음… 그렇게 궁금하시면&n한 번 주문해보세요~

1001404848.english: A flexible personality is an essential quality for people working in the field. It allows you to lower the other person's guard and easily build rapport. Oh, a rainbow! Awesome!
1001404848.korean: 유들유들한 성격은 현장에서 일하는&n사람들에게 필수 소양이죠. 상대방의 경계를&n풀고, 쉽게 호감을 쌓을 수 있으니까요.&n앗, 무지개다! 대박!

1001404849.english: ...Hehe. It's nothing. It's just that the Commander looks so cool while working. Seriously, whose boyfriend is he to be this handsome? Ahem. Excuse me, do you happen to be taken? If not, would you like to be mine?
1001404849.korean: ...에헤헷. 아무것도 아니에요.&n그냥 일하는 사령관님이 너무 멋있어서요.&n진짜 누구 남자길래 이렇게 잘 생겼을까~?&n흠흠. 저기요, 혹시 임자 있으세요?&n없으면 제 거 하실래요?​

1001404850.english: Would you like to eat first? Or take a bath first? If not that... Oh, it's nothing.
1001404850.korean: 식사부터 하실래요? 아니면 목욕부터?&n그것도 아니라면…&n아, 아무것도 아니에요.

1001404851.english: Commander. Are you perhaps planning to execute a large-scale operation? I haven't heard anything about that. What? Since you served unlimited meat at dinner yesterday and handed out snacks and drinks, I thought you were trying to comfort the soldiers heading to their deaths… You—you do this often?!
1001404851.korean: 사령관님. 혹시 대규모 작전을 실행하려&n하시는 건가요? 저는 들은 게 없습니다만.&n네? 어제 석식때 고기를 무한정 배식하고&n간식과 음료도 나눠주기에, 사지로 가는&n병사들을 위로하시려는 줄…&n조, 종종 이런다구요?!

1001404852.english: You mean you collected all the letters I gave you? Most of those were written in the early morning... I, I wrote them thinking of you, Commander, so they must contain embarrassing content— W-wait a moment! Please don't read them out loud!
1001404852.korean: 제가 드렸던 편지를 전부 모아놓으셨다구요?&n그건 대부분 새벽에... 사, 사령관님을 생각하면서&n썼던거라 분명 낯부끄러운 내용이-&n자, 잠깐만요! 소리내서 읽지 말아주세요!

1001404853.english: Getting here was yikes... but I'm glad I'm here. Everyone's nice, the bed is comfortable, and... ah! The food is delicious too! Hehe, I'm full. ...This? Yeah. Sia hates carrots, so she didn't eat it. Commander Commander, do you want some?
1001404853.korean: 여기 오는 거, 엄~청 힘들었어... 그래도&n여기 와서 좋아. 다들 착하구, 침대도 편하구,&n또... 아! 밥도 맛있어! 에헤헷, 배부르다.&n...이거? 응. 시아 당근 싫어해서 안 먹었어.&n전단장님 먹을래?

1001404854.english: Hehehe, I like this. Smelling my clothes when Commander Commander hugs me. Mmmm... I'm a little sleepy... But... since Commander Commander is working... Sia... Do...
1001404854.korean: 에헤헤, 이거 좋아. 전단장님이 안아줄 때&n옷 냄새 맡는 거. 으응... 조금 졸려… 그래도…&n전단장님 일하는 중이니까… 시아... 도...

1001404855.english: You want me to say what's written here? Hmm... Commander, you really liked things like stupid, idiotic, cowardly, and perverted♥...?
1001404855.korean: 여기에 적힌 말을 해달라구요? 음…&n사령관은 바보, 멍청이, 겁쟁이, 변태♥&n이런거 진짜로 좋아하셨던 거예요...?​

1001404856.english: Are you going to place an order? Kya ha ha, I'm looking forward to seeing what the Commander chooses— Ah, an iced Americano...? Yes... Your order is taken...
1001404856.korean: 주문하시려구요~? 꺄하핫,&n사령관이 어떤 걸 고르실지 기대-&n아, 아이스 아메리카노요...?&n네... 주문 받았습니다...

1001404857.english: Applying makeup is important, but removing it is even more, much more important. If you go to sleep without washing it off, your skin texture gets a mess. Oh, Commander, would you like to give it a try while we're at it?
1001404857.korean: 화장은 하는 것도 중요하지만&n지우는 게 더더더 중요해요.&n안 씻고 그냥 자면 피부결이 엉망이 된다구요.&n아, 이참에 사령관님도 한번 해보실래요?

1001404858.english: Please cut down on your fieldwork~ Your wife is going to collapse at this rate, Commander~ ...Should I just switch careers to being a full-time housewife while I'm at it? I'd tie your tie for you every morning! Housework...? Commander, are you good at housework by any chance?
1001404858.korean: 외근 좀 줄여줘요~ 이러다&n사령관님 와이프 쓰러진다구요~&n...이참에 전업주부로 전직해 버릴까요?&n아침마다 제가 사령관님에게 넥타이를&n매드리는 거죠! 집안일...?&n사령관님, 혹시 집안일 잘하세요?​

1001404859.english: If I have a lot of work, I might be late. So you don't have to feel too sorry. Waiting for you is fun, too.
1001404859.korean: 일이 많다면, 늦을 수도 있죠.&n그러니 너무 미안해하지 않아도 돼요.&n여보를 기다리는 것도 즐거운 걸요.​

1001404860.english: This is Emphitrite of the Mermaid Black Sea Fleet reporting. As ordered, I have been assigned to the Resistance's patrol fleet to deal with the Commander's enemies... Um, before that, may I ask just one thing? Well, um... by any chance, how much is the pay...?
1001404860.korean: 머메이드 흑해함대 소속, 엠피트리테가&n보고드립니다. 명령하신대로 저항군의&n초계함대에 배속되어, 사령관님의 적들을......&n저, 그전에 하나만 여쭤봐도 될까요?&n그게, 그... 혹시 급료는, 얼마나 나오는지...

1001404861.english: If you aren't using the panel, I'll put it in power-saving mode. And the lights... Ah. As for the lights, well... since you set the mood whenever it gets dark, Commander, I guess I've gotten used to it, or maybe it's become a habit... Uh, anyway, I'll leave them on.
1001404861.korean: 패널 안쓰시면 절전모드로 해둘게요. 그리고&n전등도... 아. 전등은, 그게… 어두워지기만 하면&n사령관님이 그런 분위기를 잡으시니까 저도&n적응이 되었다고 할지, 습관이 되었다고 할지…&n어, 어쨌든 켜두겠습니다.

1001404862.english: Cia does well on her own. Eating and brushing her teeth, washing her face, and clothes too... Actually, she's not very good at dressing. The clothes Cia wears when she goes out are so hard to put on...
1001404862.korean: 시아, 혼자서도 잘 해. 밥 먹고 양치하는거랑,&n세수하는거랑, 옷도... 사실 옷은 잘 못입어.&n시아 나갈 때 입는 옷, 입기 너무 어려워...

1001404863.english: Alright, good boy~ good boy~ Huh? Sia really, really likes it when Commander Commander says "good boy, good boy" like this. So I'm going to do it for you too. Uh-huh, since Sia is doing it for you right now, you just stay still, Commander Commander.
1001404863.korean: 자아, 착하다~ 착하다~ 응? 시아, 전단장님이&n이렇게 착하다, 착하다 해주는 거 엄~청 좋아.&n그래서 전단장님한테도 해주려구.&n으응, 지금은 시아가 해주는 거니까&n전단장님은 가만히 있어.

1001404864.english: Hehe. Commander~ What are you doing with that silly face again- Ack... I-I thought I was going to get a smack on the head! I was scared, so please pet me more quickly.
1001404864.korean: 히힛. 사령과안~&n또 바보같은 얼굴로 뭐하시는- 꺅…&n꾸, 꿀밤 맞는 줄 알았잖아요!&n저 놀랐으니까, 빨리 더 쓰다듬어주세요.

1001404865.english: Hehe, as expected, you can't take your eyes off me~ Alright… you can look a little longer- Ah, no? I'm not embarrassed at all? My face isn't even red? You're the one looking at me...! I, looking at me... Ugh... I, I'm going to go help out in the kitchen.
1001404865.korean: 킥킥, 역시 눈을 못 떼시네요~ 자아… 좀 더&n보셔도- 아, 아뇨? 하나도 안부끄러운데요?&n얼굴도 안빨갛거든요? 그러는 사령관이야말로&n절 보고...! 저, 저를... 보고... 으..&n 주, 주방쪽 일 도와주러 갈래요.

1001404866.english: Wow! Commander, did you see this? My name is on the list of nominees for this month's attendance award! Let's see, if we just count the hours worked... C-Commander, you're in first place?!
1001404866.korean: 대박! 사령관님, 이거 보셨어요? 이달의&n근태우수자 후보에 제 이름이 올라갔어요!&n어디 보자, 일한 시간만 따져보면…&n사, 사령관님이 1등?!

1001404867.english: When I first met you, I never imagined things would turn out this way. You are surrounded by so many charming people, Commander, so I never thought I would catch your eye. Thank you for liking me; I can't do without you, Commander.
1001404867.korean: 처음 봤을 땐, 이렇게 될 줄 몰랐어요.&n사령관님 곁엔 매력적인 분들이 잔뜩 계시는데,&n제가 눈에 찰 거라고는 생각지도 않았거든요.&n절 좋아해주셔서 감사해요,&n저도 사령관님이 없으면 안돼요.​

1001404868.english: I probably know your taste better than you do, honey. Still, please let me know anytime if there is anything in particular you want to eat.
1001404868.korean: 여보 입맛은 제가 여보보다 더 잘 알걸요?&n그래도 특별히 먹고 싶은 게 생기면&n언제든 말씀해주세요.​

1001404869.english: Commander, have you seen Sia by any chance? We were playing hide-and-seek together, but I just can't find her...
1001404869.korean: 사령관님. 혹시 시아 못 보셨나요?&n같이 숨바꼭질 중이었는데&n도저히 찾을 수가 없어서...

1001404870.english: The uniform is still fine, but I'll need to alter the underwear and loungewear... As for the Commander's... I guess I should buy him a new one. I just need to save a little more...
1001404870.korean: 제복은 아직 괜찮고,&n속옷이랑 실내복은 수선해야겠네…&n사령관님건... 역시 사드려야겠지.&n내가 조금만 더 아끼면 되니까...

1001404871.english: Captain Jeon, hide Cia! Emphi is coming to get her! Huh? Hurry, hurry!
1001404871.korean: 전단장님, 시아 숨겨줘!&n엠피 언니가 잡으러 온단말이야!&n응? 빨리빨리!

1001404872.english: Ah! Is today the day Cia grants wishes? Yes. She's keeping up with her last wish. Practicing getting dressed once a day. What is it today? Eh...? Captain Jeon's wish is... for Cia to eat carrots...? Why...?
1001404872.korean: 아! 오늘 시아가 소원들어주는 날이야?&n응. 저번 소원은 잘 지키고 있어.&n하루에 한 번씩 옷 입기 연습하는 거.&n오늘은 뭐야? 에...? 전단장님 소원이…&n시아가 당근 먹는거야...? 어째서...?

1001404873.english: Since you confessed first, I won, right? ...Huh? Um, I don't really like you, Commander? It's just that you keep saying you like me... so... actually, I like you a lot, a lot...
1001404873.korean: 사령관이 먼저 고백했으니까 제가 이긴거죠?&n...네? 저, 저는 사령관 별로 안좋아하는데요?&n그냥 사령관이 자꾸 저 좋다고 하시니... 까…&n사실 엄청엄청 좋아해요...​

1001404874.english: Yes, yes~ You're probably going to order an Americano again~ I knew you would, so I... in advance... What? You're asking if I have time after business hours? Th... of course! Ah, I'm off for the evening shift, so please wait a moment. I should ask P-3M Undine to switch it for me~
1001404874.korean: 네네~ 또 아메리카노 시키시겠죠~&n그러실 줄 알고 미리... 네? 영업 끝나고&n시간 있냐고요? 그...으럼요! 아,&n저 저녁타임 오프니까 조금만 기다리세요.&n운디네한테 바꿔달라고 해야지~

1001404875.english: I only wear a face mask on my days off because I want to laze around and read comic books. ...Huh? You like comic books too, Commander? Wow! Then would you like to come over to my room today? I have a lot of comic books~
1001404875.korean: 휴일에는 뒹굴거리면서 만화책을&n봐야 하니까 마스크 팩만 착용해요.&n...어? 사령관님도 만화책 좋아하세요?&n대박! 그럼 오늘 제 방에 놀러 오실래요?&n제가 가진 만화책 많아요~

1001404876.english: ...Hehe. It's nothing. It's just that the Commander looks so cool while working. Seriously, whose boyfriend is he to be this handsome? Ahem. Excuse me, do you happen to be taken? If not, would you like to be mine?
1001404876.korean: ...에헤헷. 아무것도 아니에요.&n그냥 일하는 사령관님이 너무 멋있어서요.&n진짜 누구 남자길래 이렇게 잘 생겼을까~?&n흠흠. 저기요, 혹시 임자 있으세요?&n없으면 제 거 하실래요?​

1001404877.english: Still, please come as early as possible. Sometimes, waiting is just so lonely… I'm sorry. I shouldn't have said that, right?
1001404877.korean: 그래도 되도록이면 일찍 와주세요.&n가끔은 기다리는 시간이 너무나도 외로우니까…&n미안해요. 제가 괜한 소리를 했죠?

1001404878.english: A snack set... You want me to eat it with Cia...? Th-that... Ah, no! It's not that I don't want to; I just want to give you something in return, but that feels like paying a price, so I really don't know what to do... Would it be okay if it wasn't something material? Then, just a moment... Thank you.
1001404878.korean: 부식 세트... 시아랑 같이 먹으라구요...?&n그, 그게... 아아, 아뇨! 싫은 게 아니라 뭔가&n답례를 드리고 싶은데, 그러면 대가를&n지불하는 것 같아서 대체 어떻게 해야할지…&n혹시 물질적인게 아니라면 괜찮을까요?&n그럼 잠깐만... 감사합니다.​

1001404879.english: You mean you collected all the letters I gave you? Most of those were written in the early morning... I, I wrote them thinking of you, Commander, so they must contain embarrassing content— W-wait a moment! Please don't read them out loud!
1001404879.korean: 제가 드렸던 편지를 전부 모아놓으셨다구요?&n그건 대부분 새벽에... 사, 사령관님을 생각하면서&n썼던거라 분명 낯부끄러운 내용이-&n자, 잠깐만요! 소리내서 읽지 말아주세요!

1001404880.english: That tickles~ Is it fun touching Cia? Cia wants to do it too. Wow, that feels weird... Are men normally like this?
1001404880.korean: 간지러워어~ 시아 만지는 거 재밌어?&n시아도 할래. 와아, 이상한 느낌…&n남자는 원래 이래?

1001404881.english: Hehehe, I like this. Smelling my clothes when Commander Commander hugs me. Mmmm... I'm a little sleepy... But... since Commander Commander is working... Sia... Do...
1001404881.korean: 에헤헤, 이거 좋아. 전단장님이 안아줄 때&n옷 냄새 맡는 거. 으응... 조금 졸려… 그래도…&n전단장님 일하는 중이니까… 시아... 도...

1001404882.english: You want me to say what's written here? Hmm... Commander, you really liked things like stupid, idiotic, cowardly, and perverted♥...?
1001404882.korean: 여기에 적힌 말을 해달라구요? 음…&n사령관은 바보, 멍청이, 겁쟁이, 변태♥&n이런거 진짜로 좋아하셨던 거예요...?​

1001404883.english: Here you go~ Here is the hug you ordered~ Hehe, were you satisfied? Th-something else? N-we're really backed up with orders, so maybe later. But... since this is a complimentary service, you'll have to pay for it separately later. Like, a kiss...
1001404883.korean: 자~ 주문하신 포옹 나왔습니다~&n히힛, 만족하셨어요? 다, 다른 것도요?&n주, 주문이 많이 밀렸으니까 나중에요.&n대신... 이건 서비스니까 나중에 따로&n계산하셔야돼요. 키, 키스같은걸로...

1001404884.english: Ugh...! So that's all we have to do for today, right? That was tough... If I help you finish your work quickly, Commander, we can have a long date, you know~ Let's go eat something delicious. Hehe~ I wonder if there's a new menu item~
1001404884.korean: 으아...! 이걸로 오늘 할 일은 다 끝난거죠?&n힘들었다... 제가 도와서 사령관님 일이&n빨리 끝나야 데이트 오래 할 수 있잖아요~&n어서 맛있는 거 먹으러 가요.&n흐흥~ 신메뉴가 나왔으려나~​

1001404885.english: Please cut down on your fieldwork~ Your wife is going to collapse at this rate, Commander~ ...Should I just switch careers to being a full-time housewife while I'm at it? I'd tie your tie for you every morning! Housework...? Commander, are you good at housework by any chance?
1001404885.korean: 외근 좀 줄여줘요~ 이러다&n사령관님 와이프 쓰러진다구요~&n...이참에 전업주부로 전직해 버릴까요?&n아침마다 제가 사령관님에게 넥타이를&n매드리는 거죠! 집안일...?&n사령관님, 혹시 집안일 잘하세요?​

1001404886.english: I'll clean up after you've finished eating, so please go wash up in the meantime. And... I'm going to put the kids to bed early, so please don't go to sleep yet. Honey.
1001404886.korean: 다 드신건 제가 치울 테니, 그동안 씻고 오세요.&n그리고... 아이들을 일찍 재울 거니까,&n벌써 주무시지는 마세요. 여.보.

1001404887.english: Um... Commander, I have prepared a letter and a handmade sweater here, filled with gratitude, affection, and love. It really isn't much, but... I hope my feelings reach you, even just a little.
1001404887.korean: 저... 사령관님께 감사하는 마음과 애, 애정을&n담아서 여기... 편지랑 직접 짠 스웨터를&n준비했어요. 저, 정말로 별 건 아니지만…&n조금이라도 제 마음이 전해졌으면 좋겠습니다.​

1001404888.english: If you aren't using the panel, I'll put it in power-saving mode. And the lights... Ah. As for the lights, well... since you set the mood whenever it gets dark, Commander, I guess I've gotten used to it, or maybe it's become a habit... Uh, anyway, I'll leave them on.
1001404888.korean: 패널 안쓰시면 절전모드로 해둘게요. 그리고&n전등도... 아. 전등은, 그게… 어두워지기만 하면&n사령관님이 그런 분위기를 잡으시니까 저도&n적응이 되었다고 할지, 습관이 되었다고 할지…&n어, 어쨌든 켜두겠습니다.

1001404889.english: Cia likes Captain Jeon sooooo much. You ask how much "sooooo much" is...? Ugh... how much, how much... I don't know. I just like him sooooo much, is that not allowed...?
1001404889.korean: 시아는 전단장님이 엄~청 좋아.&n엄~청이 얼마만큼이냐구...? 으…&n얼마만큼, 얼마만큼... 모르겠어.&n그냥 엄~청 좋은데, 그러면 안 돼...?​

1001404890.english: Alright, good boy~ good boy~ Huh? Sia really, really likes it when Commander Commander says "good boy, good boy" like this. So I'm going to do it for you too. Uh-huh, since Sia is doing it for you right now, you just stay still, Commander Commander.
1001404890.korean: 자아, 착하다~ 착하다~ 응? 시아, 전단장님이&n이렇게 착하다, 착하다 해주는 거 엄~청 좋아.&n그래서 전단장님한테도 해주려구.&n으응, 지금은 시아가 해주는 거니까&n전단장님은 가만히 있어.

1001404891.english: Hehe. You really are head over heels for me~ You couldn't wait and— Eek...? Th-did you think I'd be surprised by you acting like that? I'm totally relaxed, you know? ......Aren't you going to kiss me?
1001404891.korean: 킥킥. 정말 저한테 홀딱 빠지셨네요~&n그새를 못참고 또- 꺅...? 그, 그렇게&n나오신다고 제가 놀랄줄 아셨어요?&n완전 여유롭거든요?&n......키스, 안 해주세요?​

1001404892.english: Ack! W-wait a minute! You have to... place your order first...?
1001404892.korean: 으앗! 자, 잠깐만요!&n여기 주문부터... 하셔야 되거든요...?

1001404893.english: Commander, come on... aren't you going a bit too far with your jokes?

1001404894.english: I have to go to work tomorrow... You never let me go all night, so I don't have a single vacation left... Are you really going to do just a little bit? Really? Hmm, then... I'm not letting you go this time~?
1001404894.korean: 내일 출근해야되잖아요… 맨날 밤새&n안 놔주셔서 이제 휴가 하나도 안남았는데에…&n진짜 조금만 할 거예요? 진짜로? 흐음, 그럼…&n이번에는 제가 안 놔드릴건데요~?

1001404895.english: You must be hungry, so let's eat first, honey.

1001404896.english: For Cia's sake, something like this is... Th-that not quite right...? Then...?
1001404896.korean: 시아를 위해서라면 이정도쯤은…&n그, 그게 아닌가요...? 그럼...?​

1001404897.english: Um... do you remember the gift I gave you, Commander, last time? ...Yes. I was buying things at the supply depot... and it just caught my eye. Um... since I heard you like them, I bought some pretty lingerie along with it... and, I... am wearing it right now...
1001404897.korean: 저... 저번에 사령관님께 선물 드렸던 거,&n기억하시나요? ...네. 물자 영업소에서 사면서…&n언뜻 눈에 들어와서, 그... 사령관님이&n좋아하신다길래, 예쁜 속옷도 같이 샀는데…&n지, 지금... 입고 있습니다...

1001404898.english: Emphi said that people who do things like this are bad people.
1001404898.korean: 엠피 언니가 이런 거 하는 사람은&n나쁜 사람이랬어.

1001404899.english: Commander, I like you... I like you... I like you so much...

1001404900.english: Hehe. You're really completely head over heels for me~&nYou couldn't resist and again—kya...? Did you think I'd be surprised&nif you came out like that?&nI'm totally relaxed, you know?&n......Won't you kiss me?
1001404900.korean: 킥킥. 정말 저한테 홀딱 빠지셨네요~&n그새를 못참고 또- 꺅...? 그, 그렇게&n나오신다고 제가 놀랄줄 아셨어요?&n완전 여유롭거든요?&n......키스, 안 해주세요?​

1001404901.english: Se-secret menu? Huh, hmm...&nYou might want to think that over again.&nIt's really expensive—hya?! ...If you hug me tight and kiss me,&nthen I'll consider it...
1001404901.korean: 시, 시크릿 메뉴요? 흐, 흐응...&n다시 생각해보시는 게 좋을 걸요?&n엄청 비싸니까- 햣?! ...꼭 안아주면서&n키스해주시면, 생각해볼게요...​

1001404902.english: Ah, really~ We'll get caught... If we do—&nit'll be a big problem... Not for me though... Ah, never mind.&nBut still, take it a little easy, okay?
1001404902.korean: 아 진짜~ 들킨다구요오... 들키면-&n큰일... 나는 건 아니지만... 아, 모르겠다.&n그래도 좀만 살살, 아셨죠?​

1001404903.english: Tomorrow I have to go to work…&nYou never let me rest all night, so now I don't have any vacation left…&nAre you really going to do just a little? Really? Hmm, then…&nThis time, I'm not letting you go~?
1001404903.korean: 내일 출근해야되잖아요… 맨날 밤새&n안 놔주셔서 이제 휴가 하나도 안남았는데에…&n진짜 조금만 할 거예요? 진짜로? 흐음, 그럼…&n이번에는 제가 안 놔드릴건데요~?

1001404904.english: Hehe, eating so hurriedly like that…&nYou're not even giving me time to clean up?&nThen even if you're tired, could you hang in there a little longer?&nI'll do my best too…
1001404904.korean: 후후, 그렇게 급하게 드시곤…&n정리할 시간도 안주시는 거예요?&n그럼 피곤하셔도 조금만 더, 힘 내줄래요?&n저도... 최선을 다할테니까.

1001404905.english: Sorry. Right now, it's a bit… Ah, no.&nIt's not that I don't want to... I really do wish for it too,&nbut… today my underwear is&ntoo plain…
1001404905.korean: 죄송합니다. 지금은 조금… 아, 아뇨.&n싫은 게 아니라... 저도 정말 바라고&n있습니다만... 오늘 속옷이…&n너무 수수한거라서...​

1001404906.english: I... do you remember the gift I gave you last time, Commander?&n...Yes. I was buying supplies at the store…&nand it caught my eye, so… since you said you liked it,&nI also bought some pretty underwear…&nI'm, I'm wearing it right now…
1001404906.korean: 저... 저번에 사령관님께 선물 드렸던 거,&n기억하시나요? ...네. 물자 영업소에서 사면서…&n언뜻 눈에 들어와서, 그... 사령관님이&n좋아하신다길래, 예쁜 속옷도 같이 샀는데…&n지, 지금... 입고 있습니다...

1001404907.english: You know.&nYou're not supposed to do things like this.&nBut Sia really, really&nlikes the Commander, so it's okay.
1001404907.korean: 있지. 원래 이런 거 하면 안 돼.&n근데 시아는 전단장님 엄~청&n좋아하니까 괜찮아.

1001404908.english: Commander, I like you... I love you...&nI really, really love you...

1001404909.english: Master, welcome home. MH-4 Thetis can't live without you… Hehe, are you touched?&nThere's no way I'd say something like this~?&nI don't like it~ I'm not going to do it for you~ you big pervert master♡
1001404909.korean: 주인님, 어서오세요. 테티스는, 주인님이&n없으면 살 수 없으니까… 킥킥, 감동하셨어요?&n제가 이런 말을 할리가 없잖아요~?&n싫은데요~ 안 해드릴건데요~ 왕변태 주인님♡

1001404910.english: Commander being my husband...&nIt feels kind of strange. When it's just the two of us…&nWe only show each other different sides. Isn't that right?
1001404910.korean: 사령관님이 남편이라니... &n뭔가, 이상한 기분이네요. 단 둘이 있을 땐…&n서로 다른 모습만 보여주니까요. 그렇죠?

1001404911.english: Even as the years pass, this place won't change.&nWarm meals, the sound of children's laughter, and&nme, who is watching over you…&nI'll be waiting for you to come back tomorrow, and the day after, my love.
1001404911.korean: 세월이 흘러도 이곳은 변하지 않을 거에요.&n따뜻한 밥과 아이들의 웃음 소리 그리고&n당신을 바라보는 저도…&n내일도 모레도 돌아오기만을 기다릴게요. 여보.

1001404912.english: Thank you, Commander, for making sure Sia can live happily. And beyond that...&nI too am truly happy to have met you, Commander.
1001404912.korean: 시아가 행복하게 지낼 수 있도록 해주셔서&n감사합니다, 사령관님. 그리고 그 이상으로…&n저도, 사령관님을 만나서 정말로 행복해요.

1001404913.english: Commander, Cia promised to grant wishes...&nCould you grant just one wish of Cia's too...?&nIt's that I want to live happily for a long, long time with the commander I really, really like, Cia, and Emphi Big Sis
1001404913.korean: 전단장님. 시아가 소원들어주기로 했었는데...&n시아 소원도 하나만 들어주면 안 돼...?&n뭐냐하면… 엄~청 좋아하는 전단장님이랑,&n시아랑, 엠피 언니랑 오래오래&n행복하게 살았으면 좋겠어.​

1001404914.english: The sense of accomplishment that comes from defeating a powerful enemy is incredibly intense. Clashing my own full power against the opponent's… You ask, "P-What was it like when I took down the Commander…?" Well, he let himself be taken down, and after that, it was actually me… Ugh…
1001404914.korean: 강력한 적을 쓰러뜨렸을 때 찾아오는 성취감은&n무척 강렬하죠. 제 자신과 상대방의 전력을&n부딪치는… 사, 사령관님을 쓰러뜨렸을 땐&n어땠냐구요…? 그건 쓰러져 주신 거였고,&n그 뒤엔 오히려 제가… 으…​

1001404915.english: I used to be strict with the others because something dangerous could happen if I let my guard down… But now that the Commander is here, it’s okay to loosen up a little, right? Commander~ Let’s just roll around together today~
1001404915.korean: 긴장을 풀면 위험한 일이 생기니까,&n다른 애들한테 엄하게 대했었어…&n하지만 이젠 사령관이 있으니까,&n조금은 풀어져도 괜찮겠지?&n사령관~ 오늘은 같이 뒹굴거리자~

1001404916.english: I used to just keep drinking because I was lonely and having a hard time... but now it's nice to have someone by my side. Do you know who I'm talking about?
1001404916.korean: 예전에는 외롭고 힘들어서 계속 술만 마셨는데...&n지금은 함께할 사람이 곁에 있어서 좋네요.&n누군지, 알겠어요?​

1001404917.english: That's right. I've increased the intensity of my training compared to before. If only for the sake of the child that will be born between you and me someday, Commander, I must become stronger than I am now. Speaking of which, how are you feeling right now?
1001404917.korean: 맞아요. 전보다 훈련 강도를 높였어요.&n훗날, 저와 사령관님 둘 사이에 태어날&n아이를 위해서라도 지금보다 강해져야죠.&n말 나온 김에 지금... 어떠신가요?​

1001404918.english: It’s nice getting along with the others, but right now I’d like you to only look at me… I, I didn’t mean to stare at me like that…! Ah, seriously… Don’t look away!
1001404918.korean: 다른 애들이랑 사이좋게 지내는 것도 좋지만,&n지금은 나만 봐줬으면 좋겠는데…&n그, 그렇게 뚫어져라 보라는 뜻이 아니라...!&n아, 진짜… 한 눈 팔지 말라구.

1001404919.english: I had a drink~ I can still drink more, so it's okay- ...Huh? There are three, four, five commanders I like...
1001404919.korean: 한 잔 했어요~&n저 아직 더 마실 수 있으니까 괜찮-&n...어라? 제가 좋아하는 사령관님이&n세 명, 네 명, 다섯 명...

1001404920.english: Asking me to express how much I love you, Commander… you are being mischievous. In that case, my answer is… something I have just realized, but perhaps you are the very reason for my existence.
1001404920.korean: 얼마나 사령관님을 사랑하는지 표현해달라니…&n짓궂으시군요. 그렇다면 제 대답은…&n지금 깨달은 사실인데, 어쩌면 사령관님은&n저한테 살아가는 이유 그 자체인 것 같습니다.

1001404921.english: Hehe. If I can get combed by the Commander like this, I guess I should let my hair down sometimes. Besides, no matter how much I style it... the Commander ends up unraveling it all anyway...
1001404921.korean: 헤헤. 이렇게 사령관한테 빗질 받을 수도 있다면,&n가끔은 머리를 풀고 다녀야겠어.&n그리고 아무리 세팅해도…&n결국 사령관이 다 풀어버리니까...​

1001404922.english: If you're having a hard time, shall I get you a drink? If you pour out your worries one by one over a glass... ta-da! Before you know it, you'll be fine. Or... I could comfort you, too. Just like you did for me, Commander.
1001404922.korean: 힘든 일 있으시면, 술을 좀 가져올까요?&n술 한 잔에 고민 하나씩 털어 넘기다 보면…&n짜잔~ 어느새 괜찮아질 거예요. 아니면…&n제가 위로해 드려도 되구요.&n사령관님이 저한테 해주셨던 것처럼.​

1001404923.english: The sense of accomplishment that comes from defeating a powerful enemy is incredibly intense. Clashing my own full power against the opponent's… You ask, "P-What was it like when I took down the Commander…?" Well, he let himself be taken down, and after that, it was actually me… Ugh…
1001404923.korean: 강력한 적을 쓰러뜨렸을 때 찾아오는 성취감은&n무척 강렬하죠. 제 자신과 상대방의 전력을&n부딪치는… 사, 사령관님을 쓰러뜨렸을 땐&n어땠냐구요…? 그건 쓰러져 주신 거였고,&n그 뒤엔 오히려 제가… 으…​

1001404924.english: I used to be strict with the others because something dangerous could happen if I let my guard down… But now that the Commander is here, it’s okay to loosen up a little, right? Commander~ Let’s just roll around together today~
1001404924.korean: 긴장을 풀면 위험한 일이 생기니까,&n다른 애들한테 엄하게 대했었어…&n하지만 이젠 사령관이 있으니까,&n조금은 풀어져도 괜찮겠지?&n사령관~ 오늘은 같이 뒹굴거리자~

1001404925.english: I used to just keep drinking because I was lonely and having a hard time... but now it's nice to have someone by my side. Do you know who I'm talking about?
1001404925.korean: 예전에는 외롭고 힘들어서 계속 술만 마셨는데...&n지금은 함께할 사람이 곁에 있어서 좋네요.&n누군지, 알겠어요?​

1001404926.english: That's right. I've increased the intensity of my training compared to before. If only for the sake of the child that will be born between you and me someday, Commander, I must become stronger than I am now. Speaking of which, how are you feeling right now?
1001404926.korean: 맞아요. 전보다 훈련 강도를 높였어요.&n훗날, 저와 사령관님 둘 사이에 태어날&n아이를 위해서라도 지금보다 강해져야죠.&n말 나온 김에 지금... 어떠신가요?​

1001404927.english: It’s nice getting along with the others, but right now I’d like you to only look at me… I, I didn’t mean to stare at me like that…! Ah, seriously… Don’t look away!
1001404927.korean: 다른 애들이랑 사이좋게 지내는 것도 좋지만,&n지금은 나만 봐줬으면 좋겠는데…&n그, 그렇게 뚫어져라 보라는 뜻이 아니라...!&n아, 진짜… 한 눈 팔지 말라구.

1001404928.english: I had a drink~ I can still drink more, so it's okay- ...Huh? There are three, four, five commanders I like...
1001404928.korean: 한 잔 했어요~&n저 아직 더 마실 수 있으니까 괜찮-&n...어라? 제가 좋아하는 사령관님이&n세 명, 네 명, 다섯 명...

1001404929.english: Asking me to express how much I love you, Commander… you are being mischievous. In that case, my answer is… something I have just realized, but perhaps you are the very reason for my existence.
1001404929.korean: 얼마나 사령관님을 사랑하는지 표현해달라니…&n짓궂으시군요. 그렇다면 제 대답은…&n지금 깨달은 사실인데, 어쩌면 사령관님은&n저한테 살아가는 이유 그 자체인 것 같습니다.

1001404930.english: Hehe. If I can get combed by the Commander like this, I guess I should let my hair down sometimes. Besides, no matter how much I style it... the Commander ends up unraveling it all anyway...
1001404930.korean: 헤헤. 이렇게 사령관한테 빗질 받을 수도 있다면,&n가끔은 머리를 풀고 다녀야겠어.&n그리고 아무리 세팅해도…&n결국 사령관이 다 풀어버리니까...​

1001404931.english: If you're having a hard time, shall I get you a drink? If you pour out your worries one by one over a glass... ta-da! Before you know it, you'll be fine. Or... I could comfort you, too. Just like you did for me, Commander.
1001404931.korean: 힘든 일 있으시면, 술을 좀 가져올까요?&n술 한 잔에 고민 하나씩 털어 넘기다 보면…&n짜잔~ 어느새 괜찮아질 거예요. 아니면…&n제가 위로해 드려도 되구요.&n사령관님이 저한테 해주셨던 것처럼.​

1001404932.english: Ah, no. If I continue any further, it will interfere with the scheduled training— Are you telling me to break free by force and leave? ...Seeing you say that, I guess today too, I...
1001404932.korean: 아, 안됩니다. 더이상 했다간 예정된 훈련에&n지장이- 힘으로 뿌리치고 가라는 말씀이신가요?&n...그렇게 말씀하시는 걸 보니, 오늘도 저는...

1001404933.english: I'm going to do what I want this time, so Commander, just stay still... H-hey, maybe it would be better if you took the lead...
1001404933.korean: 이번에는 내가 하고 싶은 대로&n할 거니까, 사령관은 가만히… 여, 역시&n사령관이 리드해주는 게 좋을지도…​

1001404934.english: Especially today... sober? It’s nice to be intimate like usual, but... I want to remember every single one of your body heat, breath, and touch, Commander.
1001404934.korean: 오늘은 특별히... 맨정신으로?&n평소처럼 농밀한 것도 좋지만…&n사령관님의 체온, 숨결, 손길&n하나하나 기억하고 싶어요.​

1001404935.english: Ah, no. If I do any more, it will interfere with the scheduled training—&nAre you telling me to just push them away by force and leave?&n...Hearing you say that, it seems like today, once again, I am...
1001404935.korean: 아, 안됩니다. 더이상 했다간 예정된 훈련에&n지장이- 힘으로 뿌리치고 가라는 말씀이신가요?&n...그렇게 말씀하시는 걸 보니, 오늘도 저는...

1001404936.english: This time, I'm going to do things my way,&nso Commander, just stay still… Y-yeah,&nmaybe it's better if the Commander takes the lead after all…
1001404936.korean: 이번에는 내가 하고 싶은 대로&n할 거니까, 사령관은 가만히… 여, 역시&n사령관이 리드해주는 게 좋을지도…​

1001404937.english: Today, especially... completely sober?&nThe usual intensity is nice, but…&nI want to remember every bit of the Commander's warmth, breath, and touch.
1001404937.korean: 오늘은 특별히... 맨정신으로?&n평소처럼 농밀한 것도 좋지만…&n사령관님의 체온, 숨결, 손길&n하나하나 기억하고 싶어요.​

1001404938.english: Presents example operational plans for this unit's tactical deployment. Parallel operation with auxiliary AGS units dedicated to anti-air and detection is recommended. Enemy forces can be completely annihilated in the shortest possible time, provided prerequisite conditions are met.
1001404938.korean: 본기의 전술적인 운용에 대한 예시 방안 제시.&n대공 및 탐지를 전담하는 보조 AGS들과의&n병행 운용을 추천. 선행 조건이 갖춰질 시&n최단시간 내에 적군 초토화, 가능.

1001404939.english: As the Guardian's Shield, I have protected my Master and my sisters. If anything were to happen to them... I would sometimes be blinded by rage.
1001404939.korean: 저는 가디언의 방패로써, 주인님과 자매들을&n지켜왔어요. 만약 주인님이나 자매들에게&n무슨 일이 생긴다면... 분노에 눈이 멀기도 하죠.​

1001404940.english: I feel so happy holding you like this, Master. I should restrain myself, but I am just so happy... Master? Are you alright, Master?
1001404940.korean: 이렇게 주인님을 끌어안고 있으면 정말 행복해요.&n자중해야 하는데 너무나도 행복해서…&n주인님? 주인님 괜찮으세요?​

1001404941.english: Just for today, I’ve decided to call you Master instead of Commander. It’s not something I’m used to, but… this time, it’s a maid, not a vice-captain.
1001404941.korean: 오늘만큼은 사령관님이 아니라 주인님이라고&n불러드리기로 했어요. 익숙하지는 않지만…&n이번엔 부함장이 아니라 메이드니까요.

1001404942.english: This is Cafe Horizon… We have warm coffee and delicious desserts… Are I shy? Of course I am! This is the first time Neri has ever worn such revealing clothes…
1001404942.korean: 카페 호라이즌입니다…&n따뜻한 커피랑, 맛있는 디저트도 있어요…&n부끄럽냐구? 다, 당연하지!&n네리는 이런 야한 옷... 처음 입어본단 말야...​

1001404943.english: Database access detected. Possession of access rights… verified. Information open. <Poseidon Industries operated a military enterprise based on the ideologies of massive battleships and the supremacy of firepower. The Triton is the machine that embodied their ideology through advanced scientific capabilities.>
1001404943.korean: 데이터베이스 열람 감지. 접근 권한&n소유 여부… 확인됨. 정보 개방.&n<포세이돈 인더스트리는 거함거포주의와&n화력만능주의 사상을 바탕으로 군사 기업을&n운영했습니다. 고도의 과학력으로 그들의&n이념을 실체화한 기체가 바로 트리톤입니다.>

1001404944.english: Master, just a moment... aren't you uncomfortable? I really love hugging someone. Just a little more like this...
1001404944.korean: 주인님, 잠시... 불편하지는 않으신가요?&n저는 누군가를 끌어안을 때가 정말 좋아요.&n조금만 더 이렇게...​

1001404945.english: I should be taking care of you, Master... but I feel happy every time I feel your touch. I guess it would be nice to have something like this sometimes.
1001404945.korean: 제가 주인님을 보살펴 드려야 하는데…&n주인님의 손길을 느낄 때마다 행복한 기분이에요.&n가끔은 이런 것도 좋을 것 같네요.​

1001404946.english: The tables and floors are clean, and the kitchen and soliciting customers are fine... What? My attire? I think I'm dressed neatly- Ah! Th-no problem...
1001404946.korean: 테이블이랑 바닥도 깨끗하고,&n주방도 호객도 문제없고… 네?&n복장이요? 깔끔하게 입은 것 같은데-&n아앗! 무, 문제없어요...

1001404947.english: Neri is so embarrassed... But MH-4 Thetis, P-3M Undine, and the Vice-Captain are all wearing them, so I can't just be the only one not wearing one... Besides, I heard that the Commander—no, Master—likes things like this...
1001404947.korean: 네리 너무 부끄러워... 그치만 테티스랑&n운디네랑 부함장님이랑 전부 다 입었는데&n네리만 안 입을 수는 없잖아… 그리고&n사령- 아니, 주인님은 이런 거&n좋아할 거라는 얘기도 들었구...​

1001404948.english: Calculation of the probability of a new combat command input; prediction that a sortie order will be issued with high probability. Report that there are no abnormalities in the mounted armament. Ready for the battlefield at any time— Combat standby order, confirmed. Execute...
1001404948.korean: 새로운 전투 명령의 입력 가능성 연산,&n고확률로 출격 명령이 내려질 거란 결과 예측.&n탑재된 무장에 이상이 없음을 보고.&n언제든지 전장에- 전투 대기 명령, 확인.&n수행...

1001404949.english: I just like taking care of and loving others. Maybe I just want to act like a mother...
1001404949.korean: 저는 단지 누군가를 보살펴주고&n사랑해주는 것을 좋아할 뿐이에요.&n어쩌면 엄마처럼 행동하고 싶은 것일 수도...​

1001404950.english: I thought I was confident in my physical strength, but I simply couldn't handle you, Master. You are more mature than I thought. I will try harder... so could you show me a little more of your dignified side?
1001404950.korean: 체력만큼은 자신 있다고 생각했었는데&n도저히 주인님을 감당할 수 없었네요.&n주인님은 제 생각보다 더 어른스러운 분이시군요.&n제가 더 노력할 테니까…&n주인님의 늠름한 모습을 좀 더 보여주실래요?​

1001404951.english: I have no talent for cooking, so I ended up in charge of the dining hall. And actually, it’s better... being in the hall... allows me to see Master often.
1001404951.korean: 저는 요리에는 소질이 없어서 홀을 맡게 됐어요.&n그리고 오히려 더 좋은 게... 홀에 있으면…&n주인님을 자주 볼 수 있으니까요.

1001404952.english: Here you go. Master, you should go to our cafe and have some coffee and something delicious too. Neri? Neri isn't very good at cooking or serving customers, so I'm going to hand out flyers first and help with the cleaning later.
1001404952.korean: 자, 이거. 주인님도 우리 카페 가서 커피랑&n맛있는 거 먹고 있어. 네리? 네리는 요리랑&n손님 응대는 잘 못하니까 전단지부터 돌리고&n나중에 청소 도와주려구.​

1001404953.english: Presents example operational plans for this unit's tactical deployment. Parallel operation with auxiliary AGS units dedicated to anti-air and detection is recommended. Enemy forces can be completely annihilated in the shortest possible time, provided prerequisite conditions are met.
1001404953.korean: 본기의 전술적인 운용에 대한 예시 방안 제시.&n대공 및 탐지를 전담하는 보조 AGS들과의&n병행 운용을 추천. 선행 조건이 갖춰질 시&n최단시간 내에 적군 초토화, 가능.

1001404954.english: The Guardian sisters and the Companion sisters accept me well when I hug them, but Poi is the only one who runs away. I was just so happy that I only put a little bit of force into it...
1001404954.korean: 가디언 자매들도, 컴패니언 자매들도 제가&n안아주면 잘 받아주는데 유독 포이만&n도망치더라구요. 저는 그냥 너무 기뻐서&n조금 힘을 줬을 뿐인데...​

1001404955.english: I feel so happy holding you like this, Master. I should restrain myself, but I am just so happy... Master? Are you alright, Master?
1001404955.korean: 이렇게 주인님을 끌어안고 있으면 정말 행복해요.&n자중해야 하는데 너무나도 행복해서…&n주인님? 주인님 괜찮으세요?​

1001404956.english: P-You don't really have to call me Master, but... I was wondering if you would like it if I called you Master... Since you already... like me just this much... just this much... Ugh...
1001404956.korean: 구, 굳이 주인님이라고 부를 필요는 없지만,&n그게... 주인님이라고 불러드리면 좋아해&n주실까봐... 지금도 이렇게나... 이렇게나…&n좋아해 주시니까요... 아으...​

1001404957.english: Commander— M-Master, do you really like clothes like this...? I'm really embarrassed...
1001404957.korean: 사령-&n주, 주인님은 진짜로 이런 옷 좋아해...?&n진짜 부끄러운데... ​

1001404958.english: Database access detected. Possession of access rights… verified. Information open. <Poseidon Industries operated a military enterprise based on the ideologies of massive battleships and the supremacy of firepower. The Triton is the machine that embodied their ideology through advanced scientific capabilities.>
1001404958.korean: 데이터베이스 열람 감지. 접근 권한&n소유 여부… 확인됨. 정보 개방.&n<포세이돈 인더스트리는 거함거포주의와&n화력만능주의 사상을 바탕으로 군사 기업을&n운영했습니다. 고도의 과학력으로 그들의&n이념을 실체화한 기체가 바로 트리톤입니다.>

1001404959.english: Oh my, are you acting spoiled? It’s fine whenever you want, Master. Master, you really... are like a child.
1001404959.korean: 어머, 어리광을 부리시는 건가요?&n주인님이 원하신다면 언제든지 괜찮아요.&n주인님, 정말... 아이 같아요.​​

1001404960.english: I should be taking care of you, Master... but I feel happy every time I feel your touch. I guess it would be nice to have something like this sometimes.
1001404960.korean: 제가 주인님을 보살펴 드려야 하는데…&n주인님의 손길을 느낄 때마다 행복한 기분이에요.&n가끔은 이런 것도 좋을 것 같네요.​

1001404961.english: Yes, Master. Cafe Horizon's menu includes Americano, Cafe Latte, and— Yes, you want to order something else? What— Huh? That isn't on the menu… Now, please wait a moment. I, I'll consult with P-3M Undine.
1001404961.korean: 네, 주인님. 카페 호라이즌의 메뉴는&n아메리카노, 카페 라떼 그리고- 네, 다른 걸&n주문하시겠다구요? 무엇을- 네? 그런 건&n메뉴에 없는데… 자, 잠시만 기다려주세요.&n우, 운디네에게 상담해볼게요.

1001404962.english: Huh? You haven't gone to the cafe yet? ...You want to play with Neri? Hmm... I still have flyers left... Hehe. Then, do you want to skip work with Neri for a bit? Neri just felt like playing for a little while too... but... don't stare at me so much...
1001404962.korean: 아? 아직 카페 안 갔어? ...네리랑 놀고 싶다구?&n음... 아직 전단지 남았는데... 헤헷.&n그럼 네리랑 잠깐만 땡땡이칠래?&n네리도 잠깐 놀고 싶어진 참인... 데…&n너, 너무 보지마아...

1001404963.english: Calculation of the probability of a new combat command input; prediction that a sortie order will be issued with high probability. Report that there are no abnormalities in the mounted armament. Ready for the battlefield at any time— Combat standby order, confirmed. Execute...
1001404963.korean: 새로운 전투 명령의 입력 가능성 연산,&n고확률로 출격 명령이 내려질 거란 결과 예측.&n탑재된 무장에 이상이 없음을 보고.&n언제든지 전장에- 전투 대기 명령, 확인.&n수행...

1001404964.english: The reason I like hugs is that when I hold you tight like this, it feels like you won't leave my side. It's that feeling that you will always be by my side...
1001404964.korean: 제가 포옹을 좋아하는 이유는,&n이렇게 꼭 안고 있으면, 주인님이&n제 곁을 떠나지 않을 것만 같아서 그래요.&n항상 제 곁에 있어줄 것만 같은 그런 기분이요...​

1001404965.english: I thought I was confident in my physical strength, but I simply couldn't handle you, Master. You are more mature than I thought. I will try harder... so could you show me a little more of your dignified side?
1001404965.korean: 체력만큼은 자신 있다고 생각했었는데&n도저히 주인님을 감당할 수 없었네요.&n주인님은 제 생각보다 더 어른스러운 분이시군요.&n제가 더 노력할 테니까…&n주인님의 늠름한 모습을 좀 더 보여주실래요?​

1001404966.english: Now that I'm self-conscious, this outfit is incredibly embarrassing... Ugh... But, M-Master, you like this kind of thing, right...? If you want, you could take a closer look... or try this and that...
1001404966.korean: 의식하니까 엄청 부끄러운 옷이네요... 으으…&n그래도 주, 주인님은 이런 거 좋아하시죠...?&n원하시면 좀 더 가까이에서 보시거나…&n이것저것, 해보셔도...​

1001404967.english: Do you really like Neri the most? The others wore this embarrassing outfit too, and Neri can't even properly call you Master... Really? Then Neri won't be embarrassed and will try even harder. ...Huh? You mean you like seeing me shy too?
1001404967.korean: 정말로 네리가 제일 좋아? 이 부끄러운 옷은&n다른 애들도 입었구, 네리는 제대로&n주인님이라고 부르지도 못하는데…&n진짜? 그럼 네리도 안 부끄러워하고&n좀 더 열심히 할게. ...응?&n부끄러워하는 모습도 좋다구?​

1001404968.english: Save the childishness for later… Shall we focus on work now?

1001404969.english: If you wish, please let me know anytime. Even your childishness is just cute to me. So, shall we share some love in my arms again today?
1001404969.korean: 주인님이 원하신다면, 언제든지 말씀해 주세요.&n주인님의 어리광도 저에게는 귀엽기만 한걸요.&n그럼 오늘도 제 품 안에서&n같이 사랑을 나눠볼까요?​

1001404970.english: Eek...? I'm getting ready for work right now...

1001404972.english: I can't hold back any longer either.&nI might lose control of my strength...&nSo... Master, you need to be prepared too.
1001404972.korean: 저도 더는 참을 수가 없어요.&n어쩌면 힘 조절이 안 될 수도 있다구요…&n그러니까... 주인님도 각오하셔야 해요?​

1001404973.english: If that's what you wish, Master, just say the word anytime.&nYour childishness is just adorable to me.&nThen, shall we share love together in my arms again today?
1001404973.korean: 주인님이 원하신다면, 언제든지 말씀해 주세요.&n주인님의 어리광도 저에게는 귀엽기만 한걸요.&n그럼 오늘도 제 품 안에서&n같이 사랑을 나눠볼까요?​

1001404974.english: Wearing clothes like this...&nit makes Master feel that way, doesn't it...?&nAh, no! Actually, I was a little hopeful too,&nbecause... I want to receive love from Master.
1001404974.korean: 역시 이런 옷을 입고 있으면…&n주인님은 그런 기분이 되시는 거죠...?&n아, 아뇨! 사실 저도 조금은 기대하고&n있기도 했고, 그게... 주인님한테…&n사랑, 받고 싶어요.​

1001404975.english: Ma-Master... please stop...&nNeri is so embarrassed, it's making me feel strange...
1001404975.korean: 주, 주인님... 그만해애…&n네리 너무 부끄러워서&n이상해진단 말야...​

1001404976.english: Now, come to me.&nYou worked hard today, so I'll hold you.&nHave you missed being in my arms?&nYou're acting more spoiled than usual today.&nGood, good.
1001404976.korean: 자아, 제게 와주세요.&n오늘도 열심히 하셨으니까, 안아드릴게요.&n제 품이 그리우셨나요?&n오늘따라 더 어리광을 부리시네요.&n착하다, 착해.​

1001404977.english: Thank you for listening to my request and seeing me as a girl.&nIt might not be much of a reward, but today the maid will— ...Now that I think about it,&nam I the only one receiving again this time?
1001404977.korean: 제 부탁을 들어주시고, 저를 하나의&n여자아이로 봐주셔서 정말 감사해요.&n보답이라고 하기는 그렇지만&n오늘도 메이드가- ...그러고 보니,&n이번에도 제가 받기만 하는 건 아닐까요?

1001404978.english: I'm not used to properly calling you Master... hmm... but, you know, Commander~&nNeri really likes Master. Hehe.
1001404978.korean: 제대로 주인…님이라고 부르는 건&n익숙하지 않지만... 으음... 있잖아, 사령관~&n네리는 주인님이 정말 좋아. 헤헷.

1001404979.english: These drones? Starting from here, N, T, and T. We met after I was released from the freeze, but they are the friends who have been with me until now. I have to control them myself, using my brainwaves, though... Is this what it means to share thoughts?
1001404979.korean: 이 드론들? 이쪽부터 엔, 투, 트레.&n동결에서 풀려난 후에 만났지만,&n지금까지 나와 함께해 준 친구들이야.&n내가 직접, 뇌파로 조종해야 하지만…&n이런 게 생각을 나눈다는 건가?​

1001404980.english: The puns I usually crack are things I really racked my brains over while waiting for my account to be unfrozen. I thought they were actually pretty funny... What do you think? Were they okay?
1001404980.korean: 내가 평소에 치는 말장난은 동결이&n해제되길 기다리면서 열심히 생각해 본 거야.&n나름 재밌다고 생각한 건데… 어때? 괜찮았어?​

1001404981.english: You think I look different? It might seem that way since it's not an outfit I wear often. ...You ask why I wore it? Well… if you come sit next to me, I'll tell you.
1001404981.korean: 분위기가 달라진 것 같다고?&n자주 입는 옷이 아니라 그렇게&n보일 수도 있겠네. ...왜 입었냐구?&n그건… 옆에 와서 앉으면 알려줄게.​

1001404982.english: Has this been the first time you have seen your concubine dressed in ceremonial attire? The reason I summoned you today is... Hmph...?! I-I am in the middle of an important conversation! Touching my tail is forbidden from now on, forbidden!
1001404982.korean: 첩이 예복을 갖춰 입은 건 처음 보았느냐.&n첩이 오늘 그대를 불러낸 이유는... 흐윽...?!&n주, 중요한 이야기를 하는 중이지 않느냐!&n지금부터 꼬리 만지는 건 금지이니라, 금지!​

1001404983.english: Looking at old records, I saw that even with a slender figure, one could wear stylish clothes. The woman in the data looks young, but... she looks great, so I suppose it doesn't matter.
1001404983.korean: 예전 기록을 보니, 빈약한 체형이라도&n멋진 옷을 입을 수 있더군요.&n자료 속의 여성은 어려 보이지만…&n멋있으니 상관없겠죠.

1001404984.english: Uh, where are you going? Please... don't go. Please don't leave me alone. Please, please, please... I'm begging you. The restroom? Th-that... ...can you come with me just to the front?
1001404984.korean: 어, 어디 가는 거야? 가지 마...세요.&n저를 혼자 두지 마세요. 제발제발제발…&n부탁이에요. 화장실이요? 그, 그건…&n…앞까지만이라도 같이 갈래요…​

1001404985.english: Eek... I really bothered you, didn't I? I'm sorry, I'm sorry. I'll apologize like this, so please don't leave me alone— Ah... I-I'm sorry. It's okay now. But... please don't leave me alone, even for a single moment...
1001404985.korean: 히익... 제가 너무 귀찮게 굴었죠?&n미안해요미안해요. 이렇게 사과할 테니&n제발 혼자 두지- 아… 미, 미안해. 이제 괜찮아.&n하지만... 아주 잠깐이라도 혼자 내버려 두지 마...​

1001404986.english: Ouch! The guitar strings again... They didn't make a sound when they were loose, but now that I've tightened them, they keep breaking. I guess you really have to loosen and tighten things just the right amount—that sounds like something I've heard somewhere before.
1001404986.korean: 아야~! 또 기타줄이... 느슨할 땐 소리가&n안 나더니, 팽팽하게 조정하니까 자꾸 끊어지네.&n역시 뭐든 적당히 풀고 당겨야-&n어디서 많이 들어본 소리인 것 같은데.​

1001404987.english: Only now has I realized. Have you still not realized...? If so, I will wait until you realize it on your own. For that is the first and last promise we shared.
1001404987.korean: 이제야 첩은 깨우쳤다. 그대는 아직도…&n깨닫지 못하였느냐? 그렇다면 첩은&n그대가 스스로 알아챌 때까지 기다리겠다.&n그것이 첩과 그대가 나눈 첫 번째이자&n마지막 약속이니까.

1001404988.english: Ah, did you hear that? I was humming for a moment— ...What is it? Why are you laughing like that? ...I like songs too.
1001404988.korean: 아, 들었나요. 잠시 흥얼거리고 있었-&n...뭔가요. 왜 그렇게 웃는 거죠.&n...저도 노래 좋아하는데요.​

1001404989.english: Hmm... Commander, are you there? I can see silhouettes, but I can't see things up close very well. I can't exactly stay far away, though. Should I get some glasses?
1001404989.korean: 으음… 사령관 거기 있어? 실루엣 정도는&n보이지만, 가까운 건 잘 안 보인단 말이야.&n그렇다고 멀리 떨어져 있을 수도 없구.&n안경이라도 맞춰야 할까?​

1001404990.english: I want to see the Commander up close, but I'm not used to wearing glasses all of a sudden. And… even if I can't see, I can still feel the Commander this way… so I'm fine.
1001404990.korean: 더 가까이에서 사령관을 보고 싶지만,&n갑자기 안경을 써도 익숙하지 않은걸.&n그리고… 이렇게 하면 보이지 않더라도,&n사령관을 느낄 수 있으니까… 나는 괜찮아.

1001404991.english: You're here? It's not that important... No, it really is important. I have a song to share with you right now. I poured my heart into it, so... please listen attentively.
1001404991.korean: 왔어? 중요한 일은 아니지만…&n아니, 정말 중요한 일이야.&n지금부터 들려줄 노래가 있어.&n내 마음을 담았으니까... 집중해서 들어줘.​

1001404992.english: It feels familiar. Even in the past, there was this much distance between you and this one. Back then, eons passed before the two grew close… but it seems it will not take so long in this life.
1001404992.korean: 익숙하구나. 과거에도 그대와 첩의 사이에는&n이만큼의 거리가 있었지. 그때는 억겁의 시간이&n지난 후에야 가까워졌지만…&n이번 생에는 오래 걸리진 않을 것 같구나.​

1001404993.english: I tried to change my image in my own way... How is it, Commander? Do I seem a little different to you?
1001404993.korean: 나름 이미지 체인지를 해본 건데…&n어때요. 사령관?&n조금은 제가 다르게 느껴지나요?​

1001404994.english: Guys. Staying by the Commander's side like that... Uh, I guess it can't be helped... I'll stay with you too. Huh? Brainwaves? W-I don't really understand what you mean?
1001404994.korean: 얘들아. 그렇게 사령관의 곁에서…&n어, 어쩔 수 없네… 나도 같이 있어줄게. 응?&n뇌파? 무, 무슨 소리인지 잘 모르겠는데?​

1001404995.english: The puns I usually crack are things I really racked my brains over while waiting for my account to be unfrozen. I thought they were actually pretty funny... What do you think? Were they okay?
1001404995.korean: 내가 평소에 치는 말장난은 동결이&n해제되길 기다리면서 열심히 생각해 본 거야.&n나름 재밌다고 생각한 건데… 어때? 괜찮았어?​

1001404996.english: Today is going to be a special day, so I took out the clothes I've been saving and wore. I'll tell you now why it's going to be special…
1001404996.korean: 오늘은 특별한 날이 될 거니까,&n아껴 둔 옷을 꺼내 입은 거야.&n어째서 특별해지는지…&n지금부터 알려줄게.

1001404997.english: Hiyat?! I, I forbade the tail, so the ears...! I said it was forbidden until I heard something important... Hmmm... there, in the back... Haa... Right, right there...
1001404997.korean: 히얏?! 꼬, 꼬리를 금지하니 귀를...!&n중요한 이야기를 듣기 전까지는,&n금지라 하였거늘… 으응... 거기, 뒤쪽…&n하으... 그래, 거기이...​

1001404998.english: Producer, it's Doom. Doom. Ah... I just wanted to give it a try. So, was that one okay?
1001404998.korean: 프로듀서, 둠이에요. 둠.&n아... 그냥 한 번 해보고 싶었어요.&n그래서 방금 건 괜찮았나요?​

1001404999.english: I can't see very well... Ah, here you are. That's the Commander in front of me, right? Ugh. If I wrap my arms around you like this, you can feel safe even if you can't see. Huh? You want me to move aside for a moment? Why— Ah! Th-that... I just suddenly hugged you. Hahaha...
1001404999.korean: 잘 안 보이는데… 아, 여깄구나.&n내 앞에 있는 거 사령관 맞지? 에잇.&n이렇게 두 팔로 감싸면, 안 보이더라도&n안심할 수 있어. 응? 잠깐 비켜달라고? 왜-&n앗! 그, 그게… 갑자기 안아버렸네. 하하하...​

1001405000.english: Eek... I really bothered you, didn't I? I'm sorry, I'm sorry. I'll apologize like this, so please don't leave me alone— Ah... I-I'm sorry. It's okay now. But... please don't leave me alone, even for a single moment...
1001405000.korean: 히익... 제가 너무 귀찮게 굴었죠?&n미안해요미안해요. 이렇게 사과할 테니&n제발 혼자 두지- 아… 미, 미안해. 이제 괜찮아.&n하지만... 아주 잠깐이라도 혼자 내버려 두지 마...​

1001405001.english: Done! I didn't make a single mistake from start to finish. ...Still, just in case, let's practice more. Since this is the first time I'm singing for the Commander, I can't tolerate even the slightest mistake.
1001405001.korean: 됐다! 처음부터 끝까지 단 한 번도&n실수하지 않았어. ...그래도 혹시 모르니,&n더 연습해두자. 사령관한테 처음 들려주는&n내 노래니까, 한치의 실수도 용납할 수 없어.​

1001405002.english: Have you realized it now? Yes, the bond between you and me has continued from a past life. Transcending the long passage of time, we have met once again. ...My dear. Just as I did in the past, I still love you in this life.
1001405002.korean: 이제 깨달았느냐. 그래, 첩과 그대의 인연은&n전생에서부터 이어져왔다. 기나긴 세월을 초월해&n다시 한번 우리가 만나게 된 게지.&n...그대여. 첩은 전세에서 그랬듯,&n현세에서도 여전히 그대를 연모하고 있다.​

1001405003.english: I've been trying to bring out charms I didn't have before... but I realize the most important thing was to highlight the unique appeal that sets me apart from others, the charm only I can show.
1001405003.korean: 그동안 없는 매력을 끌어내려고 노력했는데…&n남들과는 다른, 나만이 보여줄 수 있는 매력을&n돋보이는 것이 제일 중요했군요.

1001405004.english: Can I hug you while I sleep again today, Commander? I can't fall asleep unless I'm holding something... and being with you also makes me feel at ease...
1001405004.korean: 오늘도 사령관을 껴안고 자도 돼?&n나는 뭔가를 안고 있지 않으면 잠에&n들지 못하니까… 그리고 사령관이랑&n있으면 마음이 편안해지는 것도 있구…​

1001405005.english: I want to see the Commander up close, but I'm not used to wearing glasses all of a sudden. And… even if I can't see, I can still feel the Commander this way… so I'm fine.
1001405005.korean: 더 가까이에서 사령관을 보고 싶지만,&n갑자기 안경을 써도 익숙하지 않은걸.&n그리고… 이렇게 하면 보이지 않더라도,&n사령관을 느낄 수 있으니까… 나는 괜찮아.

1001405006.english: ...Phew. How was it? I poured the feelings I’ve always wanted to share with you, Commander, into this song. Your thoughts... no, answer me. How— You idiot Commander, it’s too late...
1001405006.korean: ...후우. 어땠어? 내가 줄곧 사령관에게&n들려주고 싶었던 마음을 이 노래에 담았어.&n소감... 아니, 대답해 줘. 어떻게-&n멍청이 사령관, 너무 늦어...​

1001405007.english: How regrettable the time I spent running away when I first met you. If only I had realized it a little sooner, I wouldn't have wasted my time... Now, it is just a belated regret. I will be faithful to this very moment, making up for the time lost between you and your concubine.
1001405007.korean: 처음 그대와 만났을 때, 도망 다녔던 그때&n그 시간이 안타깝구나. 조금만 더 일찍&n깨달았다면 시간을 헛되이 보내지 않았을 텐데…&n이제 와선 뒤늦은 후회지. 그대와 첩 사이에&n사라진 시간만큼 지금 이 순간에 충실하겠다.​

1001405008.english: I'm not sure if you'll like it, but I prepared everything—from these clothes to this song—for you, Commander. So please tell me anytime if you want to hear my song. Because right now, I am an angel singing only for you.
1001405008.korean: 마음에 들지는 모르겠지만, 이런 옷도, 노래도&n전부 사령관을 위해 준비했어요. 그러니까&n제 노래가 듣고 싶다면 언제든지 말하세요.&n지금의 전 당신만을 위해 노래하는 천사니까.

1001405009.english: Uh, where are you touching! I-it's not that I don't like it, but since I can't see well, my other senses are heightened... so if you're going to do it, be gentle...
1001405009.korean: 어, 어디에 손을 대는 거야!&n시, 싫은 건 아니지만 잘 안 보이는 만큼,&n다른 감각이 예민하니까…&n이왕이면 상냥하게...​

1001405010.english: Today too? Yeah, it's fine. It feels good to be warm, Commander. But in return, I... I want to feel you with my own hands. Even if I can't see clearly, I want to share more love with you, Commander...
1001405010.korean: 오늘도? 응, 괜찮아.&n사령관이라면 따뜻해서 기분 좋은걸.&n그 대신에 나도... 내 손으로 사령관을&n느끼고 싶어. 잘 보이지 않아도, 사령관과&n좀 더 사랑을 나누고 싶으니까...​

1001405011.english: Ah, not yet! It won't be too late even after this is over... okay?
1001405011.korean: 아, 아직은 안돼!&n이거 끝나고 나서도 늦지 않으니까…&n응?​

1001405012.english: You must not miss the timing. Be patient, my friend.
1001405012.korean: 때를 그르쳐선 아니 되니라.&n그대여, 참을성을 갖거라.​

1001405013.english: Heh. So that's what you're checking first? You don't need to check like that; I didn't put anything in.
1001405013.korean: 큭. 역시 그것부터 확인하시는 건가요?&n그렇게 확인하지 않아도,&n아무것도 넣지 않았어요.​

1001405014.english: Ah, yes… you can do as you like.&nThe commander's touch is truly gentle and warm…&nEvery time it reaches me, I feel happy and reassured.&nSo… could you make me feel even more at ease?
1001405014.korean: 앗, 응… 하고 싶은 대로 해도 좋아.&n사령관의 손길은 정말 상냥하고, 따뜻해서…&n닿을 때마다 행복하고 안심되는 기분이야.&n그러니까 내가 좀 더 안심할 수 있게 해줄래?​

1001405015.english: Today too? Yes, it's fine.&nIf it's the commander, it feels warm and pleasant.&nBut I also… want to feel the commander with my own hands.&nEven if I can't see well, I want to share more love with the commander…
1001405015.korean: 오늘도? 응, 괜찮아.&n사령관이라면 따뜻해서 기분 좋은걸.&n그 대신에 나도... 내 손으로 사령관을&n느끼고 싶어. 잘 보이지 않아도, 사령관과&n좀 더 사랑을 나누고 싶으니까...​

1001405016.english: Ugh…! Um… s-sorry. The tears…&nIt's not because I'm scared. It's just… the things I've dreamed of are really coming true, and I'm happy…&nIt's okay, so please continue.&nI feel the same way as the commander…
1001405016.korean: 웁...! 음... 미, 미안. 눈물이…&n무서워서 그러는 거 아냐. 꿈에 그리던&n일들이 진짜 이뤄져서, 기뻐서 그런 거야…&n괜찮으니까, 계속해 줘.&n나도 사령관이랑 똑같은 마음이니까...​

1001405017.english: The dawn sun is not far off, yet you still say it is not enough… This one supposes there is no choice.&nThis one has pledged to spend a hundred years with you…&nThis one shall endure until you are satisfied.
1001405017.korean: 돋을볕이 멀지 않았는데 아직도&n부족하단 말이더냐… 하는 수 없지.&n그대와 백년해로를 맹세했으니…&n그대가 만족할 때까지 첩이 받아내주마.​

1001405018.english: ...Since there's still time before going on stage, I'll keep you company.&nBut you mustn't be seen, so please make sure to finish properly.
1001405018.korean: ...무대에 오르기 전까지 시간이 남았으니&n상대해드리죠. 대신에 보이면 안 되니까,&n마무리는 확실하게 해주세요.

1001405019.english: Commander, I'll borrow your shoulder for a moment.&nMm… other people are nice too, but being with you is still the best.&nI want to stay by your side like this… all the time.
1001405019.korean: 사령관, 잠깐 어깨 좀 빌릴게.&n응… 다른 애들도 좋지만, 역시&n사령관이랑 있을 때가 가장 좋아.&n이렇게 계속... 사령관의 곁에 머물고 싶어.

1001405020.english: Watching the sun set together isn't so bad.&nWill you come with me next time too?&nJust say the word anytime. Destruction… no,&nI'm on your side, Commander.
1001405020.korean: 함께 해가 저무는 걸 보는 것도 나쁘지 않네.&n다음에도 같이 와줄 수 있냐구?&n언제든지 말만 해. 멸망... 아니,&n나는 사령관의 편이니까.​

1001405021.english: Even through countless cycles of reincarnation, our ending was always predetermined.&nWe promised a hundred years together and whispered unchanging love to each other.&nThis life has turned out the same. Ahem. The night air is cold, so let's go back.&nLet's share each other's warmth.
1001405021.korean: 무량대수의 윤회 속에서도 우리의 결말은 항상&n정해져 있었다. 백년해로를 약속하며 서로에게&n변치 않는 사랑을 속삭였지. 이번 생도&n그리되었구나. 크흠. 밤공기가 차니 돌아가자.&n가서 서로의 온기를 나누자꾸나.

1001405022.english: The reason I was able to do this much is all thanks to you, Commander.&nFor giving me so much attention and loving me like this… I'm truly grateful, Commander.
1001405022.korean: 제가 이렇게까지 할 수 있던 것은,&n모두 사령관 덕분이에요.&n제게 많은 관심을 주고, 이렇게&n사랑해 줘서... 정말 고마워요. 사령관.

1001405023.english: Um... Commander. They say you change when touched by someone you like... Could you possibly do it more often? I haven't completely given up yet.
1001405023.korean: 그... 사령관. 좋아하는 사람의&n손길이 닿으면 바뀐다고 하던데...&n혹시 더 자주 해줄 수 있을까요?&n아직 완전히 포기한 건 아니니까요.​

1001405024.english: You know how the other kids were jealous of my ring the other day? Sorry, but I need to show it off a little more.
1001405024.korean: 이전에 내 반지를 보고&n다른 애들이 부러워하던 거 있지?&n미안하지만, 좀 더 자랑해야겠어.​

1001405025.english: Your Excellency is a special person to me. Just looking at you makes me happy, and talking to you makes me joyful all day long… You are my everything.
1001405025.korean: 각하는 제게 있어 특별한 존재입니다.&n바라보는 것만으로도 행복하고,&n이야기를 나누게 되면 온종일 기쁜…&n제 삶의 전부예요.​

1001405026.english: You ask if I am not ashamed even after being treated this way and that by the Commander? As your wife and aide-de-camp, I cannot be that ashamed. And... even if I am ashamed, I endure it.
1001405026.korean: 사령관에게 이런저런 짓을 당해도 부끄럽지&n않냐구요? 당신의 아내이자 부관으로써&n그 정도로 부끄러워할 수는 없죠.&n그리고... 부끄러워도 참는 겁니다.​

1001405027.english: Let's go out together tonight. I'll tell you about the constellations! Well, taking on the boss is nice, but sometimes we need something romantic like this. ...Because we're a married couple.
1001405027.korean: 오늘 밤엔 같이 나가자.&n별자리 이야기를 해줄게!&n뭐, 대장이랑 한 판 붙는 것도 좋지만,&n가끔은 이런 분위기 있는 것도 해야지.&n...부부니까.​

1001405028.english: It is truly不思議 (strange/strange). Every day used to feel like gray, but when I am with Your Excellency, Commander, even ordinary daily life feels new. I guess I was being a bit sentimental; please forget about it.
1001405028.korean: 참 신기한 일이죠. 매일이 잿빛&n같았는데, 사령관 각하와 같이 있으면&n평범한 일상조차 새롭게 다가와요.&n조금 감성적이었군요, 잊어주세요.​

1001405029.english: The Commander definitely said, didn't he? That 'since your chest is small, you can hear the heartbeat closer'... Would you like to listen to my heartbeat again today?
1001405029.korean: 분명 사령관이 말했죠? '가슴이 작아서&n심장 소리를 더 가까이서 들을 수 있다'고...&n오늘도 제 심장 소리를 들어볼래요?​

1001405030.english: I've increased my workout volume recently. You might ask if that's enough as it is? Well, this isn't enough to handle my large intestine...
1001405030.korean: 최근에 운동하는 양을 늘렸어.&n지금도 충분하지 않냐고? 대장을&n감당하려면 이 정도는 부족한걸...​

1001405031.english: I have lived by the maxim to be faithful to the present moment, but ever since I became united with Your Excellency the Commander, I wish every moment were eternal. I never knew I was such a greedy woman.
1001405031.korean: 지금 이 순간에 충실하라는 격언대로&n살아왔습니다만, 사령관 각하와&n맺어진 후부터는 매 순간이 영원하길&n바랍니다. 제가 이렇게 욕심 많은&n여자인 줄은 처음 알았네요.​

1001405032.english: Um... Commander. They say you change when touched by someone you like... Could you possibly do it more often? I haven't completely given up yet.
1001405032.korean: 그... 사령관. 좋아하는 사람의&n손길이 닿으면 바뀐다고 하던데...&n혹시 더 자주 해줄 수 있을까요?&n아직 완전히 포기한 건 아니니까요.​

1001405033.english: You know how the other kids were jealous of my ring the other day? Sorry, but I need to show it off a little more.
1001405033.korean: 이전에 내 반지를 보고&n다른 애들이 부러워하던 거 있지?&n미안하지만, 좀 더 자랑해야겠어.​

1001405034.english: Your Excellency is a special person to me. Just looking at you makes me happy, and talking to you makes me joyful all day long… You are my everything.
1001405034.korean: 각하는 제게 있어 특별한 존재입니다.&n바라보는 것만으로도 행복하고,&n이야기를 나누게 되면 온종일 기쁜…&n제 삶의 전부예요.​

1001405035.english: You ask if I am not ashamed even after being treated this way and that by the Commander? As your wife and aide-de-camp, I cannot be that ashamed. And... even if I am ashamed, I endure it.
1001405035.korean: 사령관에게 이런저런 짓을 당해도 부끄럽지&n않냐구요? 당신의 아내이자 부관으로써&n그 정도로 부끄러워할 수는 없죠.&n그리고... 부끄러워도 참는 겁니다.​

1001405036.english: Let's go out together tonight. I'll tell you about the constellations! Well, taking on the boss is nice, but sometimes we need something romantic like this. ...Because we're a married couple.
1001405036.korean: 오늘 밤엔 같이 나가자.&n별자리 이야기를 해줄게!&n뭐, 대장이랑 한 판 붙는 것도 좋지만,&n가끔은 이런 분위기 있는 것도 해야지.&n...부부니까.​

1001405037.english: It is truly不思議 (strange/strange). Every day used to feel like gray, but when I am with Your Excellency, Commander, even ordinary daily life feels new. I guess I was being a bit sentimental; please forget about it.
1001405037.korean: 참 신기한 일이죠. 매일이 잿빛&n같았는데, 사령관 각하와 같이 있으면&n평범한 일상조차 새롭게 다가와요.&n조금 감성적이었군요, 잊어주세요.​

1001405038.english: The Commander definitely said, didn't he? That 'since your chest is small, you can hear the heartbeat closer'... Would you like to listen to my heartbeat again today?
1001405038.korean: 분명 사령관이 말했죠? '가슴이 작아서&n심장 소리를 더 가까이서 들을 수 있다'고...&n오늘도 제 심장 소리를 들어볼래요?​

1001405039.english: I've increased my workout volume recently. You might ask if that's enough as it is? Well, this isn't enough to handle my large intestine...
1001405039.korean: 최근에 운동하는 양을 늘렸어.&n지금도 충분하지 않냐고? 대장을&n감당하려면 이 정도는 부족한걸...​

1001405040.english: I have lived by the maxim to be faithful to the present moment, but ever since I became united with Your Excellency the Commander, I wish every moment were eternal. I never knew I was such a greedy woman.
1001405040.korean: 지금 이 순간에 충실하라는 격언대로&n살아왔습니다만, 사령관 각하와&n맺어진 후부터는 매 순간이 영원하길&n바랍니다. 제가 이렇게 욕심 많은&n여자인 줄은 처음 알았네요.​

1001405041.english: Ugh. Since everything will end up in the Commander's hands, there is no need to rush...
1001405041.korean: 읏. 제건 사령관의 손에 다 들어가니까,&n그렇게 급하게 하지 않아도...​

1001405042.english: Hehe, Captain, you really never get tired? Uh, huh? Again...? It is a little tough, but... I think I can get through it with the power of love.
1001405042.korean: 헤헷, 대장은 진짜 지치지도 않는구나?&n으, 응? 또...? 조금 힘들긴 한데...&n사랑의 힘으로 이겨낼 수 있을 것 같아.​

1001405043.english: Hmm... Haa... You said, a cute face? W-what kind of expression was I just making? Ugh...! ...Still, if Your Excellency wishes...
1001405043.korean: 음… 하아… 귀, 귀여운 얼굴이라고요?&n바, 방금 제가 어떤 표정을 지었었죠?&n으으…! …그래도, 각하께서 원하신다면…​

1001405044.english: Ugh. Since everything's already in the commander's hands,&nthere's no need to rush like that…
1001405044.korean: 읏. 제건 사령관의 손에 다 들어가니까,&n그렇게 급하게 하지 않아도...​

1001405045.english: Hehe, the commander really doesn't seem to get tired, huh?&nUh, hmm? Again…? It's a bit tough, but…&nI think I can overcome it with the power of love.
1001405045.korean: 헤헷, 대장은 진짜 지치지도 않는구나?&n으, 응? 또...? 조금 힘들긴 한데...&n사랑의 힘으로 이겨낼 수 있을 것 같아.​

1001405046.english: Um… haa… y-you think my face is cute?&nW-what kind of expression did I just make?&nUgh…! …But, if it's what Your Excellency wants…
1001405046.korean: 음… 하아… 귀, 귀여운 얼굴이라고요?&n바, 방금 제가 어떤 표정을 지었었죠?&n으으…! …그래도, 각하께서 원하신다면…​

1001405047.english: Under the Empress, I mainly handled infiltration and target assassination missions. After losing contact, I lived a nomadic life... but now I can finally live in a warm place. Please take good care of me, Hot Pack♥
1001405047.korean: 여제님 밑에서는 주로 잠입이랑&n요인 암살 임무를 맡았어.&n연락이 끊긴 후에는 떠돌이 생활을 했는데…&n이제야 좀 따뜻한 곳에서 살 수 있겠네.&n앞으로 잘 부탁해, 핫팩♥

1001405048.english: Go back and rest first? How can I really rest properly when my boyfriend is working? Give it to me. How do I do this? ...Hmm. Heh, I don't know. I wanted to help, but I guess it's not going to work out. Instead, I'll wait right by your side until you're finished.
1001405048.korean: 먼저 돌아가서 쉬기는~&n남친이 일하는데 혼자 어떻게 푹 쉬냐?&n이리 줘, 어떻게 하는 건데? ...으음.&n킥, 모르겠다. 도와주고 싶었는데 안되겠네.&n대신 끝날 때까지 옆에서 기다려줄게~

1001405049.english: You're asking who I like better, a chocolate bar or the Commander? Hmm... Hehe. T-13 Alvis likes the Commander more! Because being with the Commander makes me happier than eating a chocolate bar!
1001405049.korean: 초코바랑 사령관님 중에 누가 더 좋냐구?&n음… 히힛. 알비스는 사령관님이 더 좋아!&n왜냐면 사령관님이랑 있으면&n초코바를 먹는 것보다 더 행복하니까!

1001405050.english: This shield? Alvis likes rabbits, so I decorated it myself. Hehe. How is it? Isn't it cute?
1001405050.korean: 이 방패?&n알비스는 토끼가 좋으니까 직접 꾸며봤어.&n히히. 어때? 귀엽지?​

1001405051.english: Did you think I only approach the Commander in a headstrong manner? Hehe, Commander. To survive in this pride, this much effort is necessary.
1001405051.korean: 내가 저돌적인 방법으로만 사령관에게&n다가간다고 생각한 거야? 후후, 사령관.&n이 프라이드에서 살아남으려면,&n이 정도의 노력은 필요한 법이야.

1001405052.english: The origin of my name? Do you know if I tell you? ...Heh. Now that you mention it, I actually want to tell you. I just took it from a myth on a small island over there in the corner. Well, it might not be a big deal to others, but I really liked it.
1001405052.korean: 내 이름의 유래? 말해주면 알아? ...킥.&n또 그러니까 말해주고 싶네. 그냥 저쪽&n구석에 있는 작은 섬의 신화에서 따왔어.&n뭐, 남들에겐 별 거 아니겠지만&n나는 썩 마음에 들더라고.

1001405053.english: Come to think of it, I don't really need a jacket when it's just the two of us. I wore it because of the hand warmers, but I don't need it when my boyfriend is around, right? What are you doing? Come here. Ah, it's warm... You like it being cool too, don't you? If the position is uncomfortable, your boyfriend can switch places with you. Just do whatever is comfortable...
1001405053.korean: 생각해보니까 둘이 있을 때는 점퍼 안 입어도&n되네. 핫팩 때문에 입었는데 남친 있으면&n필요 없잖아? 뭐해, 이리 와봐. 아, 따뜻하다…&n너도 시원해서 좋지?&n자세 불편하면 남친이 바꿔~ 편한대로 해…

1001405054.english: Whining... I'm out of chocolate bars. Did you run out of what you need, Commander? Hehe. Commander, you know~ Let's go to the warehouse together, secretly, without C-33 Andvari knowing.
1001405054.korean: 히잉... 초코바가 다 떨어졌잖아.&n사령관님도 필요한 게 다 떨어졌어?&n히힛. 사령관님, 있잖아~&n안드바리 몰래, 같이 창고 갔다오자.

1001405055.english: So… "Never take your eyes off the Commander," "Never let your guard down," "Never fall in love." Yeah! It'll probably be fine!
1001405055.korean: 그러니까…&n"절대 사령관님에게서 눈을 떼지 말 것",&n"절대 경호를 풀지 말 것",&n"절대 사랑에 빠지지 말 것"&n응! 아마도 괜찮을 거야!

1001405056.english: I tried my best to hide my wild side. I dressed up and took care of my appearance. Looking at it this way, don't I... seem like quite an elegant woman?
1001405056.korean: 최대한 내 야성을 숨기려고 노력했지.&n옷을 갖춰 입고, 외모도 가꾸어 보고.&n이렇게 보면 나도…&n제법 우아한 여인 같지 않나?

1001405057.english: Hey, Hot Pack. Are you that bothered by my tongue? Don't change the subject. ...Do you want to see how it moves? Give me your hand.
1001405057.korean: 야, 핫팩. 내 혀가 그렇게 신경쓰여?&n말 돌리지 말고.&n...어떻게 움직이는지 한 번 볼래?&n손 이리 줘봐.

1001405058.english: Tying a cherry stem knot with your tongue? Easy~ Look. Hmm… How is it? I told you it’s easy. … You’re not jealous of a cherry stem, are you? Heh, I’ll prove to you that I like my boyfriend more than this. Come here.
1001405058.korean: 혀로 체리 꼭지 매듭짓기? 쉽지~ 봐봐. 음…&n어때? 쉽다니까. …설마 체리 꼭지에 질투해?&n킥, 내가 이거보다 남친을 더 좋아한다는 걸&n증명해줄게. 이리 와봐.

1001405059.english: Commander, Commander! T-13 Alvis did a great job, so give me a hug again today! Wow~ You're the best, Commander! Hehe, hug hug~
1001405059.korean: 사령관님, 사령관님!&n알비스 잘했으니까, 오늘도 부둥부둥 해줘!&n와아~ 사령관님이 최고야!&n히히, 부둥부둥~

1001405060.english: T-13 Alvis wanted to be a cool bodyguard like in the movies, too, so Audrey Dreamweaver specially made this for him! Hehehe. T-13 Alvis looks cool, right? Hmm~ but doesn't this outfit look a little small?
1001405060.korean: 알비스도 영화처럼 멋있는 보디가드가 되고&n싶었는데, 오드리 언니가 특별히 만들어준거래!&n히히힛. 알비스 멋있지? 으음~&n근데 이 옷, 조금 작은 것 같지 않아?

1001405061.english: Let's see. Suitable fruit and even wine to quench our thirst... Come to think of it, I heard the Commander gets into big trouble if he drinks... How about it? I'm fine with it. Want to have a drink together?
1001405061.korean: 어디 보자.&n적당한 과일과 목을 축일 와인까지…&n그러고 보니 사령관은 술을 마시면&n큰일이 난다던데…&n어때, 나는 괜찮은데, 같이 한잔할래?

1001405062.english: Having no missions is one thing for a day or two, but just playing around every day is getting boring… You really don’t have any missions to assign? ...What? You want me to relax and do whatever I want? ...You’re quite a peculiar guy, too. I actually like that kind of thing.
1001405062.korean: 임무가 없는 것도 하루 이틀이지,&n매일 놀고만 있으니 따분하네…&n맡길 임무 진짜 없어? ...뭐?&n하고 싶은 걸 하면서 편히 지내라고?&n...너도 참 특이한 놈이구나.&n그런 거 좋아해, 난.​

1001405063.english: Go back and rest first? How can I really rest properly when my boyfriend is working? Give it to me. How do I do this? ...Hmm. Heh, I don't know. I wanted to help, but I guess it's not going to work out. Instead, I'll wait right by your side until you're finished.
1001405063.korean: 먼저 돌아가서 쉬기는~&n남친이 일하는데 혼자 어떻게 푹 쉬냐?&n이리 줘, 어떻게 하는 건데? ...으음.&n킥, 모르겠다. 도와주고 싶었는데 안되겠네.&n대신 끝날 때까지 옆에서 기다려줄게~

1001405064.english: You're asking who I like better, a chocolate bar or the Commander? Hmm... Hehe. T-13 Alvis likes the Commander more! Because being with the Commander makes me happier than eating a chocolate bar!
1001405064.korean: 초코바랑 사령관님 중에 누가 더 좋냐구?&n음… 히힛. 알비스는 사령관님이 더 좋아!&n왜냐면 사령관님이랑 있으면&n초코바를 먹는 것보다 더 행복하니까!
