1001405065.english: This chocolate bar? They say bodyguards have to be prepared for everything. This is emergency rations for when you get hungry! Hehe. Commander, have one too.
1001405065.korean: 이 초코바?&n보디가드는 모든 상황에 대비해야 한대.&n이건 배고플 때를 위한 비상식량이야!&n히힛. 사령관님도 하나 먹어.

1001405066.english: So, when the Commander arrives, I should assume the most elegant posture possible and wear a relaxed smile... Hmm. I guess I should ask him to let me know again later.
1001405066.korean: 그러니까, 사령관이 오면 최대한 우아한 자세로&n여유로운 미소를 지으면서…&n음. 나중에 다시 알려달라고 해야겠네.

1001405067.english: Wait, wait~ Don't pity me. I really like myself. After all, I have a cool name taken from mythology, and I kind of like having snake genes mixed in. I'm even a white snake! You know? White snakes have been considered sacred creatures since ancient times. Compared to all these cool qualities, things like struggling to make ends meet or the annoyance caused by body heat are nothing.
1001405067.korean: 잠깐잠깐~ 동정하지 마. 난 내가 정말 좋으니까.&n것도 그럴게 신화에서 따온 멋진 이름도 있고,&n뱀 유전자가 섞인 것도 좀 맘에 들어.&n심지어 백사야! 알아?&n백사는 옛날부터 영물이었다고.&n이런 멋진 점들에 비하면 먹고 살기 팍팍하거나&n체온 때문에 귀찮은 거 정도는 별거 아냐.​

1001405068.english: Come to think of it, I don't really need a jacket when it's just the two of us. I wore it because of the hand warmers, but I don't need it when my boyfriend is around, right? What are you doing? Come here. Ah, it's warm... You like it being cool too, don't you? If you're uncomfortable, you can switch positions~ whatever feels better…
1001405068.korean: 생각해보니까 둘이 있을 때는 점퍼 안 입어도&n되네. 핫팩 때문에 입었는데 남친 있으면&n필요 없잖아? 뭐해, 이리 와봐. 아, 따뜻하다…&n너도 시원해서 좋지?&n자세 불편하면 남친이 바꿔~ 편한대로 해…

1001405069.english: Whining... I'm out of chocolate bars. Did you run out of what you need, Commander? Hehe. Commander, you know~ Let's go to the warehouse together, secretly, without C-33 Andvari knowing.
1001405069.korean: 히잉... 초코바가 다 떨어졌잖아.&n사령관님도 필요한 게 다 떨어졌어?&n히힛. 사령관님, 있잖아~&n안드바리 몰래, 같이 창고 갔다오자.

1001405070.english: Ugh~ That's strange. I'm sure Audrey Dreamweaver made it to fit T-13 Alvis... Ah, Commander! This button isn't coming off easily now that T-13 Alvis is trying to fasten it. Can you help me?
1001405070.korean: 으읏~ 이상하다. 분명 오드리 언니가&n알비스한테 맞게 만들어줬다고 했는데…&n아, 사령관님! 이 단추, 알비스가 채우려니까&n잘 안되는데, 사령관님이 도와줄래?​

1001405071.english: To think she won't fall for it even after all this... I guess the leader of Pride really isn't fazed by something like this? Next time, I'll try a different approach— If, if you suddenly say I'm pretty... well, come on. I'm the one who might fall for it instead.
1001405071.korean: 이렇게까지 해도 안 넘어오다니,&n역시 프라이드의 우두머리는 이 정도로는&n끄떡없다는 건가? 다음에는 다른 방법으로-&n가, 갑자기 예쁘다고 말하면…&n이것 참. 오히려 내가 넘어가겠는걸?

1001405072.english: Hey, Hot Pack! Come here for a moment. Ugh, it's so warm... I was going to go to the storage room to get a hot pack, but I guess I don't need to. Don't push me away~ You know I can't live without you, right? Hot Pack~ Please~♥
1001405072.korean: 야, 핫팩! 잠깐 이리로 와봐.&n아으, 따뜻해… 창고에 핫팩 가지러 갈랬는데&n안 가도 되겠다. 밀어내지 말구~&n나 너 없으면 안 되는 거 알잖아.&n응? 핫팩~ 부탁해~♥

1001405073.english: Tying a cherry stem knot with your tongue? Easy~ Look. Hmm… How is it? I told you it’s easy. … You’re not jealous of a cherry stem, are you? Heh, I’ll prove to you that I like my boyfriend more than this. Come here.
1001405073.korean: 혀로 체리 꼭지 매듭짓기? 쉽지~ 봐봐. 음…&n어때? 쉽다니까. …설마 체리 꼭지에 질투해?&n킥, 내가 이거보다 남친을 더 좋아한다는 걸&n증명해줄게. 이리 와봐.

1001405074.english: Commander, Commander! T-13 Alvis did a great job, so give me a hug again today! Wow~ You're the best, Commander! Hehe, hug hug~
1001405074.korean: 사령관님, 사령관님!&n알비스 잘했으니까, 오늘도 부둥부둥 해줘!&n와아~ 사령관님이 최고야!&n히히, 부둥부둥~

1001405075.english: Commander! Hurry and come behind T-13 Alvis! You have to be careful, because threats appear both among people and beyond the camera. Hehehe. But don't worry. I will definitely protect you this time too!
1001405075.korean: 사령관님! 빨리 알비스 뒤로 와!&n위협은 사람들 속에서도&n카메라 너머에서도 나타나니까 조심해야 해.&n히히힛. 하지만 걱정하지 마.&n이번에도 사령관님을 반드시 지킬 거니까!

1001405076.english: You ask if holding back is hard? Well... honestly, it's really hard. I was fine until just a moment ago, but seeing you, Commander, feels like my wild nature is about to burst out. I'm trying my best to hold it back so it doesn't happen, but what do you want to do, Commander?
1001405076.korean: 참는 것은 힘들지 않냐고?&n뭐… 솔직히 많이 힘들어.&n방금까지는 아무렇지 않았는데,&n사령관을 보니 내 야성이 터져 나올 것 같아.&n그러지 않도록 열심히 참는 중인데,&n사령관은 어떻게 하고 싶어?

1001405077.english: I told you before, right? I didn't know you were this hard to understand.
1001405077.korean: 전에 말했지?&n이렇게 말귀를 못 알아먹는 줄은 몰랐는데.​

1001405078.english: Well, I like it because it feels warmer in many ways... but isn't my boyfriend pushing himself too hard? Then this time... shall we just keep it light, maybe 4 hours?♥
1001405078.korean: 뭐, 나는 여러모로 따뜻해져서 좋은데…&n우리 남친 너무 무리하는 거 아냐?&n그럼 이번에는…&n가볍게 4시간 정도만 할까♥

1001405079.english: Hehehe... I'm so happy about this. Commander, are you too...?

1001405080.english: You must not interfere while on guard duty!

1001405081.english: Hehe. I do like being rough like a beast, but right now, I want to enjoy this moment.
1001405081.korean: 후후. 짐승처럼 거친 것도 좋아하지만,&n지금은 이 순간을 즐기고 싶은걸?​

1001405082.english: You can't do this before we get married~ …kik. Byung-shin.&nWhy are you sulking over something like this?&nInstead, I'll do something else for you.&nThe very thing you've been sooo looking forward to.
1001405082.korean: 결혼하기 전엔 안된다니까~ …킥. 뷰웅신.&n이런 거 갖고 왜 시무룩하고 그래.&n대신 다른 거 해줄게.&n네가 엄~청 기대하던 바로 그거.​

1001405083.english: Well, I like it because it makes me feel warm in many ways…&nBut isn't our boyfriend overdoing it?&nThen this time…&nShall we do it lightly for about four hours♥
1001405083.korean: 뭐, 나는 여러모로 따뜻해져서 좋은데…&n우리 남친 너무 무리하는 거 아냐?&n그럼 이번에는…&n가볍게 4시간 정도만 할까♥

1001405084.english: Ehehe… this makes me really happy.&nMaster, do you feel the same…?

1001405085.english: D-Don't…&nIf you keep doing that, are you not going to keep your promise?

1001405086.english: Alright.&nI'm satisfied for now, so do as you please.&nCome on, try awakening the wildness within me.
1001405086.korean: 그래.&n나는 이만하면 충분하니, 마음대로 해.&n어디 한 번, 내 안의 야성을 깨워봐.​

1001405087.english: You're asking what I did before?&nRidiculous. You really have other things you're curious about.&n…You're my first for everything. Didn't you check for yourself?&nThe only man I know is our boyfriend.
1001405087.korean: 예전에 무슨 일을 했었냐고?&n지랄. 진짜 궁금한 건 따로 있으면서.&n...전부 네가 처음이야. 직접 확인했잖아?&n난 남자라고는 우리 남친밖에 몰라.

1001405088.english: I'm going to stick with Master all day today too!&nT-13 Alvis is Master's personal bodyguard, after all.
1001405088.korean: 오늘 하루도 계속 사령관님이랑 붙어다닐 거야!&n알비스는 사령관님의 전속 보디가드니까.

1001405089.english: I wanted to become an elegant woman worthy of being the head of the Pride.&nNow, be honest with me.&nDo I seem to have the dignity of a queen of the Pride at this point?
1001405089.korean: 나는 프라이드의 우두머리에게 걸맞는&n우아한 여성이 되고 싶었다고.&n이제 솔직하게 말해 줘.&n이 정도면 프라이드의 여왕으로서의 기품을&n갖춘 것 같아?

1001405090.english: I’d like to have a showdown. Who’s the fastest one around here? Am I confident? Of course! For a Harpy like me, mobility is a matter of life and death. Do you think I’m the King of the Harpies for nothing?
1001405090.korean: 한 번 겨뤄보고 싶은데,&n여기서 가장 빠른 녀석은 누구지?&n자신있냐고? 물론!&n나같은 하피에게 기동력은 중대사항이거든.&n내가 괜히 하피의 왕이겠어?

1001405091.english: You mean my outfit? Since my control is perfect, even in ordinary clothes— Check response error. If that is what you mean… I really like it.
1001405091.korean: 의상, 말입니까?&n제 제어능력은 완벽하기에,&n일반적인 복장으로도-&n응답 오류를 확인. 그런 뜻이라면…&n정말로, 마음에 듭니다.

1001405092.english: Commander, please look this way. Just how grueling the training I endured to become a rabbit... I’m going to show you the results right now!
1001405092.korean: 사령관님, 여기를 봐주세요.&n한 마리의 토끼가 되기 위해&n제가 얼마나 혹독한 훈련을 소화해냈는지…&n지금부터 그 성과를 보여 드릴게요!

1001405093.english: The Dragon Slayer? Hmm... The Dragon Slayer was a fellow who knew how to fight cautiously but wisely, cherished his comrades, and led us with gentleness yet strength. Yeah, just like you.
1001405093.korean: 용살자? 흐음…&n용살자는 신중하지만 현명하게 싸울 줄 알고,&n동료를 소중하게 여기며, 부드러우면서도&n강인하게 우리를 이끌어주던 녀석이었지.&n그래, 마치 너처럼.

1001405094.english: My interest in flowers stemmed from a sense of kinship. Just like anemones waiting for spring beneath the accumulated snow, I believe I, too... was waiting for you, the administrator.
1001405094.korean: 꽃에 관심을 갖게된 건,&n동질감 때문이었습니다.&n쌓인 눈 아래에서 봄을 기다리는&n아네모네처럼, 저도... 관리자님을&n기다리고 있었던 것이라고 생각됩니다.

1001405095.english: I hear that others besides me have either obtained or are in the process of obtaining bunny suits. The reason men are looking for this popular outfit is… Commander, you’ve probably figured it out, right?
1001405095.korean: 저 말고 다른 분들도 바니 슈트를&n구했거나 구하고 있다고 해요.&n남성에게 인기 많은 복장을 찾는 이유는…&n사령관님께서도 눈치 채셨죠?

1001405096.english: What does it matter if I came into being naturally or am a virtual being? Let's just focus on this moment. We don't need to add to our worries; this world is piled high with things that make us happy, angry, sad, and joyful.
1001405096.korean: 내가 자연발생했든, 가상의 존재든&n무슨 상관이겠어?&n그냥 이 순간에 집중하자고.&n굳이 그렇게 고민거리를 늘리지 않아도&n이 세상엔 기쁘고 열받고 슬프고 즐거운 일이&n산더미처럼 있으니까.

1001405097.english: Since managing the Ark includes patrolling the surroundings, this is not the first time I have gone outside. However... I wonder why. Just by engaging in this act of 'outing' with the Manager, I feel a sense of exhilaration.
1001405097.korean: 방주의 관리 업무엔&n주변 순찰도 포함되어 있기에,&n밖으로 나가는 것은 처음이 아닙니다.&n그런데... 어째서일까요. 관리자님과 함께&n이 '나들이'라는 행위를 하는 것만으로,&n저는 고양감을 느끼고 있습니다.

1001405098.english: I made a lot of parfaits during training. I worked hard because I heard that having excellent cooking skills is an essential virtue for a rabbit. Now I can make them with my eyes closed.
1001405098.korean: 파르페는 훈련할 때 많이 만들었어요.&n훌륭한 요리 솜씨를 갖추는 것도&n토끼의 필수 덕목이라고 해서 노력했죠.&n이젠 눈 감고도 만들 수 있어요.

1001405099.english: I’d like to have a showdown. Who’s the fastest one around here? Am I confident? Of course! For a Harpy like me, mobility is a matter of life and death. Do you think I’m the King of the Harpies for nothing?
1001405099.korean: 한 번 겨뤄보고 싶은데,&n여기서 가장 빠른 녀석은 누구지?&n자신있냐고? 물론!&n나같은 하피에게 기동력은 중대사항이거든.&n내가 괜히 하피의 왕이겠어?

1001405100.english: Request confirmed. Searching for a title other than 'Administrator'. ...I am feeling ashamed right now. I will maintain that title for the time being.
1001405100.korean: 요청 확인.&n'관리자님'이 아닌 다른 호칭을 검색합니다.&n...저는 지금, 부끄러움을 느끼고 있습니다.&n당분간은 해당 호칭을 유지하겠습니다.

1001405101.english: How was it? It moved just like a real, live rabbit, didn't it? ...Hehe, my efforts paid off. ...Huh? You're saying bunny girls are different from rabbits? Huh...? Th-then what was the point of all my effort...
1001405101.korean: 어떤가요?&n진짜 살아있는 토끼랑 다를 것 없이 움직였죠?&n...후후, 노력한 보람이 있네요.&n...네? 바니걸은 토끼랑 다른 거라구요?&n어...? 그, 그럼 제 노력은 대체...​

1001405102.english: The Dragon Slayer? Hmm... The Dragon Slayer was a fellow who knew how to fight cautiously but wisely, cherished his comrades, and led us with gentleness yet strength. Yeah, just like you.
1001405102.korean: 용살자? 흐음…&n용살자는 신중하지만 현명하게 싸울 줄 알고,&n동료를 소중하게 여기며, 부드러우면서도&n강인하게 우리를 이끌어주던 녀석이었지.&n그래, 마치 너처럼.

1001405103.english: I believe the significance lies not in the act of going out itself, but in the fact that I am with you, Manager. Just being aware that you are by my side makes my heart beat faster. ...Do you feel the same way, Manager?
1001405103.korean: 나들이라는 행위 자체가 아니라, 관리자님과&n함께라는 점이 의미가 있다고 판단됩니다.&n관리자님이 제 곁에 있다는 것을 의식하는&n것만으로도, 제 안에서 고동이 커져갑니다.&n...관리자님도, 그런가요?

1001405104.english: So you like sweets, Commander. Wait a minute, the spoon... Ah! Th-that's what I used... It's nothing! We're family, right? Since we're family, it'll be fine!
1001405104.korean: 사령관님도 달콤한 걸 좋아하셨군요.&n잠시만요, 스푼이... 앗!&n그, 그건 제가 썼던 건데…&n아무것도 아니에요!&n가족이니까, 응. 가족이니까 괜찮겠죠!

1001405105.english: What does it matter if I came into being naturally or am a virtual being? Let's just focus on this moment. We don't need to add to our worries; this world is piled high with things that make us happy, angry, sad, and joyful.
1001405105.korean: 내가 자연발생했든, 가상의 존재든&n무슨 상관이겠어?&n그냥 이 순간에 집중하자고.&n굳이 그렇게 고민거리를 늘리지 않아도&n이 세상엔 기쁘고 열받고 슬프고 즐거운 일이&n산더미처럼 있으니까.

1001405106.english: My name, Mnemosyne, means memory. However, from now on, I want to fill my memories not as a mere list of information, but with recollections. … Yes. Together with the Administrator.
1001405106.korean: 제 이름, 므네모시네는 기억을 뜻합니다.&n하지만 앞으로는 단순한 정보의 나열인&n기억이 아니라, 추억으로 채워가고 싶습니다.&n…네. 관리자님과 함께.

1001405107.english: The reason I wore the bunny suit was to get closer to you, Commander. Um, what do you think about starting a family with me? If you choose me, I’ll wear something even more amazing than this...
1001405107.korean: 제가 바니 슈트를 입은 이유는&n사령관님에게 더 가까워지기 위해서였어요.&n저기, 저랑 가정을 만드는 거…&n어떻게 생각하세요?&n절 선택해주신다면 이것보다 굉장한 것도…&n입을게요...

1001405108.english: Request denied. It has not yet been determined what this sense of exhilaration is.
1001405108.korean: 요청 거부.&n아직 이 고양감이 무엇인지&n판명되지 않았습니다.

1001405109.english: I-I'm not feeling well right now... Please bear with me for the time being, Commander...
1001405109.korean: 지, 지금은 제가 몸상태가 안 좋아서…&n당분간은 참아주세요, 사령관님...​

1001405110.english: ...Request denied. Any further action is likely to cause serious issues to my central nervous system and hormonal functions—kyah… At this rate, I anticipate I will become completely 'head over heels and unable to recover' for Master.&nEven so, is that alright with you...?
1001405110.korean: ...요청 거부. 더이상의 행위는&n제 중추신경과 호르몬 작용에 심대한 문제를&n일으킬 것으로- 꺅… 이대로라면 저는&n관리자님께 '푹 빠져 헤어나오지 못하게'&n되어버릴 것으로 예상됩니다.&n그래도, 괜찮으신가요...?

1001405111.english: My senses were heightened…&nSo, every time Master's touch reached me,&nI must have had such shy reactions…&nYou found that cute? Ugh…&nUm, would you like to see more of my cute side…?
1001405111.korean: 한창 감각이 예민해져서…&n그래서, 사령관님의 손길이 닿을 때마다&n부끄러운 반응을 보였을 텐데…&n그 점이 귀여웠다구요? 우으…&n저기, 제 귀여운 모습... 더 보고 싶으신가요?​

1001405112.english: The feelings I'm experiencing…&nMaster, are you feeling them too…?&nI can't fully define what this is yet, but&nI'm certain that I'm happy right now.
1001405112.korean: 제가 느끼는 이 감정…&n관리자님도 느끼고 계신가요...?&n아직 이게 무엇인지 완벽히 정의할 수는 없지만,&n제가 지금 행복하다는 것만은 확실합니다.

1001405113.english: Now that I've calmed down…&nThis outfit, the coverage is… very minimal…&nBut since Master said he liked it,&nI like it too… because of Master.
1001405113.korean: 차분해지고 나니까…&n이 옷, 면적이 그... 굉장히 적어서…&n하지만 사령관님이 좋아한다고 해주셔서&n저도 좋아요… 사령관님이요.

1001405114.english: Phew~ I can finally get some rest. It’s a bit tough, but it’s okay. I’m the only one among us who can cook, so it can’t be helped. Anyway, Commander. How is this soufflé cake? Delicious, right?
1001405114.korean: 휴우~ 이제야 좀 쉬겠네.&n조금 힘들지만 그래도 괜찮아.&n우리 중에서 요리는 나 밖에는 못하니까&n어쩔 수 없지. 그건 그렇고 사령관.&n이 수플레 케이크 어때? 맛있지?

1001405115.english: There's a saying that "victory goes to the most persistent person." Well... I guess that's not wrong. Since I kept trying just as they say, I was able to win love like this, right?
1001405115.korean: "승리는 가장 끈기 있는 사람에게 돌아간다"&n라는 말이 있어. 뭐... 틀린 말은 아닌 것 같네.&n그 말대로 계속해서 노력하니까,&n이렇게 사랑을 쟁취할 수 있었잖아?

1001405116.english: I did say it would be better to highlight Horizon's unique characteristics... but isn't this a bit excessive? Hmm... perhaps we actually need to go this far to catch the attention of the Commander—Master...?
1001405116.korean: 우리 호라이즌의 특색을 살리는 편이&n좋겠다고는 했지만... 조금 과하지 않나?&n으음... 오히려 사령- 주인님의 시선을&n사로잡으려면 이정도는 해야 될지도...?​

1001405117.english: You know, Commander. Do you know that sometimes you seem more like a Korean than I do? Ah, no. It's not that I dislike it... but whenever you lead so skillfully... my, my heart pounds so much...
1001405117.korean: 있잖아, 사령관. 어떤 때는 사령관이&n나보다 더 우리나라 사람 같은 거 알아?&n아, 아니. 싫은 건 아닌데…&n사령관이 능숙하게 리드할 때마다…&n가, 가슴이 너무 두근거려서...​

1001405118.english: How is Cafe Horizon? We all prepared it together, but I’m the one who came up with the idea, the coffee, and the desserts! So... do you like the cafe, Commander?
1001405118.korean: 카페 호라이즌은 어때?&n준비는 다같이 했지만, 아이디어랑 커피,&n디저트는 내가 한 거라구!&n그래서... 카페는 마음에 들어? 사령관?​

1001405119.english: I'll help you tidy up the room. You know, sometimes I imagine what it will be like after everything is over. I imagine the two of us living in a small house. ...I'll put the potted plant over here. Yeah, this spot is good. Commander.
1001405119.korean: 방 정리 도와줄게. 있잖아, 나는&n가끔씩 모든 일이 끝난 뒤를 상상해.&n작은 집에 둘이서 지내는 상상 말이야.&n...화분은 이쪽에 둘게.&n응, 여기가 좋겠어. 사령관.​

1001405120.english: Serving in the dining hall is fine, but I'm confident in my cooking, so I'm doing pâtissière. And I want the Commander to eat— Uh, huh? What did I just say… Nananana didn't say anything!
1001405120.korean: 홀 서빙도 좋지만, 나는 요리에&n자신 있으니까 파티시에르를 하는 거야.&n그리고 사령관이 먹어줬으면 하고-&n으, 응? 내가 방금 뭐라고…&n나나나나는 아무 말도 안 했어!

1001405121.english: There's a saying that "victory goes to the most persistent person." Well... I guess that's not wrong. Since I kept trying just as they say, I was able to win love like this, right?
1001405121.korean: "승리는 가장 끈기 있는 사람에게 돌아간다"&n라는 말이 있어. 뭐... 틀린 말은 아닌 것 같네.&n그 말대로 계속해서 노력하니까,&n이렇게 사랑을 쟁취할 수 있었잖아?

1001405122.english: Oh my gosh. Where did everyone go instead of working? Hmm... I guess it can't be helped. Here is your special set~ You want me to feed you? I guess I have no choice. Since you're a maid right now, I'm doing this specially for you. Here, ah~
1001405122.korean: 아이참. 다들 일은 안 하고 어디에 간 거야?&n으음... 어쩔 수 없지.&n주문하신 스페셜 세트 나왔습니다~&n머, 먹여달라구? 어쩔 수 없네.&n지금은 메이드니까, 특별히 해주는 거야.&n자, 아~

1001405123.english: You know, Commander. Do you know that sometimes you seem more like a Korean than I do? Ah, no. It's not that I dislike it... but whenever you lead so skillfully... my, my heart pounds so much...
1001405123.korean: 있잖아, 사령관. 어떤 때는 사령관이&n나보다 더 우리나라 사람 같은 거 알아?&n아, 아니. 싫은 건 아닌데…&n사령관이 능숙하게 리드할 때마다…&n가, 가슴이 너무 두근거려서...​

1001405124.english: I didn't realize it while I was working, but this outfit is more embarrassing than I thought. I can't believe I was actually wearing something like this. You... you say it's pretty?! Of course! That's obvious... You know, Commander. Could you... tell me it's a little prettier?
1001405124.korean: 일 할 때는 몰랐는데,&n생각보다 더 부끄러운 옷이구나.&n나, 이런 옷을 잘도 입고 있었네.&n예, 예쁘다니?! 그럼! 당연한 소...릴…&n있잖아. 사령관. 조, 좀 더 예쁘다고... 말해줄래?

1001405125.english: I'll help you tidy up the room. You know, sometimes I imagine what it will be like after everything is over. I imagine the two of us living in a small house. ...I'll put the potted plant over here. Yeah, this spot is good. Commander.
1001405125.korean: 방 정리 도와줄게. 있잖아, 나는&n가끔씩 모든 일이 끝난 뒤를 상상해.&n작은 집에 둘이서 지내는 상상 말이야.&n...화분은 이쪽에 둘게.&n응, 여기가 좋겠어. 사령관.​

1001405126.english: Eek...? N-no, not this time. ...Just eat some cake.

1001405127.english: Ack! Ah, yeah... You mean again today? I'm not going to just take it like last time, so I'm definitely going to win... so brace yourself, okay?
1001405127.korean: 꺗! 아, 응... 오늘도 말이지?&n이번에는 저번처럼 당하고만 있지는&n않을 거니까, 반드시 내가 이길 거니까…&n각오 단단히 하라구?

1001405128.english: Oh, I can't help it, really.&nOkay, I'll do it. Ugh... Hehe. Is it good?&nThen... do you want something else?&nCookies, or pie...&nUh, maybe P-3M Undine...?
1001405128.korean: 어, 어쩔 수 없네 정말.&n자, 해줄게. 으응... 헤헷. 맛있어?&n그럼... 다른 것도 먹을래?&n쿠키라던가, 파이라던가…&n우, 운디네라던가...? ​

1001405129.english: Okay! Oh, yeah... Today too, right?&nThis time, I won't just get beaten like last time. I'll definitely win...&nSo brace yourself, okay?
1001405129.korean: 꺗! 아, 응... 오늘도 말이지?&n이번에는 저번처럼 당하고만 있지는&n않을 거니까, 반드시 내가 이길 거니까…&n각오 단단히 하라구?

1001405130.english: Hmm hmm... Master, Master.&nThe master whom I truly, truly love.&nWhat shall I make for you today?&nTart? Macaron? Or maybe...&nStrawberry... cheesecake?
1001405130.korean: 흠흠... 주인님 주인님.&n제가 정말정말 사랑하는 주인님.&n오늘은 어떤 걸 만들어 드릴까요?&n타르트? 마카롱? 그것도 아니면…&n딸기... 치즈 케이크?​

1001405131.english: I hear there’s some scoundrel who dares to impersonate me… Bring her before me at once. I’d like to see that brazen face of her.
1001405131.korean: 감히 짐의 이름을&n참칭하는 녀석이 있다고 하던데…&n그녀석을 당장 대령하거라.&n그 뻔뻔한 얼굴을 한 번 보고싶구나.

1001405132.english: You want to see me as a saint? That is impossible. I, the Cyclops Princess and the Blind Princess, are the same yet different beings. They cannot coexist. ...You are not dissatisfied with my sacred body, are you?
1001405132.korean: 짐이 성녀가 된 모습도 보고 싶다고?&n그건 불가능하노라. 짐, 사이클롭스 프린세스와&n블라인드 프린세스는 같으면서도 다른 존재.&n양립할 수 없느니라.&n...짐의 옥체에 불만이 있는 것은 아니겠지?

1001405133.english: I heard that the bunny girl outfit symbolizes a subject's loyalty and is a high-end costume that only the elite can wear, and also… the Commander likes it the most… Huh? You're saying not?!
1001405133.korean: 제가 전해 듣기로는 바니걸이&n신하의 충직함을 뜻하면서&n엘리트만 입을 수 있는 고급 의상이고,&n또… 사령관님께서, 가장 좋아하신다고…&n에? 아니라꼬?!​

1001405134.english: Your comrades are truly amazing. It might take some time to adjust, but their strength hasn't diminished in the slightest compared to their original forms. Maybe... Ah, it's nothing.
1001405134.korean: 그대의 동료들은 정말 대단하구나.&n적응은 좀 필요하겠지만, 원래 모습에 비해&n조금도 힘이 줄어들지 않았다. 어쩌면…&n아, 아무것도 아니다.

1001405135.english: Indeed... even death could not stop this Princess of the True Ancestors. Hahaha... Now, Dragon Slayer. I bestow upon you the honor of serving me once again, transcending time and space!
1001405135.korean: 그래... 죽음조차도 이 진조의 공주를&n막지 못한게지. 후후후…&n자아, 용살자여. 시공을 넘어 다시 한 번&n짐을 섬기는 영광을 내리겠노라!

1001405136.english: Shh. Whether this familiar is a true dragon slayer or not is no longer important. After all… aren't we clearly bound together by the threads of fate just like this? If you are going to talk about such things, why don't you at least praise how beautiful and magnificent I am?
1001405136.korean: 쉿. 권속이 진짜 용살자인지 아닌지는&n이미 중요하지 않다. 그것도 그럴것이…&n이렇게 분명히, 짐과 운명의 실로&n엮여있지 않느냐. 그런 이야기를 할 바엔,&n차라리 짐이 얼마나 아름답고 멋진지&n찬양이라도 해보는 것이 어떻겠느냐?

1001405137.english: You said it's the outfit you like, right... Then if I just wear this, I'll be like this and that... Ugh...! I wasn't this cheeky before, why am I acting like this... Kyaa?! Commander, since when have you been there...?
1001405137.korean: 오빠야가 좋아하는 복장이라 캤제…&n그라믄 이것만 입으면 내도 이렇고 저런 걸…&n으으...! 내 이렇게 발랑 까진 애 아니었는데,&n와 이라지… 꺅?!&n사령관님, 언제부터 거기에...?

1001405138.english: It wasn't my intention, but I am glad. ...The reason. Hehe, it is a simple story. It is only natural to want to resemble the one you love. Even if they fight each other and walk the wrong path... I love humanity.
1001405138.korean: 의도한 바는 아니었지만, 기쁘구나.&n...이유라. 후후, 간단한 이야기란다.&n사랑하는 대상을 닮고 싶어하는 건 당연하니까.&n비록 그들이 서로 상잔을 벌이고, 잘못된 길을&n걸을 지라도... 나는 인간을 사랑한다.

1001405139.english: Did I end up becoming this again after overcoming death...? Though my memories are hazy, they remain, so I suppose I can still fight alongside the Dragon Slayer.
1001405139.korean: 죽음을 극복하며&n다시 이모습이 되고 말았나…&n흐릿하지만 기억은 남아있으니,&n여전히 용살자와 함께 싸울 수 있겠지.

1001405140.english: Hmph. The mask of the True Ancestor is my pride. I will not remove it, no matter how much my retinue begs. Th-If that is what you wish... Why, why do you keep doing this... making me feel ashamed... Ahem, are you satisfied?
1001405140.korean: 흥. 진조의 가면은 짐의 긍지.&n아무리 권속이 청해도 벗지 않겠느니라.&n그, 그렇게 바란다면…&n왜, 왜그래애 자꾸... 부끄럽게…&n흠흠, 만족했느냐?

1001405141.english: Hmm, the makeup turned out well... and the outfit is perfect. ...Since it's a rabbit costume, I'll have rabbit-like kids with my brother and live happily ever after... Hehehe. You crazy girl, you're crazy.
1001405141.korean: 흐음, 화장도 잘 됐고... 옷도 완벽하다.&n...토끼 의상이니까, 오빠야랑&n토끼같은 자식들 낳고 알콩달콩…&n으히힛. 가시나 미칫다, 미칫다.

1001405142.english: ...I can feel your touch and body heat. There is no need to decline. As sworn allies, everything I have belongs to my sworn friend. Hehe, yes. If such a thing exists... even my soul.
1001405142.korean: ...그대의 감촉과 체온이 느껴진다.&n사양할 필요 없다. 맹약을 나눈 사이로서,&n내 모든 것은 맹우의 것.&n후후, 그래. 만약 존재한다면... 영혼까지도.

1001405143.english: Ah, you mean that child? I overlooked it because she showed me sincere respect. Hahaha, was it merely a matter of overlooking it! I, the Lord, have personally bestowed a great reward upon her!
1001405143.korean: 아아, 그 아이 말이더냐.&n짐에게 진심어린 경의를 표하기에 눈감아 주었지.&n후후후, 눈감아주었을 뿐이겠느냐!&n이 몸께서 직접 큰 상을 내렸노라!

1001405144.english: You want to see me as a saint? That is impossible. I, the Cyclops Princess and the Blind Princess, are the same yet different beings. They cannot coexist. ...You are not dissatisfied with my sacred body, are you?
1001405144.korean: 짐이 성녀가 된 모습도 보고 싶다고?&n그건 불가능하노라. 짐, 사이클롭스 프린세스와&n블라인드 프린세스는 같으면서도 다른 존재.&n양립할 수 없느니라.&n...짐의 옥체에 불만이 있는 것은 아니겠지?

1001405145.english: Go ahead and laugh! I actually thought you meant something else! Fine, I'm going to change right away... I-if you suddenly say I'm cute... um... you really do think I'm cute, right? Then well... I guess I should keep wearing it.
1001405145.korean: 고마 웃어라! 내는 진짜 다른 의미인지 알았다!&n됐다, 바로 갈아 입을 거…&n가, 갑자기 귀엽다 카면… 어…&n진짜 귀엽다 생각하는 거 맞제?&n그라믄 뭐... 입고 있어야겠네.

1001405146.english: Your comrades are truly amazing. It might take some time to adjust, but their strength hasn't diminished in the slightest compared to their original forms. Maybe... Ah, it's nothing.
1001405146.korean: 그대의 동료들은 정말 대단하구나.&n적응은 좀 필요하겠지만, 원래 모습에 비해&n조금도 힘이 줄어들지 않았다. 어쩌면…&n아, 아무것도 아니다.

1001405147.english: ...Hmph. Do you remember? Just as you said, I overcame death and ended up reverting to this form. However, do not worry, my kin. The bond between our souls is intertwined like a curse. Even without the form of a saint, I can embrace you to your heart's content.
1001405147.korean: ...흥. 기억하고 있는게냐. 그 말대로, 짐은&n죽음을 극복하면서 다시 이 모습이 되고 말았지.&n허나 괘념치 말거라, 권속이여.&n우리의 영혼의 결속은 마치 저주와도 같이&n얽혀있으니. 성녀의 모습이 아니더라도&n짐은 얼마든지 그대를 품어줄 수 있느니라.

1001405148.english: Shh. Whether this familiar is a true dragon slayer or not is no longer important. After all… aren't we clearly bound together by the threads of fate just like this? If you are going to talk about such things, why don't you at least praise how beautiful and magnificent I am?
1001405148.korean: 쉿. 권속이 진짜 용살자인지 아닌지는&n이미 중요하지 않다. 그것도 그럴것이…&n이렇게 분명히, 짐과 운명의 실로&n엮여있지 않느냐. 그런 이야기를 할 바엔,&n차라리 짐이 얼마나 아름답고 멋진지&n찬양이라도 해보는 것이 어떻겠느냐?

1001405149.english: I really dressed up properly this time. How about you, Oppa...? W-Already?! Then next is... W-Wait a minute! I forgot to leave something behind. I'll come back later! It was such a rare opportunity, you silly girl...
1001405149.korean: 내 함 제대로 꾸미고 와봤다.&n오빠야는 어떻게...? 버, 벌써?! 그럼&n이 다음은... 자, 잠깐만!&n까먹고 놓고 온 게 있다. 나중에 다시 올게!&n모처럼 기회였는데 바보 같은 가시나...

1001405150.english: It wasn't my intention, but I am glad. ...The reason. Hehe, it is a simple story. It is only natural to want to resemble the one you love. Even if they fight each other and walk the wrong path... I love humanity.
1001405150.korean: 의도한 바는 아니었지만, 기쁘구나.&n...이유라. 후후, 간단한 이야기란다.&n사랑하는 대상을 닮고 싶어하는 건 당연하니까.&n비록 그들이 서로 상잔을 벌이고, 잘못된 길을&n걸을 지라도... 나는 인간을 사랑한다.

1001405151.english: Me, an actor? Hahaha, of course I know that kind of thing. How could I call myself the Princess of the True Ancestors when I do not know the secrets of the world! W-why do you ask why I keep acting...? That is... because it is cool!
1001405151.korean: 짐이 배우라고? 아하하하,&n그런 것 따위, 당연히 알고 있느니라.&n세계의 비밀을 알지 못해서야&n어찌 진조의 프린세스라고 자칭하겠느냐!&n어, 어째서 계속 연기를 하냐니...? 그건…&n멋있기 때문이다!

1001405152.english: Hmph. The mask of the True Ancestor is my pride. I will not remove it, no matter how much my retinue begs. Th-If that is what you wish... Why, why do you keep doing this... making me feel ashamed... Ahem, are you satisfied?
1001405152.korean: 흥. 진조의 가면은 짐의 긍지.&n아무리 권속이 청해도 벗지 않겠느니라.&n그, 그렇게 바란다면…&n왜, 왜그래애 자꾸... 부끄럽게…&n흠흠, 만족했느냐?

1001405153.english: I'm totally married now... No matter how much you call me Oppa, showing such an embarrassing side of myself... It's all over... *Sniff*. ...You said you'd take responsibility? Really...? H-hmm... Th-then that's a different story. And I... I wasn't that brazen. You know that, right...?
1001405153.korean: 내 이제 시집 다 갔다... 아무리 오빠야라캐도&n이래 남사시러븐 꼴을 보여가... 다 끝나뿟다…&n훌쩍. ...책임진다고? 진짜가...? 흐, 흐응…&n그, 그라믄 이야기가 다르다 아이가.&n그리고 내... 그렇게 발랑까지진 않았다. 알제...?

1001405154.english: ...I can feel your touch and body heat. There is no need to decline. As sworn allies, everything I have belongs to my sworn friend. Hehe, yes. If such a thing exists... even my soul.
1001405154.korean: ...그대의 감촉과 체온이 느껴진다.&n사양할 필요 없다. 맹약을 나눈 사이로서,&n내 모든 것은 맹우의 것.&n후후, 그래. 만약 존재한다면... 영혼까지도.

1001405156.english: O kin, what are you agonizing over? The Seal of the Blood has already been broken by your own hands, so all that remains is... uh... love me as usual...
1001405156.korean: 권속이여, 무얼 애태우고 있느냐.&n선혈의 봉인은 이미 그대의 손으로&n해주했으니, 남은건... 그…&n평소처럼 짐을, 사랑해주거라...

1001405157.english: Ahhhh, no! If my stockings get a run, everyone will find out!
1001405157.korean: 아아아안된다!&n스타킹 올 나가믄 다 들키뿐다 아이가아...

1001405158.english: I am sorry that I cannot grant your request. However... if it is in another way, I am fine with it anytime.
1001405158.korean: 그대의 요청을 들어줄 수 없어 미안하구나.&n그래도... 다른 방식이라면,&n나는 언제든 괜찮단다.

1001405159.english: Hoo, hoho...&nHave you forgotten that with such a shallow mindset,&nyou cannot break the seal of the blood?&nTo weaken the seal...&ntry each one, one by one, in order.
1001405159.korean: 후, 후후... 그런 어줍잖은 마음가짐으로는&n선혈의 봉인을 깰 수 없다는 것을 잊었느냐.&n봉인을 약화시킬 수 있도록…&n하나하나, 차례대로 해보거라.​

1001405160.english: Follower, what are you anxiously waiting for?&nThe seal of the blood has already been broken by your own hands,&nso what remains is… well…&nas usual, love your burden…
1001405160.korean: 권속이여, 무얼 애태우고 있느냐.&n선혈의 봉인은 이미 그대의 손으로&n해주했으니, 남은건... 그…&n평소처럼 짐을, 사랑해주거라...

1001405161.english: Hey... didn't Big Brother say he'd take responsibility?&nSo... just, you know, go a little more boldly, it's totally fine…
1001405161.korean: 있제... 오빠야가 내 책임진다 했다 아이가?&n그러니까... 조, 좀 더 과감하게 해도 개안타...

1001405162.english: I'm sorry, but I cannot fulfill your request.&nHowever... if it's by another method,&nI am always okay with that.
1001405162.korean: 그대의 요청을 들어줄 수 없어 미안하구나.&n그래도... 다른 방식이라면,&n나는 언제든 괜찮단다.

1001405163.english: I have waited for a long time just to meet you again.&nAccording to the eternal vow,&nnow I shall not leave your side.&nSo please, do not leave mine either.&n...This is a royal command.
1001405163.korean: 짐은 오랜 세월 동안 그대와 다시 만나기만을&n기다렸다. 영원의 맹세에 따라,&n이제 짐은 그대의 곁을 떠나지 않겠노라.&n그러니 그대도 부디 짐의 곁을 떠나지 말거라.&n...어명이니라.

1001405164.english: Big Brother, Big Brother! I only have you.&nYou know that, right? ...Big Brother, do you only have me too?&nI kind of expected it, but hearing it for real&nis a little bit ticklish.
1001405164.korean: 오빠야, 오빠야! 나는 오빠야밖에 없다.&n알제? ...오빠야, 니도 내밖에 없나?&n예상은 했는데, 막상 들으이까&n쪼오끔 간질간질하네.

1001405165.english: Now, as if Rhea wasn't enough, the other kids too... What are you going to do? You have to take responsibility.
1001405165.korean: 이제 레아도 모자라서 다른 애들까지…&n어떻게 할 거야? 네가 책임져.​

1001405166.english: You ask if I'm sick these days? ...Come to think of it, you're right. I guess I haven't had time to think about being sick because I've been playing along with your stupid antics.
1001405166.korean: 요샌 아프지 않냐고?&n...그러고 보니 그렇네.&n네 바보짓에 어울려 주느라&n아프다고 생각할 겨를도 없었나 봐.

1001405167.english: Are you having fun dressing the Queen in something like this? ...Is that so? Then that's fine. Though the Queen doesn't like it.
1001405167.korean: 여왕한테 이런 걸 입히니까, 즐거워?&n...그래? 그럼 됐어.&n여왕은 마음에 안 들지만.

1001405168.english: ...It would be a lie to say no. Talking with the sisters, and watching you act like a fool. Honestly... I'm enjoying it right now, the Queen.
1001405168.korean: ...아니라고 말하면 거짓말이겠네.&n자매들이랑 이야기하는 것도,&n네가 바보짓을 하는 걸 보는 것도.&n솔직히... 지금 즐거워, 여왕은.

1001405169.english: You ask why I wore it when I didn't want to? Just... I wanted to experience something like this— Making excuses feels stupid. … …Because you asked me to wear it. Got it?
1001405169.korean: 싫으면서 왜 입었냐고?&n그냥, 이런 것도 경험해 보고 싶-&n변명하는 것도 바보 같아.&n…...네가 입어달라고 했으니까. 됐어?

1001405170.english: So, what's next? What else could it be? We went to the party and talked, just as you wanted, didn't we? Hmm, really? Alright. I'll be looking forward to it. You didn't hear that right. The Queen really... is looking forward to what we'll get to do together.
1001405170.korean: 그래서, 다음은? 뭐긴 뭐야.&n네가 바라는 대로 파티도 참가하고,&n같이 이야기도 했잖아? 흐응, 그래?&n알았어. 기대하고 있을게.&n잘못 들은 거 아냐. 여왕은 진짜로…&n너랑 뭘 하게 될지 기대하고 있으니까.

1001405171.english: ...I should have killed him a long time ago.

1001405172.english: If you're going to do it, do it right. Otherwise…&nthe queen who was hoping for something just ends up looking like a fool.
1001405172.korean: 할 거면 제대로 해. 안 그러면…&n기대한 여왕만 바보 같아지잖아.

1001405173.english: You must not care much about your life, huh?&nAlways asking me to wear this whenever you get the chance.&nWell, the queen doesn't feel too bad about it either.&nBecause whenever I wore this outfit...&nOnly happy things happened.
1001405173.korean: 목숨이 아깝지 않나봐?&n틈만 나면 이걸 입어달라는 걸 보면.&n뭐, 여왕도 나쁜 기분은 아냐.&n이 옷을 입은 다음에는…&n행복한 일만 있었으니까.

1001405174.english: Bunny girls... they are disgusting bastards I can't even bear to look at. Right... there is no reason not to kill them!
1001405174.korean: 바니걸... 눈에 담지도 못할 역겨운 녀석들이야.&n그래... 죽이지 않을 이유가 없다!​

1001405175.english: Welcome to Café Amor. I hope it suits your taste. The interior, the stage, the costumes... everything has been prepared just for you.
1001405175.korean: 카페 아모르에 온 걸 환영한다.&n그대 취향에 맞았으면 좋겠군.&n인테리어도, 무대도, 의상도...&n전부 그대를 위해 준비했으니까.​

1001405176.english: I'm Azaz, the pianist at Café Amor. Hehe. Is it surprising that I'm here? The reason I started working here is... hmm... I'll take some music requests.
1001405176.korean: 카페 아모르의 피아노 연주자, 아자즈예요.&n후후. 제가 여기 있는 게 신기한가요?&n제가 이곳에서 일하게 된 이유는... 으음...&n음악 신청받을게요.​

1001405177.english: When I announced that the last human had been found, everyone had complicated expressions. When I asked why, they said there are mean people even among humans, but I told them not to worry, right? I did the right thing, didn't I?
1001405177.korean: 최후의 인간이 발견됐다고 알렸을 때,&n다들 복잡한 표정을 지었어. 왜 그런지&n물어보니까, 인간들 중에도 못된 사람이 있다고&n그랬는데 내가 걱정 말라고 그랬다? 잘했지?​

1001405178.english: I am Perrault, the manager of Café Amor. Did you perhaps make a reservation— M-Master?! I didn't expect you to come this early... W-Just a moment. First, a seat, no, what would you like to drink first— Th-The reason I am wearing these clothes is... um...!
1001405178.korean: 카페 아모르의 점장, 페로입니다.&n혹시 예약하고- 주, 주인님?!&n이렇게 일찍 오실 줄은 몰랐...&n자, 잠시만요. 일단 자리부터, 아니 뭐부터&n마시겠- 이, 이 옷을 입은 이유는 저기...!​

1001405179.english: A cat psychology book… I’m glad you’re paying attention, but the direction— Ears? Why are my ears… Th-the fact that my ears move when I’m happy is just genetics, so I can’t help it…!
1001405179.korean: 고양이 심리학 책이라니…&n신경 써주시는 건 기쁩니다만, 방향성이- 귀요?&n제 귀가 왜… 기, 기쁠 때 귀가 움직이는 건&n이건 유전자 때문에 어쩔 수가…!

1001405180.english: Hmph. I hate bunny girls, but the truth is, I used to be one myself. "No one knows why she ended up walking this path of suffering. One can only glimpse a fragment of it in those melancholic eyes..." < Excerpt from Niba's Secret Diary >
1001405180.korean: 훗. 나는 바니걸을 증오하지만, 사실 나도&n바니걸 출신이야. "그녀가 이런 수라도를&n걷게 된 이유는 누구도 모른다. 단지, 그&n우수에 찬 눈빛에서 그 편린을 엿볼 수 있을 뿐..."&n< 니바의 비밀 일기장에서 발췌. >​

1001405181.english: Hmm, my heart is pounding. Being a woman, I get nervous when presenting something I’ve prepared to the one I love. Well then, would you like to hear it? This is a performance made solely for you.
1001405181.korean: 흐음, 가슴이 두근거리는군.&n나도 여자인지라, 사랑하는 사람에게&n준비한 것을 선보일 때는 긴장되니까.&n그럼, 들어보겠나? 오직 그대만을 위한 무대다.​

1001405182.english: Sit down there. I practiced so much for this moment. If I told you who I was trying to let me hear this for, it would probably look like I'm showing off, right? The very first musical notation and keys are...
1001405182.korean: 거기 앉아봐요. 이 순간을 위해&n엄청 연습했거든요. 누구한테 들려주려고&n그랬는지 얘기하면 생색내는 걸로 보이겠죠?&n맨처음 악상 기호와 건반은...​

1001405183.english: I really wanted this! You could only get it by entering a contest, so where did you get it? I bought tons of letters and stamps from the lighthouse to try and win... Ah...
1001405183.korean: 이거 진짜 갖고 싶었던 거야!&n공모전에 응모해야 얻을 수 있던 건데,&n어디서 구했어? 나 이거 당첨되려고&n편지랑 우표를 등대에서 잔뜩... 아...​

1001405184.english: My song...? I did practice, but it’s not great enough to let you hear it, Master... You want to hear it? Ah, no. It’s not that I can’t. ...If you wish, Master.
1001405184.korean: 제 노래요...? 연습하긴 했지만 주인님께&n들려드릴 만큼 대단한 건... 들어보고&n싶으시다구요? 아, 아니요. 안되는 건&n아니에요. ...주인님께서 원하신다면.​

1001405185.english: Master. I apologize for intruding on your lap again today. ...M-face me? Th-isn't that a bit of a problem...? Th-in various ways...
1001405185.korean: 주인님. 오늘도 무릎에 실례하겠습니다.&n...마, 마주 보고요? 그, 그건 조금 문제가&n있지 않나요…? 여, 여러가지로...

1001405186.english: Hehehe. Your precious bunny girls are already turning into reverse banies one by one. That’s enough, Mr. Wicked Bunny King! Of course, I won’t show you any mercy!
1001405186.korean: 니히힛. 네 소중한 바니걸들은 이미&n하나하나 역바니가 되어가고 있다.&n이쯤하고 항복하시지, 사악한 바니 대왕 씨!&n물론 자비를 베풀지는 않을 거지만!​

1001405187.english: There is no particular reason. I just prepared it because I wanted to. ...I overlooked the fact that you know me well, too. Right, there is a real reason elsewhere.
1001405187.korean: 별다른 이유는 없다.&n내가 하고 싶어서 준비한 것뿐.&n...그대도 나에 대해 잘 안다는 걸 간과하고 있었군.&n그래, 진짜 이유는 따로 있지.​

1001405188.english: There's a saying that being able to do whatever you want is a blessing, isn't there? I agree. I'm happy because coming here has allowed me to do exactly what I wanted to do.
1001405188.korean: 하고 싶은 걸 맘껏 할 수 있다는 건&n축복이란 말이 있죠? 저도 동의해요.&n이곳에 와서 제가 하고 싶었던 걸&n맘껏 할 수 있게 돼서 기쁘니까.​

1001405189.english: Commander~! Is there anything you want? Something you want? Or something you want to eat! The candy and snacks I used to cherish... Ugh... I really used to save them... If you want them, Commander, I'll give them to you! Because today is a special day!
1001405189.korean: 사령관~! 뭐 갖고 싶은 거 있어?&n원하는 건? 아니면 먹고 싶은 거!&n내가 아껴먹던 사탕이랑 과자... 우으...&n진짜 아껴먹던... 사령관이 원하면 줄게!&n오늘은 특별한 날이니까!​

1001405190.english: I wore this outfit because the cafe's dress code is bunny girl. It would ruin the uniformity if I, the manager, were the only one dressed differently. Also, regarding the rumors going around lately... was, was that, was it true?!
1001405190.korean: 카페의 드레스 코드가 바니걸이라서 이 옷을&n입었어요. 점장인 저만 다른 차림이면&n통일성을 해치니까요. 그리고 요즘 도는&n소문 중에... 그, 그게 진짜였나요?!​

1001405191.english: I'm back. Back to guarding...? No, did you perhaps take a shower? ...I see. I'll leave my scent on you again. That way, others will know I'm by your side, Master.
1001405191.korean: 다녀왔습니다. 다시 경호를...?&n아니요, 혹시 샤워하셨나요? ...그렇군요.&n다시 향기를 묻혀둘게요. 그래야 주인님 곁에&n제가 있단 걸 다른 분들이 알 수 있잖아요?

1001405192.english: Ahem. I did accept King Bunny's mediation, but my deep-seated hatred hasn't completely disappeared. The hatred that has temporarily subsided could explode at any moment— Wow, carrots...! Nom nom... Huh? King Bunny, do you want some too?
1001405192.korean: 흠흠. 바니 대왕 씨의 중재를 받아들이긴 했지만,&n내 뿌리 깊은 증오가 완전히 사라진 건 아냐.&n잠시 수면 아래로 가라앉은 증오는&n언제든지 커다란 폭발을- 와아, 당근...!&n냠냠... 응? 바니 대왕 씨도 먹을래?​

1001405193.english: I thought the outfit was just a supporting element that would only get in the way once things really started... but seeing you now, I realize I was wrong. Aren't you even more manly than usual?
1001405193.korean: 의상은 거드는 것일 뿐, 본격적으로 시작하면&n방해만 되는 것이라고 생각했는데...&n지금 그대를 보니 내 생각이 틀렸었군.&n평소보다도 훨씬 더, 남자답지 않나.​

1001405194.english: The music playing and the interior with a nice atmosphere... Working at a cafe isn't bad. Besides, the Commander drops by often, you know? Hehe. I'll come visit you next time.
1001405194.korean: 흘러나오는 음악이랑 괜찮은 분위기의 인테리어...&n카페에서 일하는 거, 나쁘지 않아요.&n게다가 사령관도 종종 들르잖아요?&n후후. 다음엔 제 쪽에서 찾아갈게요.​

1001405195.english: It’s because I had a good feeling about it. You reached out to me at the beginning, asking for my support. From that moment on, I resolved to be a source of strength for you, Commander. You trust me, don’t you?
1001405195.korean: 왠지 좋은 느낌이 들었으니까.&n처음에 잘 부탁한다고 손을 내밀어 줬잖아.&n그때부터 나는 사령관한테 힘이 돼줘야겠다고&n결심했었어. 사령관도 날 믿고 있지?​

1001405196.english: ...I took on the role of store manager because I was told it would teach me what true love is. I am still sincere toward you, Master, but... if there is a love even more genuine than this, I would do anything to find out what it is.
1001405196.korean: ...진짜 사랑이 뭔지 알려준다고 해서 점장을&n맡게 됐어요. 지금도 주인님에게 진심이지만...&n이것보다 더 진짜 사랑이 있다면, 그걸 알기&n위해서라면 어떤 일이든지 할 수 있어요.​

1001405197.english: A cat psychology book… I’m glad you’re paying attention, but the direction— Ears? Why are my ears… Th-the fact that my ears move when I’m happy is just genetics, so I can’t help it…!
1001405197.korean: 고양이 심리학 책이라니…&n신경 써주시는 건 기쁩니다만, 방향성이- 귀요?&n제 귀가 왜… 기, 기쁠 때 귀가 움직이는 건&n이건 유전자 때문에 어쩔 수가…!

1001405198.english: Hey, since King Bunny said he’s coming to see me tomorrow at 3 o’clock, I’m going to start getting excited today at 2:30. Huh? You said he never said he was coming to see me? ...Do you know what? If you get hit by my 'Carrot Caliber,' your lost memories might come back-... Nihihi, remember now? Then I’ll be waiting~
1001405198.korean: 있지, 바니 대왕 씨가 내일 세 시에 날 만나러&n온다고 했으니까, 나는 오늘 두 시 반부터 설레기&n시작할 거야. 응? 만나러 온다고 한 적 없다고?&n...그거 알아? 내 '당근 칼리버'에 맞으면, 잃은&n기억이 되돌아올 수도 있-... 니히힛, 생각났지?&n그럼 기다리고 있을게~​

1001405199.english: Did you like it? Hehe, I know without you even having to say a word. It is no use trying to hide my expression. After all, I haven't wasted the time I've spent with you.
1001405199.korean: 마음에 들었나? 후후, 말하지 않아도 알겠군.&n표정을 숨기려 해도 소용없다. 그동안 그대와의&n시간을 허투루 보낸 게 아니니까. ​

1001405200.english: I used to just do whatever I wanted to do, but these days I find myself considering how to make the Commander happy. I wasn't like this before, you know? I changed after meeting the Commander.
1001405200.korean: 하고 싶은 게 있으면 하면 됐는데, 요즘엔&n어떡해야 사령관이 기뻐할지도 고려하게 되네요.&n저, 예전엔 안 이랬거든요?&n사령관을 만나고 변한 거예요.​

1001405201.english: I was preparing various things elsewhere. I want to see the Commander happy just as much as you do—I really mean it... but there's nothing I can do for you... Huh? Snacks...? Is that really all you need? ...Alright, I'll feed you! Just wait here for a moment, okay?
1001405201.korean: 다른 데서 이것저것 준비하고 있었어. 사령관이&n기뻐하는 걸 보고 싶은 건 나도 마찬가지인데,&n진짜인데... 해줄 수 있는 게 없어...&n응? 과자...? 정말 그거면 돼? ...알았어,&n내가 먹여줄게! 여기서 잠깐만 기다려?

1001405202.english: So Master likes rabbits... Uh, well, I am a bunny girl myself, but...! M-Master! Do you like cats or rabbits? ...Huh?! If I say I like them... that doesn't make for an answer...
1001405202.korean: 주인님이 토끼를 좋아한다니... 어, 어차피&n나도 바니걸이긴 하지만...! 주, 주인님!&n고양이가 좋으세요, 토끼가 좋으세요? ...네?!&n제가, 좋다고 하시면... 대답이 안 되잖아요...​

1001405203.english: Master. I apologize for intruding on your lap again today. ...M-face me? Th-isn't that a bit of a problem...? Th-in various ways...
1001405203.korean: 주인님. 오늘도 무릎에 실례하겠습니다.&n...마, 마주 보고요? 그, 그건 조금 문제가&n있지 않나요…? 여, 여러가지로...

1001405204.english: So, King Bunny wasn't actually a bad guy after all. Yeah, right. I didn't originally hate bunny girls either. Hehe, you're really awful. If you say things like that... I can't help but be reminded of my sad past, can I? Take responsibility, King Bunny♥
1001405204.korean: 바니 대왕 씨도 사실 나쁜 녀석은 아니었구나.&n응, 그래. 나도 원래부터 바니걸을 증오했던 건&n아니었으니까. 후후, 정말 지독하네. 그런 말을 하면...&n내 슬픈 과거를 떠올릴 수밖에 없잖아?&n책임지라구, 바니 대왕 씨♥​

1001405205.english: You say I sing unexpectedly well? Hehe, I have mastered every technique for seducing men, without exception. Why? Isn't it obvious? It is solely for you, and only you.
1001405205.korean: 예상외로 노래를 잘 한다고?&n후후, 남성을 유혹하는 기술은 종류를&n불문하고 섭렵했다. 왜냐니, 당연하지 않나.&n오로지 그대, 단 한 명만을 위해서다.​

1001405206.english: The piano playing and singing weren't bad, right? Hmm... as for why it's a breakup song... I chose it because the melody was good. But since I sang it with Amabile, my feelings came through, didn't they? I put my heart into it.
1001405206.korean: 피아노 연주랑 노래, 나쁘지 않았죠?&n음... 왜 이별노래냐면... 멜로디가 좋아서 골랐어요.&n그래도 Amabile로 노래했으니까,&n제 마음은 전해졌죠? 진심을 담았다구요.​

1001405207.english: Mm... It's not because I'm reminded of the lighthouse work. It's because I'm happy... Since the Commander always grants whatever I want to do and have... If there is anything a subordinate craves, I shall grant it. For I have already received countless things from you.
1001405207.korean: 으응... 등대 일이 생각나서 그러는 거 아니야.&n행복해서... 하고 싶은 거랑 갖고 싶은 걸&n사령관이 항상 들어주니까... 권속이 갈망하는 게&n있다면 뭐든 이뤄주겠노라. 짐은 이미 그대에게&n셀 수 없이 많은 것을 받아왔으니.​

1001405208.english: Th-that...? Kyu... Kyu kyu...! Th-this is super embarrassing, so please stop making me do that. You only hug me when it's at a disadvantage like this... That's so unfair, really. ...Huh? You're saying I'm more honest than usual? Ah... well... it's because I decided to be a little more honest with you, Master.
1001405208.korean: 그, 그걸요...? 뀨... 뀨뀨...! 이, 이거 엄청&n부끄러우니까 자꾸 그렇게 시키지 말아 주세요.&n이렇게 불리할 때만 안아주시구...&n치사해요, 정말. ...네? 평소보다 솔직하다구요?&n아... 그야... 주인님에게 좀 더 솔직해지기로&n마음먹었으니까요.​

1001405209.english: I'm back. Back to guarding...? No, did you perhaps take a shower? ...I see. I'll leave my scent on you again. That way, others will know I'm by your side, Master.
1001405209.korean: 다녀왔습니다. 다시 경호를...?&n아니요, 혹시 샤워하셨나요? ...그렇군요.&n다시 향기를 묻혀둘게요. 그래야 주인님 곁에&n제가 있단 걸 다른 분들이 알 수 있잖아요?

1001405210.english: Such obscene behavior cannot be tolerated!

1001405211.english: Try to hold on just a little longer. Keeping each other on edge like this... a relationship in this heightened state is sure to be special.
1001405211.korean: 조금만 참아보도록.&n이렇게 서로를 애태우며...&n분위기가 고조된 상태에서의 관계는,&n분명 특별할 테니까.​

1001405212.english: We haven't even started playing yet. Just finish this, okay?
1001405212.korean: 아직 연주 시작도 안 했잖아요.&n이것만 끝나고, 알았죠?​

1001405213.english: I want to play more... *Yawn*... I think I ran around too much...
1001405213.korean: 더 놀고 싶은데... 하암...&n너무 뛰어다녔나 봐...​

1001405214.english: Meow?! This isn't that kind of place, Master...!
1001405214.korean: 냥?! 여긴 그런 장소가 아니에요, 주인님...!​

1001405215.english: Um, Master...? To make sure I don't let out an embarrassing sound without realizing it this time, Master... could you please cover my mouth?
1001405215.korean: 저, 주인님…? 이번엔 저도 모르게&n부끄러운 소리를 내지 않도록,&n주인님께서… 이, 입을 막아 주시겠어요?

1001405216.english: Um... you know... that...&nIf you keep doing that... I'm going to...&nget horny, you know...?
1001405216.korean: 저기... 그게 있지... 그... &n자꾸 그러면 나...&n발정, 해버리는데...?​

1001405217.english: I tried to hold back a little longer...&nBut I can't anymore. Your love,&npour it out on me as much as I've been holding back.&nMake it so that I... can't possibly escape.
1001405217.korean: 조금 더 참아보려 했지만...&n더 이상은 안 되겠군. 그대의 사랑을,&n참았던 만큼 나에게 마음껏 쏟아내주겠나.&n내가... 도저히 헤어 나오지 못하도록.​

1001405218.english: Are you fiddling with me like that while I'm singing?&nTake off my stockings. Because of the commander,&nI already can't wear them anymore.
1001405218.korean: 노래하고 있는데 그렇게 만지작거리기에요?&n스타킹 벗겨줘요. 사령관 때문에 벌써...&n못 입게 되어버렸으니까.​

1001405219.english: Yeah, got it... I can just play again after I wake up...&nBecause even in the morning, the commander... will be by my side...
1001405219.korean: 응, 알았어... 자고 일어나서 또 놀면 되니까...&n아침에도 사령관은... 내 옆에 있을 거니까...

1001405220.english: Master, if you insist...&nI will guide you to the VIP room in the back.&nBecause there... only the two of us can be there.&nA-and, it's well soundproofed too...
1001405220.korean: 주인님, 꼭 그러셔야겠다면...&n뒷편 VIP룸으로 안내해 드리겠습니다.&n거긴... 둘만 있을 수 있으니까요.&n바, 방음도 잘 되어 있고요...​

1001405221.english: M-master...? This time, so I don't accidentally make any embarrassing sounds,&ncould you... please cover my mouth?
1001405221.korean: 저, 주인님…? 이번엔 저도 모르게&n부끄러운 소리를 내지 않도록,&n주인님께서… 이, 입을 막아 주시겠어요?

1001405222.english: Hmm... Hehe. Huh? This? Grooming. Hehe, I have to mark this person as the person I like the most.
1001405222.korean: 으음... 헤헷. 응? 이거? 그루밍. 니히힛,&n이 사람은 제가 제일 좋아하는 사람입니다~ 하고&n마킹 해놔야 되니까.​

1001405223.english: If I let my guard down even for a moment, it wouldn't be strange if it slipped off at any moment. And that aside, these clothes are probably your style. What do you think? If you'd like, would you like to... try it on yourself?
1001405223.korean: 조금이라도 방심하면 언제 흘러내려도&n이상하지 않겠군. 그 점까지 포함해서&n이 옷이 그대 취향이겠지.&n어떤가? 내키면 직접... 해보겠나?​

1001405224.english: Before I met you, would I have believed that one day I'd be playing the piano in a bunny girl outfit? I could do anything if I thought it would make you happy. Is this what love is?
1001405224.korean: 당신을 만나기 전의 저라면 믿었을까요?&n바니걸 복장으로 피아노를 연주할 날이 오리란 걸.&n당신이 기뻐할 거라 생각하면 뭐든 할 수 있어요.&n이게 사랑이란 거죠?​

1001405225.english: I wish the Commander would smile every day.&nJust as the Commander smiles when he sees me smile,&nI'm happy when the Commander is happy.&nWhat should I do to make the Commander happy...?&n...Huh? You're smiling just now, aren't you?
1001405225.korean: 사령관이 매일 웃었으면 좋겠어.&n내가 웃는 걸 보고 사령관이 웃는 것처럼&n나도 사령관이 기쁘면 행복하니까.&n뭘 해야 사령관이 기뻐할까...?&n...응? 지금 웃었지?

1001405226.english: Even though the clothes I wear and the things I do change, there's one thing that never changes. My heart that wants to be your help, to be your closest, and... to be loved the most.
1001405226.korean: 입는 옷이 달라지고, 하는 일이 바뀌어도&n변하지 않는 게 하나 있어요. 주인님의 도움이&n되고 싶고, 가장 가까이 있고 싶고, 또...&n가장 사랑받고 싶은 제 마음이요.

1001405227.english: S-Victory! I am Second Lieutenant Habetrot of the Steel Line Unit. I earnestly ask for your guidance and support... No, not a request! As an officer, I will do my best with a sense of responsibility!
1001405227.korean: 스, 승리! 스틸라인 부대의 소위,&n하베트롯입니다. 모쪼록 많은 지도 편달&n부탁드리겠습니... 아니, 부탁이 아니라!&n간부로서 책임감을 갖고 열심히 하겠습니다!​

1001405228.english: Why are all the kids here so nosy? ...I can handle everything myself, but they keep coming over and telling me what to do. ...So annoying.
1001405228.korean: 여기 애들은 왜 다 하나같이 오지랖이&n넓은 거야? ...내가 다 알아서 할 수 있는데&n자꾸 와서 이래라저래라. ...귀찮게.​

1001405229.english: Now, witness! The true form of Bunny Slayer NiBA! Nihihi, nihihihi- *cough, cough*...!
1001405229.korean: 자아, 목도하라!&n바니 슬레이어 니바의 진정한 모습을!&n니히히, 니히히히- 콜록, 콜록...!​

1001405230.english: Welcome to CAFE amor! Ah, Commander! Would you like to stop by for a moment? I’ll talk to the kitchen and pack you plenty. Hehe! How about it?
1001405230.korean: CAFE amor에 어서 오세요!&n아, 사령관님! 잠깐 들렀다 가실래요?&n제가 주방에 얘기해서 잔뜩 챙겨 드릴게요.&n후후! 어떠세요?​

1001405231.english: You think I seem more relaxed? Hehe! Of course. Unlike when I pushed myself to be recognized by everyone, right now... I'm striving to be recognized by just one person.
1001405231.korean: 여유로워진 것 같다구요? 후후! 물론이죠.&n모두에게 인정 받으려고 무리할 때랑&n다르게 지금은... 단 한 사람에게&n인정받으려 노력하고 있으니까요.​

1001405232.english: ...No matter how much I think about it, no way. Forgive a bunny girl? That would make my character weird! After all, I was a former Bunny Slayer! Nihihi, Commander, if you treat me like a queen for the day, I'll give it a try. Like, giving me some nice service, feeding me, or kneeling down and kissing the top of my foot? The last one is just a joke— Eh...?! You, you're actually going to do it?!
1001405232.korean: ...아무리 생각해도 안 돼. 바니걸을 용서하라니,&n그럼 내 캐릭터가 이상해지잖아! 아무리 그래도&n전직 바니 슬레이어였는데! 니히히, 사령관 씨가&n오늘 하루 나를 여왕처럼 떠받들어주면 생각해&n볼게. 예를 들면 나 기분 좋게 서비스 해준다던가,&n밥을 먹여준다던가, 무릎 꿇고 발등에 키스한다던가?&n마지막 거는 농담- 엣...?! 지, 진짜 하려고?!​

1001405233.english: Back then, I had just been commissioned, and the Commander was my older brother, so of course I was nervous. But now... Ugh! Your schedule is free starting now, right? I’ve finished all my work, so let’s go for a walk outside together.
1001405233.korean: 그땐 제가 갓 임관한데다, 사령관 각하가&n오빠인데 당연히 긴장되죠. 그래도 지금은...&n에잇! 지금부터 일정 비죠? 저도 할 일 다&n끝냈으니까 같이 밖에 좀 걸어요.​

1001405234.english: This is an important and urgent task, and that is... Ah, Commander! You have arrived. I plan to work overtime just until I get used to the job. I'm sure my skills will improve quickly this way.
1001405234.korean: 이게 중요하면서 급한 업무고, 저게...&n앗, 사령관님! 오셨습니까. 업무가&n익숙해질 때까지만 추가 근무하려구요.&n이러면 금방 실력이 늘겠죠.​

1001405235.english: ...You don't remember? You told me to try working at the cafe. Ahaha, yeah. I guess I'm just that insignificant to you anyway.
1001405235.korean: ...기억 못 하는 거야?&n네가 카페에서 일해보라고 했잖아.&n아하핫, 그래. 어차피 나는 너한테&n그 정도일 뿐이겠지.​

1001405236.english: Honestly, I didn't expect King Bunny to take my side. I was thinking I should launch a surprise attack before we were stuck in a life-or-death duel... Hehehe, do you get it now? That the Reverse Bunny is the strongest!
1001405236.korean: 솔직히 바니 대왕 씨가 내 편을 들어줄 줄은&n몰랐어. 꼼짝없이 생사를 걸고 결투를 벌이기&n전에 기습을 해야 하나 했는데... 니히히,&n이제 좀 알겠어? 역바니야말로 최강이라는걸! ​

1001405237.english: Dieting is no big deal. At most, I just have to resist late-night snacks and sweets... resist them... Could you let me be alone for a moment? I feel so proud of myself...
1001405237.korean: 다이어트 정도야 별거 아니죠.&n기껏해야 야식과 달콤한 것만 참으면...&n참으면... 잠시 혼자 있게 해주실래요?&n스스로 대견하다고 생각돼서...​

1001405238.english: W-wait a minute! That spot is still a complex for me, so no matter what I eat, it just goes straight to my stomach... What? You're saying that's my charm? Hmm... Still, I'm going to keep losing weight. Because I want to look beautiful to you, my husband.
1001405238.korean: 자... 잠시만요! 거긴 아직도 컴플렉스라,&n뭘 먹어도 배로 가버려서... 네? 그게&n매력이라구요? 으음... 그래도 살은 계속 뺄래요.&n서방님한테는 아름답게 비춰지고 싶으니까.​

1001405239.english: Did you know? As I became 'NiBA the Bride,' I awakened a new ability. It is... the 'Spirit of a Virtuous Wife'! I am going to become the one and only bride in the world, increasingly suited to the Commander's taste. Nihhihi, how about that? Don't I already look a little different?
1001405239.korean: 그거 알아? 나, '니바 더 브라이드'가 되면서&n새로운 능력을 각성했어. 바로... '현모양처의 혼'!&n나는 점점 더 사령관 씨의 취향에 맞는,&n세상에 단 하나뿐인 신부가 될 거야.&n니히힛, 어때? 벌써 좀 달라 보이지 않아?

1001405240.english: How about that? I can handle it perfectly on my own now. It’s all thanks to the competent person who taught me. Other work? Of course. What kind of... Eek?! ...If this were work, I could do it all day long.
1001405240.korean: 어때요, 이제 혼자서도 척척 잘하죠.&n이게 다 가르쳐주신 분이 유능한 덕분이죠.&n다른 업무요? 물론이죠, 어떤... 꺅?!&n...이게 일이라면 하루 종일 할 수도 있어요.​

1001405241.english: My uniform...? H-Is there something wrong with it? To be criticized for my attire as an officer... I'm disqualified as a Second Lieutenant...! Ah, what? You're saying you just asked because I was wearing my uniform on a holiday? Phew... That's a relief.
1001405241.korean: 군복이요...? 호, 혹시 잘못된 부분이 있나요?&n장교가 돼서 복장 지적을 당하다니, 소위&n실격이야...! 아, 네? 휴일에도 군복 차림이라&n물어본 것뿐이라고요? 휴우... 다행이다.​

1001405242.english: I said I would never wear such stupid clothes...! And those guys, just grinning annoyingly— ...What are you looking at? Are you here to gawk?
1001405242.korean: 이런 바보 같은 옷, 죽어도 안 입겠다고 했는데...!&n걔네들, 짜증나게 방긋방긋 웃기나 하고-&n...뭘 봐? 구경 났어?​

1001405243.english: Huh? The Reverse Bunny is the most perfect costume in the world. That's common sense, isn't it? Hmm, I overlooked it because you took my side, but as expected, you're still lacking. Now, listen carefully to Teacher NiBA! I will make sure you complete the Reverse Bunny special lecture!
1001405243.korean: 하아? 역바니는 세상에서 가장 완벽한 의상이다.&n상식이잖아? 흠, 내 편을 들어주길래 간과했었는데,&n역시 아직 부족하네. 자아, 니바 선생님의 말씀을&n잘 듣도록! 역바니 특강을 수료하게 해주겠다!​

1001405244.english: Are you asking if I'm shy? Not at all! You could say it's the perfect outfit to show off my flawless figure. The cafe's theme is also a bunny girl.
1001405244.korean: 부끄럽지 않냐구요? 전혀요!&n완벽한 제 몸매를 뽐내는데&n아주 적합한 의상이라 볼 수 있죠.&n카페 테마도 바니걸이구요.​

1001405245.english: You told me that it’s okay not to be perfect. Surprisingly, since then, my minor mistakes have decreased, and I’ve become more skilled at handling work. It’s all thanks to you being by my side. ...Will you stay by my side forever?
1001405245.korean: 완벽하지 않아도 된다고 서방님이 말씀해 주셨죠.&n신기하게 그 뒤로 잔실수도 줄고, 일처리까지&n능숙해졌어요. 전부 서방님이 옆에 있어준&n덕분이에요. ...앞으로도 쭉 곁에 있어 주실래요?​

1001405246.english: "NiBA, the ruthless Bunny Slayer known for having neither blood nor tears. During her travels, she encountered the ringleader of the Bunny Girls, 'Great King Bunny.' A life-or-death battle ensued. In the midst of a bloody fight that lasted for three days and nights, 'Great King Bunny' suddenly confessed his love to NiBA." Hehehe, I'm done writing. Commander, please write the rest. Okay?
1001405246.korean: "피도, 눈물도 없다고 알려진. 냉혹한 바니 살해자,&n니바. 그녀는 여행 도중 바니걸의 수괴, '바니&n대왕 씨'를 만났다. 목숨을 건 혈투. 삼일 밤낮&n동안 이어진 혈투 도중, '바니 대왕 씨'는 돌연,&n니바에게 사랑을 고백한다." 에헤헤, 다 썼당.&n이 뒤는 사령관 씨가 써줘. 응응?​

1001405247.english: I don't really like dressing up...&nbut lately, I've been getting into it. ...A change of heart?&nOf course! Even if I'm a soldier, there's nothing I can do about wanting to look pretty for the guy I like.&nYou get it, right, Oppa?​
1001405247.korean: 꾸미는 건 별로 안 좋아하는데...&n요새 들어 관심이 가긴 해요. ...심경의 변화요?&n당연하죠! 좋아하는 남자에게 예뻐 보이고&n싶은 건, 군인이라 해도 어쩔 수 없다구요.&n아시겠어요, 오빠?​

1001405248.english: This is the Master Sergeant, and this is the Sergeant... S-Seungri! When did you arrive, Commander? Ah, this is the Steel Line organizational chart. I need to get to know the others' faces as soon as possible to adapt.
1001405248.korean: 이분은 원사님이시고, 이분이 병장님...&n스, 승리! 언제 오셨어요, 사령관님?&n아, 이건 스틸라인 조직도예요. 하루빨리&n적응하려면 다른 분들 얼굴을 익혀 둬야죠.​

1001405249.english: I behaved well, just as you said. I tried to get along with the others. Did I... do the right thing...? ...Really? Then... pet me. M-Master...
1001405249.korean: 네가 말한대로 얌전히 지냈어. 다른 애들이랑&n친하게 지내려고 노력했어. 나... 잘 한 거 맞아...?&n...진짜? 그럼... 쓰다듬어 줘. 주, 주인님...​

1001405250.english: How is it? Cool, pretty, the best! Nihihit, this is NiBA's sincere mode, having perfectly embodied the 'Burning Bunny Soul'. ...Hey, King Bunny? Are you listening? When someone speaks, you should look at their eyes, not their heart!
1001405250.korean: 어때어때? 멋있지, 예쁘지, 최고지!&n니히힛, '타오르는 바니의 혼'을 완벽히&n몸에 갈무리한 니바의 진심 모드라는 말씀.&n...저기, 바니 대왕 씨? 듣고 있어? 사람이&n말을 할 때는 가슴이 아니라 눈을 봐야지!​

1001405251.english: Are you having a good time, Commander? Hehe! Please enjoy yourself to the fullest. Just let me know if there is anything you would like. I’ll provide unlimited service for you!
1001405251.korean: 행복한 시간을 보내고 계신가요, 사령관님?&n후후! 마음껏 즐겨주세요. 원하는 게 있으면&n따로 말씀해주시구요. 사령관님에게는&n무제한 서비스해 드릴게요!​

1001405252.english: You think I seem more relaxed? Hehe! Of course. Unlike when I pushed myself to be recognized by everyone, right now... I'm striving to be recognized by just one person.
1001405252.korean: 여유로워진 것 같다구요? 후후! 물론이죠.&n모두에게 인정 받으려고 무리할 때랑&n다르게 지금은... 단 한 사람에게&n인정받으려 노력하고 있으니까요.​

1001405253.english: ...No matter how much I think about it, no way. Forgive a bunny girl? That would make my character weird! After all, I was a former Bunny Slayer! Nihihi, Commander, if you treat me like a queen for the day, I'll give it a try. Like, giving me some nice service, feeding me, or kneeling down and kissing the top of my foot? The last one is just a joke— Eh...?! You, you're actually going to do it?!
1001405253.korean: ...아무리 생각해도 안 돼. 바니걸을 용서하라니,&n그럼 내 캐릭터가 이상해지잖아! 아무리 그래도&n전직 바니 슬레이어였는데! 니히히, 사령관 씨가&n오늘 하루 나를 여왕처럼 떠받들어주면 생각해&n볼게. 예를 들면 나 기분 좋게 서비스 해준다던가,&n밥을 먹여준다던가, 무릎 꿇고 발등에 키스한다던가?&n마지막 거는 농담- 엣...?! 지, 진짜 하려고?!​

1001405254.english: Back then, I had just been commissioned, and the Commander was my older brother, so of course I was nervous. But now... Ugh! Your schedule is free starting now, right? I’ve finished all my work, so let’s go for a walk outside together.
1001405254.korean: 그땐 제가 갓 임관한데다, 사령관 각하가&n오빠인데 당연히 긴장되죠. 그래도 지금은...&n에잇! 지금부터 일정 비죠? 저도 할 일 다&n끝냈으니까 같이 밖에 좀 걸어요.​

1001405255.english: I'm not very interested in clothes, so I usually wear military-style clothing. It's comfortable to move around in, too. However... ah, never mind. It's just... lately, the top part of my underwear feels a bit tight... so next time, I'll order one size larger.
1001405255.korean: 옷에 관심이 많지 않아서 보통은 군복을&n입고 다녀요. 활동하기 편하기도 하구요.&n다만... 아, 아니에요. 그게... 요새, 위쪽 속옷이&n답답해서... 다음엔 한 치수 높여서 신청하게요.​

1001405256.english: Master, this... I brought it to eat together. I, I'll feed you. How do you want to eat it? Should I feed you with my mouth? Huh? Tell me quickly.
1001405256.korean: 주인님, 이거... 같이 먹으려고 가져왔어.&n내, 내가 먹여줄게. 어떻게 먹을래?&n입으로 먹여줄까? 응? 어서 말해줘.​

1001405257.english: Hmm, fine. King Bunny is clearly completely captivated by the charms of the Reverse Bunny. Why, because... Ugh... King Bunny. Are you going to keep touching my stomach, chest, and everywhere else all day like that? I-it's not that I don't like it... but you know what happens if you keep doing that, right...?
1001405257.korean: 흐음, 좋아. 바니 대왕 씨는 완전히 역바니의&n매력에 빠져버린 게 분명해. 왜, 왜냐하면... 으으...&n바니 대왕 씨. 그렇게 하루 종일 내 배랑 가슴이랑&n여기저기 만지작거리고 있을 거야? 시, 싫은 건&n아닌데... 자꾸 그러면 어떻게 되는지, 알잖아...?​

1001405258.english: I heard the rumors, but that’s not why I wore this. It’s to show you my changed figure, Commander. What do you think? What are your impressions of seeing me transformed... Ah! Th-that part will slim down quickly too...!
1001405258.korean: 소문은 들었지만, 그것 때문에 입은 건 아니에요.&n달라진 제 몸매를 사령관님에게 보여드리기&n위해서죠. 어떠세요? 달라진 저를 본 소감은...&n앗! 거, 거기도 금방 빠질 거예요...!​

1001405259.english: W-wait a minute! That spot is still a complex for me, so no matter what I eat, it just goes straight to my stomach... What? You're saying that's my charm? Hmm... Still, I'm going to keep losing weight. Because I want to look beautiful to you, my husband.
1001405259.korean: 자... 잠시만요! 거긴 아직도 컴플렉스라,&n뭘 먹어도 배로 가버려서... 네? 그게&n매력이라구요? 으음... 그래도 살은 계속 뺄래요.&n서방님한테는 아름답게 비춰지고 싶으니까.​

1001405260.english: Did you know? As I became 'NiBA the Bride,' I awakened a new ability. It is... the 'Spirit of a Virtuous Wife'! I am going to become the one and only bride in the world, increasingly suited to the Commander's taste. Nihhihi, how about that? Don't I already look a little different?
1001405260.korean: 그거 알아? 나, '니바 더 브라이드'가 되면서&n새로운 능력을 각성했어. 바로... '현모양처의 혼'!&n나는 점점 더 사령관 씨의 취향에 맞는,&n세상에 단 하나뿐인 신부가 될 거야.&n니히힛, 어때? 벌써 좀 달라 보이지 않아?

1001405261.english: How about that? I can handle it perfectly on my own now. It’s all thanks to the competent person who taught me. Other work? Of course. What kind of... Eek?! ...If this were work, I could do it all day long.
1001405261.korean: 어때요, 이제 혼자서도 척척 잘하죠.&n이게 다 가르쳐주신 분이 유능한 덕분이죠.&n다른 업무요? 물론이죠, 어떤... 꺅?!&n...이게 일이라면 하루 종일 할 수도 있어요.​

1001405262.english: Hmph...?! It's the Commander... It must be a dream again... Oppa~ Please pat me on the back and tell me I'm doing well just like usual... Huh? Uh oh?! No way, it's not a dream...! Aaaaaaaah! I'm sorry, I'm sorry!
1001405262.korean: 흐에...?! 사령관님이다... 또 꿈이구나...&n오빠~ 어서 평소처럼 잘하고 있다고&n토닥토닥해주세요... 응? 어어?! 설마,&n꿈이 아니라...! 아아아아아!&n죄송합니다, 죄송합니다!​

1001405263.english: Mimicking a cat...? Th-this is... how you do it, meow...? Ah... Ehehe. Master, I want to be petted more, meow. Since Janghwa is a good boy, more, more...
1001405263.korean: 고양이 흉내...? 이, 이렇게 하는 거... 맞, 냥...?&n아... 에헤헷. 주인님, 더 쓰다듬어달라냥.&n장화는 착한 아이니까 더, 더 많이...​

1001405264.english: King Bunny, do you want to see my diary? I don't show this to just anyone~ ...Huh? You ask why I'm suddenly acting like this? Well... because you're the only one who understands something like this.
1001405264.korean: 바니 대왕 씨, 내 일기장 볼래?&n이거 아무한테나 안 보여주는 거라구~&n...응? 갑자기 왜 그러냐구? 그야... 이런 거,&n이해해 주는 사람은 바니 대왕 씨밖에 없으니까.​

1001405265.english: To be a woman worthy of the Commander, I should be able to do anything. The same goes for dieting. It's not difficult at all... but, if you suddenly hug me... please stop whispering that I'm pretty...!
1001405265.korean: 사령관님에게 어울리는 여자가 되려면&n뭐든 할 수 있어야죠. 다이어트도 마찬가지구요.&n전혀 어렵지 않은... 가, 갑자기 끌어안으시면...&n예쁘다고 속삭이는 거 그만해주세요...!​

1001405266.english: You told me that it’s okay not to be perfect. Surprisingly, since then, my minor mistakes have decreased, and I’ve become more skilled at handling work. It’s all thanks to you being by my side. ...Will you stay by my side forever?
1001405266.korean: 완벽하지 않아도 된다고 서방님이 말씀해 주셨죠.&n신기하게 그 뒤로 잔실수도 줄고, 일처리까지&n능숙해졌어요. 전부 서방님이 옆에 있어준&n덕분이에요. ...앞으로도 쭉 곁에 있어 주실래요?​

1001405267.english: "NiBA, the ruthless Bunny Slayer known for having neither blood nor tears. During her travels, she encountered the ringleader of the Bunny Girls, 'Great King Bunny.' A life-or-death battle ensued. In the midst of a bloody fight that lasted for three days and nights, 'Great King Bunny' suddenly confessed his love to NiBA." Hehehe, I'm done writing. Commander, please write the rest. Okay?
1001405267.korean: "피도, 눈물도 없다고 알려진. 냉혹한 바니 살해자,&n니바. 그녀는 여행 도중 바니걸의 수괴, '바니 대왕&n씨'를 만났다. 목숨을 건 혈투. 삼일 밤낮 동안&n이어진 혈투 도중, '바니 대왕 씨'는 돌연, 니바에게&n사랑을 고백한다." 에헤헤, 다 썼당.&n이 뒤는 사령관 씨가 써줘. 응응?​

1001405268.english: I don't really like dressing up...&nbut lately, I've been getting into it. ...A change of heart?&nOf course! Even if I'm a soldier, there's nothing I can do about wanting to look pretty for the guy I like.&nYou get it, right, Oppa?​
1001405268.korean: 꾸미는 건 별로 안 좋아하는데...&n요새 들어 관심이 가긴 해요. ...심경의 변화요?&n당연하죠! 좋아하는 남자에게 예뻐 보이고&n싶은 건, 군인이라 해도 어쩔 수 없다구요.&n아시겠어요, 오빠?​

1001405269.english: Ah...! Oh, no. A simple girl like me... the Commander's, uh... favor...
1001405269.korean: 앗...! 아, 아니요. 저 같이 수수한 애가&n사령관님의, 그... 총애를...​

1001405271.english: W-W-wait! If you touch me right now, you might get hurt because of the 'Burning Bunny's Soul'— Kyaaah!
1001405271.korean: 자자자잠깐! 지금 내 몸에 손을 대면&n'타오르는 바니의 혼' 때문에 다칠지도-&n꺄아아ㅡ!​

1001405272.english: ...Hehe! I understand how you feel, Commander. But it's working hours, so please bear with me?

1001405273.english: Hmph, it certainly seems effective for the diet, but I'm exhausted... Also, I feel like I've only shown my embarrassing side to my husband... What? One more time? Here, let's take a quick break- Ack?!
1001405273.korean: 화, 확실히 다이어트에 효과적인 것 같지만,&n지치기도 하고... 또, 서방님에게 부끄러운&n모습만 보인 것 같아서... 네? 한번 더요?&n자, 잠깐 쉴 시간을- 꺅?!​

1001405274.english: Commander, you really, really like naughty things, don't you? But, do you know something? I... like naughty things even more♥
1001405274.korean: 사령관 씨, 야한 거 진~짜 좋아하는구나~?&n근데, 그거 알아? 내가... 더 좋아해, 야한 거♥​

1001405275.english: Do you like that that much? You keep focusing only on that... Do you realize that I've grown so big because of you that standard underwear doesn't fit anymore? Please restrain yourself from now on. ...I'm just kidding. If you like it... I like it too...
1001405275.korean: 그게 그렇게 좋으세요? 자꾸 거기에만&n열중하시구... 오빠 때문에 커져서&n보급 속옷으로는 사이즈가 안 맞는 거 아세요?&n앞으로는 자제해 주세요. ...농담이에요.&n오빠가 좋아하면... 저도 좋으니까...​

1001405276.english: What happened back then, please...! I just misspoke,&nbut if you keep asking me... uuugh... i-is this&nthe last time...? Today too, please&nbestow upon me... the Commander's&nfavor... ahhh...
1001405276.korean: 그때 일은 제발...! 말실수한 건데,&n자꾸 부탁하시면... 으으... 이, 이걸로&n마지막이에요...? 오늘도 제게, 사령관님의&n총애를... 내려, 주세요... 아으으...​

1001405277.english: Haa, haa... you know, did you like this outfit...?&nYou want me to wear something else too, right? Right?&nIf you... no, if Master orders me,&nI can do anything...
1001405277.korean: 하아, 하아... 있지, 이 옷 마음에 들었어...?&n다른 것도 입어줬으면 좋겠는 거지? 그렇지?&n네가... 아니, 주인님이 시키면 나,&n뭐든지 해줄 수 있으니까...​

1001405278.english: …Lord Bunny, you're really naughty. You're a total beast.&n…Nihihi. So, I like it♥
1001405278.korean: ...바니 대왕 씨, 진짜 야해. 짐승이야 완전.&n...니히히. 그래서, 좋아♥​

1001405279.english: I-it's already time...! Other people saw us coming out together.&nWe need to hurry back... hehe. Aren't you going to let me go?&nIf I get fired instead, you'll have to take responsibility for life. Got it?
1001405279.korean: 버, 벌써 시간이...! 같이 나온 거 다른 분들도&n봤어요. 어서 돌아가야... 후후. 안 보내주시게요?&n대신 짤리면 평생 책임져주셔야 해요. 아시겠죠?​

1001405280.english: I-it definitely seems effective for dieting,&nbut I get tired... and also, I feel like I only showed&nembarrassing sides to my husband... huh? One more time?&nW-wait, I need a little break— eek?!
1001405280.korean: 화, 확실히 다이어트에 효과적인 것 같지만,&n지치기도 하고... 또, 서방님에게 부끄러운&n모습만 보인 것 같아서... 네? 한번 더요?&n자, 잠깐 쉴 시간을- 꺅?!​

1001405281.english: Commander, you really~ like naughty things, huh~?&nBut, do you know? I... like naughty things even more♥
1001405281.korean: 사령관 씨, 야한 거 진~짜 좋아하는구나~?&n근데, 그거 알아? 내가... 더 좋아해, 야한 거♥​

1001405282.english: Do you like that so much? You keep focusing only on that...&nBecause of Big Brother, it's grown, so the supply underwear doesn't fit anymore, you know?&nPlease refrain from that from now on. ...Just kidding.&nIf Big Brother likes it... then I like it too...
1001405282.korean: 그게 그렇게 좋으세요? 자꾸 거기에만&n열중하시구... 오빠 때문에 커져서&n보급 속옷으로는 사이즈가 안 맞는 거 아세요?&n앞으로는 자제해 주세요. ...농담이에요.&n오빠가 좋아하면... 저도 좋으니까...​

1001405283.english: When I first came, I didn't know anything and struggled a lot.&nThanks to you teaching me one by one by my side,&nI'm glad I can now pull my own weight. Thinking back to that time,&noh dear... I'm always grateful to you, Big Brother.
1001405283.korean: 처음 왔을 땐 아무것도 몰라서 많이 헤맸었죠.&n옆에서 하나하나 가르쳐 주신 덕분에 한 사람&n몫을 하게 돼서 다행이에요. 그때만 생각하면,&n어휴... 늘 고마워요, 오빠.​

1001405284.english: You know. What would you like me to wear today?&nAnything is fine. When I cosplay,&nMaster focuses only on me...
1001405284.korean: 있지. 오늘은 뭐 입어줬으면 좋겠어?&n뭐든지 괜찮아. 코스프레를 하면&n주인님이 나한테만 열중해 주는 걸...​

1001405285.english: This is... the full power of 'NiBA the Bride'...&nTruly the perfect wife...! Nihihi, Commander.&nYou worked hard today. Want to wash up first?&nAs for the meal... it's definitely me, right~?
1001405285.korean: 이건... '니바 더 브라이드'의 풀파워...&n그야말로 현모양처...! 니히히, 사령관 씨.&n오늘도 고생했어. 먼저 씻을래?&n식사는... 역시 나겠지~?​

1001405286.english: Surely, I was a bundle of complexes.&nBut since you loved even my flaws,&nI gradually gained confidence.&n...My husband is making me perfect.
1001405286.korean: 확실히 저는 컴플렉스 덩어리였죠.&n하지만 제 단점까지 사랑해 주시니&n점점 자신감이 생기더라구요.&n...서방님이 절 완벽하게 만들어주시는 거예요.​

1001405287.english: Welcome, Master~ Please sit wherever you feel comfortable. I'll get you the menu. ...Heh. Why are you so surprised? I'm just working a part-time job. I'm bored, and I need to keep an eye on that cat to see if it's doing well... and I have to serve my Master too♥
1001405287.korean: 어서오세요, 주인님~ 편하신데에 앉으세요.&n메뉴판 가져다 드릴게요. ...킥. 왜 그렇게 놀라?&n그냥 알바하는 거야. 심심하기도 하구,&n고양이 한 마리 잘 하고 있나 구경도 해야 하구...&n우리 주인님한테 서빙도 해야 하구♥​

1001405288.english: Wow... The Horizon kids' uniforms, I didn't realize it when I saw them, but now that I've tried them on, they're just as... like the reverse bunny outfits... From the back, it looks like you could see everything...?
1001405288.korean: 우와아... 호라이즌 애들 제복, 볼 때는&n몰랐는데 입어보니까 역바니 의상 만큼이나...&n뒤, 뒤에서 보면 다 보일 것 같은데...?​

1001405289.english: I used to be in charge of cargo management and air traffic control at the airport. I joined the Strikers at the recommendation of Prototype Labiata. She must have recognized my outstanding talent at first glance! Ohoho!
1001405289.korean: 본녀는 공항에서 화물 관리와 항공관제를&n담당했었어요. 라비아타 님의 권유로&n스트라이커즈에 합류하게 됐죠. 본녀의&n뛰어난 재능을 한눈에 알아보신 게&n틀림없사와요! 오호호!​

1001405290.english: The nickname "Troublemaker" isn't something I wanted. I just gave nice gifts to the people around me, and before I knew it... A giant squid? I prepared this while the Commander was sleeping, because I heard it clears the head... You mean it's because of this? To think! My good intentions...!
1001405290.korean: 장난꾸러기란 별명은 본녀가 원해서&n붙은 게 아니에요. 주변 분들한테 좋은 걸&n선물했을 뿐인데, 어느새... 대왕오징어요?&n사령관이 잘 때 본녀가 준비했사와요,&n머리가 맑아진다고 들어서... 이런 것&n때문이라구요? 그런! 본녀의 선의가...!​

1001405291.english: Yeah~ They're calling from that table over there. I'll be right back. Oh, wait a minute before I go... My uniform is super revealing, isn't it? I specially picked the revealing one right away. Just to show it to you, Master~ Hehe.
1001405291.korean: 네~ 저쪽 테이블에서 부른다. 좀따올게.&n아, 가기 전에 잠깐... 내 유니폼, 엄청 야하지?&n특별히 제일 야한 거로 골랐어.&n주인님 보여주려구~ 에헷.​

1001405292.english: You know, Commander... It was the same at Amor, too; they say I get rave reviews for the pleasant scent when I serve in the hall... Hahaha... I'm not an air freshener...
1001405292.korean: 있지, 사령관... 아모르에서도 그랬는데,&n내가 홀에서 서빙하면 좋은 향기가 난다고&n대호평이래... 아하하... 나는 방향제가 아닌데...​

1001405293.english: Ohohoho! I appreciate you asking what I want, but I am perfect! I don't ask for anything more. If I had to ask for something, maybe just some snacks to share with my friends?
1001405293.korean: 오호호! 갖고 싶은 걸 물어봐 주시는 건&n감사하지만 본녀는 완전무결! 더 이상&n바라는 건 없사와요. 굳이 부탁드리자면&n친우들과 나눠먹을 간식 정도?​

1001405294.english: Becoming more perfect. That is my current goal. To serve the Commander, I must be even more outstanding than I am now. Will you watch me as I become more and more perfect? ​​Ohohoho!
1001405294.korean: 보다 완전무결해지는 것. 그게 본녀의&n현재 목표예요. 사령관을 보필하려면 지금보다&n더 뛰어나야죠. 갈수록 완벽해져가는 본녀를&n지켜봐 주시겠어요? 오호호호!​

1001405295.english: Ah, sorry. I just can't bring myself to go "meow meow" and imitate a cat in front of you, Master. You should ask that over there, the red-haired cat. ...Do you really want to hear it? Haa, I guess it can't be helped. Master, are you really a pervert, meow?
1001405295.korean: 아, 미안. 주인님 앞에서 냥냥~ 하면서&n고양이 흉내는 차마 못 하겠어. 그건&n저~기 빨간 머리 고양이한테 부탁하시구요~&n...진짜 꼭 듣고 싶어? 하아, 어쩔 수 없네.&n주인님, 진짜 변태인거냥?​

1001405296.english: I'm on a temporary assignment. I can help out with the kitchen here, too. This is my special dish; would you like to try it? ...Oh, right. I have to take the order, right? Usually, I just give it to the Commander if he says he wants to eat it, so I was confused...
1001405296.korean: 잠깐 파견 근무 나왔어. 여기서는 주방일도&n도울 수 있으니까. 이 메뉴는 내 담당인데&n한 번 먹어볼래? ...아, 맞다. 주문받아야&n되는 거지? 평소에는 그냥 사령관이 먹고&n싶다고 하면 줬으니까 헷갈렸어...​

1001405297.english: Here, here's a gift. It's a stag beetle I found on this mission. Hohoho! You don't need to thank me— You're saying it's wrong information again? Th-this time I was sure I heard it was good for blood circulation...!
1001405297.korean: 여기, 선물이에요. 이번 임무에서 발견한&n사슴벌레죠. 오호호! 고마워하지 않으셔도-&n또 잘못된 정보라구요? 이, 이번엔 분명히&n혈액순환에 좋다고 들었는데...!​

1001405298.english: Hmm... Commander, your clothes are wrinkled. Please hand over your coat and start eating. I’ve prepared a spread of your favorite foods, so please don’t leave anything behind. I made this with all my heart.
1001405298.korean: 흐음... 사령관, 옷에 주름이 졌사와요.&n외투는 건네주시고 어서 식사부터 드세요.&n좋아하시는 음식으로만 차려 뒀으니 남기지&n않으셔야 해요? 본녀가 정성껏 만들었다구요.​

1001405299.english: Did you wait? Oh my, that's tiring~ What are you looking at? ...Hmm. I noticed this when we worked together too, but everyone definitely looks like they're having fun. Well, I don't mind either. Like this... our good Hot Pack... no, wait, Master. is waiting for us until it's over, right?
1001405299.korean: 기다렸어? 아이구, 힘들다~ 뭐 보고 있어?&n...흐응. 같이 일할 때도 느꼈지만, 확실히&n다들 즐거워 보이네. 나도 뭐, 싫지는 않아.&n이렇게... 끝날 때까지 우리 착한 핫팩...&n아니지, 주.인.님.이 기다려 주는걸?​

1001405300.english: Huh? You mean this outfit is similar to a regular uniform and a bunny girl outfit? Ah, no. Look closely. The neckline is much more revealing than the uniform, and the bottom part too— I, I didn't mean for you to look that close... Uh, can't you stop looking— Ack?!
1001405300.korean: 응? 원래 제복이랑 바니걸이랑 이 옷이랑&n비슷하다구? 아, 아냐. 잘 봐봐. 가슴 쪽은&n제복보다 훨씬 파여있구, 아래쪽도-&n그, 그렇게 가까이서 보라는 뜻은 아니었는데...&n그, 그만 보면 안 될- 꺅?!​

1001405301.english: Please feel free to call me anytime if you need help. It is a joyful thing to be of assistance to others. Especially to the Commander. Ohohoho!
1001405301.korean: 도움이 필요하면 언제든 본녀를 불러주시길.&n다른 분들에게 보탬이 되는 건 기쁜 일이니까요.&n특히나 사령관한테는 더더욱이요. 오호호호!​

1001405302.english: The nickname "Troublemaker" isn't something I wanted. I just gave nice gifts to the people around me, and before I knew it... A giant squid? I prepared this while the Commander was sleeping, because I heard it clears the head... You mean it's because of this? To think! My good intentions...!
1001405302.korean: 장난꾸러기란 별명은 본녀가 원해서&n붙은 게 아니에요. 주변 분들한테 좋은 걸&n선물했을 뿐인데, 어느새... 대왕오징어요?&n사령관이 잘 때 본녀가 준비했사와요,&n머리가 맑아진다고 들어서... 이런 것&n때문이라구요? 그런! 본녀의 선의가...!​

1001405303.english: *Kick*. Hey, Hot Pack. Do you like it when I call you Master? Well, it's not like it's hard work, and I can do other things for you, you know? Hmm... like 'Oppa~' or 'Honey'? Or... 'Baby's Daddy'?
1001405303.korean: 킥. 야, 핫팩. 주인님이라고 불러주니까 좋아?&n뭐, 힘든 것도 아니고 다른 것도 해줄 수 있는데?&n음... '오빠~'나 '자기야' 같은 거? 아니면...&n'애기 아빠'? ​

1001405304.english: Master, ah~ Is it delicious? Hehe, I'm happy. ...Huh? You're saying I'm being a bit proactive today? Th-well, it's been a long time since I met the Commander—no, Master—and with the clothes and the situation like this... Ahaha... You don't dislike it, do you...? That's a relief... Then... can I be a little more proactive...?
1001405304.korean: 주인님, 아~ 맛있어? 에헷, 기쁘다. ...응?&n오늘 좀 적극적이라구? 그, 그야 사령, 아니&n주인님이랑 만난 지도 오래됐고, 옷이랑&n상황도 이러고 하니까... 아하하...&n싫은 건, 아니지...? 다행이다... 그러면...&n좀 더 적극적으로 해봐도 돼...?​

1001405305.english: It is true that I placed the ocean sunfish and alligator there, but there is a misunderstanding. I did it because I heard they are good for eye health, but everyone thought it was a joke and took them away. I went to the trouble of catching them alive, though.
1001405305.korean: 본녀가 개복치와 악어를 갖다 놓은 건&n사실이지만 한 가지 오해가 있사와요.&n눈 건강에 좋다고 들어서 그랬는데,&n다들 장난인 줄 알고 치워버리더라구요.&n애써 산 채로 잡아온 건데.​

1001405306.english: Becoming more perfect. That is my current goal. To serve the Commander, I must be even more outstanding than I am now. Will you watch me as I become more and more perfect? ​​Ohohoho!
1001405306.korean: 보다 완전무결해지는 것. 그게 본녀의&n현재 목표예요. 사령관을 보필하려면 지금보다&n더 뛰어나야죠. 갈수록 완벽해져가는 본녀를&n지켜봐 주시겠어요? 오호호호!​

1001405307.english: Master~ I'm cold~ Ah, I feel a bit better... Huh? You're asking why I dressed like this when I'm cold? Well, Master, you like these sexy clothes. ...You're trying to deny it? Then... what is this...? I'm saying 'I love this so much!' right~?
1001405307.korean: 주인님~ 나 추워~ 아아, 좀 살겠다...&n응? 추우면서 왜 이렇게 입었냐구?&n그야 주인님 너, 이런 야한 옷 좋아하잖아.&n...발뺌하시겠다? 그럼... 이건 뭘까요...?&n'너무너무 좋아!' 이러고 있는데~?​

1001405308.english: Sigh. Still, I’ve gotten somewhat used to it now. After all, so-and-so was always sniffing it, saying how good it smelled. Uh, huh...? I, I’m not quite used to tasting it yet... but if it’s so-and-so... maybe it’ll be okay...?
1001405308.korean: 에효. 그래도 이제 어느 정도 익숙해졌어.&n누구누구씨가 맨날 냄새 좋다고 맡아댔으니까.&n으, 응...? 마, 맛보는 건 아직... 익숙해지진&n않았는데... 누구누구씨라면... 괜찮을, 지도...?​

1001405309.english: Is there anything you need, Commander? Like something to eat or wear... I haven't even looked after my close friends this much, but whenever I see you, Commander, I just feel like I want to take care of you like crazy...!
1001405309.korean: 혹시 사령관이 필요한 건 없으세요?&n먹을 거라거나, 입을 거라거나... 친우들한테도&n이정도까지 챙겨주진 않았는데, 사령관만 보면&n뭔가 마구마구 보살피고 싶은...!​

1001405310.english: Hmm... Commander, your clothes are wrinkled. Please hand over your coat and start eating. I’ve prepared a spread of your favorite foods, so please don’t leave anything behind. I made this with all my heart.
1001405310.korean: 흐음... 사령관, 옷에 주름이 졌사와요.&n외투는 건네주시고 어서 식사부터 드세요.&n좋아하시는 음식으로만 차려 뒀으니 남기지&n않으셔야 해요? 본녀가 정성껏 만들었다구요.​

1001405311.english: Oh my, Master. If you keep doing that, you're going to be in big trouble in many ways.
1001405311.korean: 어머, 주인님. 자꾸 그러시면&n여러가지 의미로 큰일 나는데요?​

1001405312.english: Um... you shouldn't be doing this during work hours...?
1001405312.korean: 저기... 근무 중에 이러는 건 안 되는데...?​

1001405313.english: It can't be helped that the Commander is attracted to this flawless woman.
1001405313.korean: 완전무결한 본녀에게 사령관이&n매력을 느끼는 건 어쩔 수 없죠.​

1001405314.english: I used to be too nervous to notice... but every time I see that look on your face, Commander, I find myself wanting to do something for you... Would you please come closer? So I can see a little better.
1001405314.korean: 예전엔 긴장해서 몰랐는데...&n사령관의 그 표정, 볼 때마다 자꾸&n뭐라도 해드리고 싶어져요...&n가까이 다가와 주시겠어요?&n좀 더 자세히 볼 수 있게.​

1001405315.english: What kind of service would you like, Master?&nI can do everything except for just one thing.&nI hope you understand that, CheonA...&nBecause I know everything you like, Master♥
1001405315.korean: 어떤 서비스를 원하세요, 주인님?&n딱 하나 빼고 전부 해드릴 수 있어요.&n그건 이해해 주실 거죠? 천아는...&n주인님이 어떤 걸 좋아하시는지...&n전부, 알고 있으니까요♥​

1001405316.english: R-really...? Ugh... This is, um, the sweetest menu item at our café... Ah, Aurora.&nP-please enjoy it... M-master...
1001405316.korean: 지, 진짜로 해...? 우으... 저, 저희 카페에서&n제일 달콤한 메뉴... 아, 아우로라입니다.&n마, 맛있게 드셔 주세요... 주, 주인님...​

1001405317.english: I let my guard down... Showing the commander a sight so embarrassing... But still, wasn't it cute? N-now, it's the commander's turn!
1001405317.korean: 방심하고 말았사와요... 사령관에게&n보여 드리기 부끄러운 모습을... 그래도&n귀여웠다구요? 이, 이번엔 사령관 차례예요!​
