1001405318.english: I used to be too nervous to notice, but... every time I see that expression on the commander's face, I just want to do something for you... Could you come a little closer? So I can see it better.
1001405318.korean: 예전엔 긴장해서 몰랐는데...&n사령관의 그 표정, 볼 때마다 자꾸&n뭐라도 해드리고 싶어져요...&n가까이 다가와 주시겠어요?&n좀 더 자세히 볼 수 있게.​

1001405319.english: Master, what are you do- huh, that got stuck in my mouth.&nWell, I guess it doesn't matter since you seem to like it.&nRight? Future 'baby daddy'?
1001405319.korean: 주인님, 뭐하고 있- 입에 붙어버렸네.&n뭐, 좋아하는 거 같으니까 상관없겠네.&n그치? 예비 '애기 아빠'?​

1001405320.english: Commander, hug me~ Hehe... You know, Commander,&nI think I'm starting to like your scent too.&nBeing held like this makes me feel really calm.&nDo you feel the same, Commander...?
1001405320.korean: 사령관, 안아줘~ 헤헷... 있지, 사령관.&n나도 사령관 냄새가 좋아진 것 같아.&n이렇게 품에 안겨있으면 엄청&n마음이 편안해져. 사령관도... 그래?​

1001405321.english: To think that being someone's help could bring such joy...&nAnd that I would have these feelings...&nI never knew until I met the one who's in my arms."&n&nBeautiful and heartfelt—want me to keep going like this?
1001405321.korean: 누군가의 도움이 된다는 게&n이렇게 기쁠 줄은... 또, 본녀가 이런&n생각을 갖게 될 줄은... 제 품에 있는 분을&n만나기 전까진 알지 못했사와요.​

1001405322.english: Commander... I wonder if you will like it... I did faithfully realize the desire I glimpsed, but...
1001405322.korean: 사령관님... 과연 마음에 들어 해주실까요...&n살짝 엿본 욕망을 충실하게 구현하기는 했지만...​

1001405323.english: Hello! I am the Chief of Staff of the Anger of the Horde, trusted by Captain Khan the Swift... Wait a minute, cut. I'll leave Captain Khan the Swift out of the story as usual. Please shoot again!
1001405323.korean: 안녕하세요! 저는 앵거 오브 호드의 참모,&n칸 대장님이 신뢰하는... 잠깐만요, 컷.&n역시 칸 대장님 얘기는 빼고 갈게요.&n다시 슛 부탁드려요!​

1001405324.english: Hi. I serve as the Technical Advisor for the Anger of the Horde. As for my specific title... um... you get the idea, right?
1001405324.korean: 안녕. 나는 앵거 오브 호드의&n기술 고문을 담당하고 있어.&n자세한 직책은... 음... 뭔지 알겠지?​

1001405325.english: ...You're here? It's nothing. Since I'm the technical advisor, I just need to keep things in order whenever I have a spare moment. Everyone needs to be happy with the Commander for a long, long time, right? ...When that time comes, I hope I'll be the closest to him. I'm more possessive than I look.
1001405325.korean: ...왔어? 별거 아니야. 내가 기술 고문이니까,&n틈틈이 정비해놔야지. 다들 사령관이랑&n오래오래 행복하게 지내야 하잖아? ...그때는,&n내가 제일 가까이에 있었으면 좋겠네.&n나, 보기보다 독점욕 강하거든.​

1001405326.english: I understand your heart well. That pure desire to protect us all. And... the heart to love us all.
1001405326.korean: 당신의 마음은 잘 알고 있어요.&n저희 모두를 지키고 싶다는 그런&n순수한 욕망이요. 그리고... 저희 모두를,&n사랑해주겠다는 마음도.​

1001405327.english: It’s best to film as much as possible while you can. You might not know this, but people all over the world are looking forward to your new work, Commander. Ah! While we’re at it, shall we go with double the length of the previous one?
1001405327.korean: 찍을 수 있을 때 많이 찍어두는게 좋죠.&n아실지 모르겠지만, 전 세계 분들이&n사령관님의 신작을 기대하고 있다구요.&n아! 이참에 기존보다 2배 분량으로 가볼까요?​

1001405328.english: It's the same complaint again. I told you in advance. I said that the appearance might change "slightly" if modified. As long as it fires bullets, it doesn't change the fact that it is a gun.
1001405328.korean: 또 같은 항의네. 난 미리 얘기했어.&n개조하면 외형이 "조금" 변할 수 있다고.&n총알만 발사되면 총인 건 변하지 않잖아.​

1001405329.english: I developed a nutritional supplement. The Commander told me to take care of my health whenever I could. This time, I conducted proper clinical trials... Right, I haven't tested it on a man. ...Did you swallow it already? Ah... I guess it can't be helped. Still, if you do it like last time, I'll be ruined, so be gentle... Understood?
1001405329.korean: 영양제를 개발해봤어. 사령관이 틈틈이 건강&n챙기랬으니까. 이번엔 제대로 임상 시험...&n맞다, 남자한테는 시험한 적 없구나.&n...혹시 벌써 삼켰어? 아... 어쩔 수 없네.&n그래도 저번처럼 하면 내가 망가지니까,&n자상하게... 알겠지?​

1001405330.english: I got help from Mery with the costume design. Because I don't really know how to grab a man's attention.
1001405330.korean: 의상 디자인에는 메리의 도움을 받았어요.&n저는 남성의 시선을 빼앗는 법은 잘 모르니까요. ​

1001405331.english: Haha! I’ve analyzed data for years and put on an outfit that will be effective for you, Commander. It looks like you’re already ready, so shall we get right to the shoot?
1001405331.korean: 후후! 다년간 자료를 분석해&n사령관님에게 효과적인 복장을 입고 왔죠.&n준비는 이미 끝마치신 것 같으니~&n바로 촬영 들어갈까요?​

1001405332.english: Ashtrays and empty cans? I collected them on purpose. It might look messy, but it’s actually organized, so please don’t touch them. They pile up quickly anyway, so it’s more efficient to clean them up all at once later. I hate inefficiency.
1001405332.korean: 재떨이랑 빈 캔? 일부러 모아둔 거야.&n어질러진 것처럼 보여도 나름 정리된 거니&n건드리지 말아줘. 어차피 금방 쌓이니까,&n나중에 한번에 치우는 게 효율적이야.&n나는 비효율적인 건 싫어.​

1001405333.english: I can't take it anymore. Commander, telling me to quit smoking completely seems a bit too much. … Hmm. It's true that I should quit for the sake of the future... *Sigh*... Can't you just smoke until today? Please? Please~
1001405333.korean: 더는 못 참겠어. 사령관, 아예 금연하라는 건&n너무한 거 같아. …으음. 나중을 위해서 끊어야&n되는 건 맞는데... 후우... 딱 오늘까지만&n피면 안 돼? 응? 제발~​

1001405334.english: Do you like it...? Ah... that's a relief. I'm relieved. Then please stay exactly as you are. Because... I've properly learned how to do it.
1001405334.korean: 마음에 드시나요...? 아... 다행이네요.&n안심했어요. 그럼 그대로 계셔 주세요.&n어떻게 해야 하는지...&n제, 제대로 배워왔으니까요.​

1001405335.english: It's your turn next, Commander. Just introduce yourself according to the concept. Hehe, don't overthink it, it's simple, right? Talonfeather is the best in the world~ Mmm... You got it, right?
1001405335.korean: 다음은 사령관님 차례네요. 컨셉에 맞춰&n자기소개해주시면 돼요. 후후, 어렵게 생각하지&n마세요, 간단하잖아요? 탈론페더가 세상에서&n제일~ 음음... 뭔지 아셨죠?​

1001405336.english: The hyenas kept asking, so I'm improving the bombs for them. Even though the stability has dropped, I've drastically increased the destructive power, so I'm sure you'll be satisfied. Smoke...? ...Commander, run away quickly. You won't die, but it could be excruciatingly painful.
1001405336.korean: 하이에나가 자꾸 부탁해서 폭탄을&n개량해주고 있어. 안정성은 떨어져도&n위력은 대폭 증가시켰으니 만족하겠지.&n연기...? ...사령관, 빨리 도망쳐.&n죽지는 않겠지만 죽을 만큼 아플 수 있어.​

1001405337.english: ...You're here? It's nothing. Since I'm the technical advisor, I just need to keep things in order whenever I have a spare moment. Everyone needs to be happy with the Commander for a long, long time, right? ...When that time comes, I hope I'll be the closest to him. I'm more possessive than I look.
1001405337.korean: ...왔어? 별거 아니야. 내가 기술 고문이니까,&n틈틈이 정비해놔야지. 다들 사령관이랑&n오래오래 행복하게 지내야 하잖아? ...그때는,&n내가 제일 가까이에 있었으면 좋겠네.&n나, 보기보다 독점욕 강하거든.​

1001405338.english: W-wait a moment. This dress is actually holographic, so if you do that, it will just touch you directly. ...Yes. Th-my underwear too...
1001405338.korean: 자, 잠깐만요.&n이 드레스는 사실 홀로그램이라&n 그렇게 하시면 직접 닿아버려요.&n...네. 소, 속옷도...​

1001405339.english: You ask why a wedding dress when there are so many other outfits... Do you still not understand? Then I’ll let you know after one more shoot. Please do your best this time too, Commander.
1001405339.korean: 다른 의상도 많은데 왜 웨딩드레스냐니...&n아직도 모르시겠어요?&n그럼 한번 더 촬영하면 알려드릴게요.&n이번에도 최선을 다해주세요, 사령관님.​

1001405340.english: Nicotine and caffeine. To me, they are more important than the three major nutrients. Aren't they bad for the body? Well... creating things isn't easy, you know. I don't think it's a bad idea to replace the agony of creation with health.
1001405340.korean: 니코틴과 카페인. 내겐 3대 영양소보다&n더 중요한 성분이야. 몸에 나쁘지 않냐고? 글쎄...&n뭘 만드는 게 쉬운 일은 아니잖아. 창작의 고뇌를&n건강으로 대체하는 것도 나쁘지 않은 거 같은데.​

1001405341.english: I developed a nutritional supplement. The Commander told me to take care of my health whenever I could. This time, I conducted proper clinical trials... Right, I haven't tested it on a man. ...Did you swallow it already? Ah... I guess it can't be helped. Still, if you do it like last time, I'll be ruined, so be gentle... Understood?
1001405341.korean: 영양제를 개발해봤어. 사령관이 틈틈이 건강&n챙기랬으니까. 이번엔 제대로 임상 시험...&n맞다, 남자한테는 시험한 적 없구나.&n...혹시 벌써 삼켰어? 아... 어쩔 수 없네.&n그래도 저번처럼 하면 내가 망가지니까,&n자상하게... 알겠지?​

1001405342.english: In this appearance, not only yours but also my own desires are projected. The desire to be loved by you, who saved me... a feeling I cannot bear not to express. So... there is no need to refuse. So... please be faithful to your desires.
1001405342.korean: 이 모습에는, 당신뿐만이 아니라 제 욕망도&n투영됐어요. 저를 구원해 준 당신에게 사랑받고&n싶다는... 그런, 표현하지 않고는 견딜 수 없는&n마음이요. 그러니까... 사양할 필요는 없어요.&n그러니까... 당신의 욕망에 충실해주세요.​

1001405343.english: Haa... You've worked so hard... Hehe, sticking so close, we look just like a newlywed couple. Someday, even if it's not for filming, really... No, never mind. Right, do you know something? That I really, really like you, Commander!
1001405343.korean: 흐아... 고생 많으셨어요... 후후, 찰싹&n달라붙어 있으니 꼭 신혼부부 같네요.&n언젠가 촬영이 아니더라도 진짜로...&n아니에요. 맞다, 그거 아세요?&n제가 사령관님을 정말정말 좋아하는 거!

1001405344.english: You said you were tired before, right? Drink this. It's an improved version of an energy drink, so you'll be fine even if you stay awake for a week. Probably. Huh? We haven't done the clinical trials yet— ...I didn't expect this kind of effect. You should be back to normal once you relieve the tension. Use as much as you want.
1001405344.korean: 전에 피곤하다 그랬지? 마셔. 에너지 드링크를&n개량한 건데, 일주일을 깨있어도 멀쩡할 거야.&n아마도. 응? 임상시험은 아직 안 해봤-&n...이런 효과는 예상 못했는데. 적당히 해소하면&n돌아오겠지. 쓰고 싶은 만큼 써.​

1001405345.english: I can't take it anymore. Commander, telling me to quit smoking completely seems a bit too much. … Hmm. It's true that I should quit for the sake of the future... *Sigh*... Can't you just smoke until today? Please? Please~
1001405345.korean: 더는 못 참겠어. 사령관, 아예 금연하라는 건&n너무한 거 같아. …으음. 나중을 위해서 끊어야&n되는 건 맞는데... 후우... 딱 오늘까지만&n피면 안 돼? 응? 제발~​

1001405346.english: I'm ready. Please... do as you wish.
1001405346.korean: 마음의 준비는 됐어요.&n부디... 당신이 원하는 대로 해주세요.​

1001405347.english: Please follow the script, Commander. This isn't how it's supposed to start.

1001405348.english: ...It's not that I'm not interested. I've heard a lot from the kids. It's a hassle for me to move, so I'll leave it to the Commander.
1001405348.korean: ...흥미 없는 건 아니야.&n애들한테 많이 들었으니까. 내가&n움직이는 건 귀찮으니 사령관한테 맡길게.​

1001405349.english: The Commander was entirely to blame. You corrupted me when I was pure and innocent. How are you going to take responsibility? Yeah... just kidding. Because this time, I'm going to take action too.
1001405349.korean: 전부 사령관이 나빴어.&n티 없이 순수했던 나를 타락시켰잖아.&n어떻게 책임질 거야? 응... 농담이야.&n이번엔 나도 움직일 거니까.​

1001405350.english: Every time your gentle touch reaches me,&nI feel truly happy. But... it's okay to be a little more&nfaithful to your desires.&nBecause I'm hoping for that too.
1001405350.korean: 당신의 다정한 손길이 닿을 때마다,&n저는 정말 행복해요. 그래도... 좀 더,&n욕망에 충실해져도 괜찮아요.&n저도 그걸 바라고 있으니까.​

1001405351.english: I was doing well sticking to the script...&nBut when we became sincere halfway through, it must have shown, right?&nFrom now on, let's keep it off the record... okay?
1001405351.korean: 대본대로 잘하고 있었는데...&n중간에 저희 진심이 됐던 거, 티났겠죠?&n이제는 오프 더 레코드로... 네?

1001405352.english: Well, I still don't really know what I like.&nBut I want to keep seeing that expression on the Commander's face,&nthe one where they're focused only on me.
1001405352.korean: 글쎄. 아직도 뭐가 좋은지는 잘 모르겠어.&n그래도 사령관의 그 표정. 나한테만 집중하는&n그 표정이 계속해서 보고 싶어.​

1001405353.english: It was all the Commander's fault.&nYou corrupted me, who was pure without a trace.&nHow are you going to take responsibility? Hmm... just kidding.&nThis time, I'm going to make a move too.
1001405353.korean: 전부 사령관이 나빴어.&n티 없이 순수했던 나를 타락시켰잖아.&n어떻게 책임질 거야? 응... 농담이야.&n이번엔 나도 움직일 거니까.​

1001405354.english: Thank you for letting me be by your side.&nTruly...&nI love you.
1001405354.korean: 당신의 옆자리에 제가 있을 수&n있게 해줘서 고마워요. 정말로...&n사랑하고 있어요.​

1001405355.english: We have to keep filming from now on.&nThere are so many precious moments we might miss without thinking.&nWe have to record them all. Huh...? Just now!&nThat smile was really nice just now, could you smile one more time?&nOkay? Ah~ just once more~
1001405355.korean: 앞으로도 촬영은 쭉~ 계속해야죠.&n무심코 지나치는 소중한 순간들이 얼마나&n많은데요. 전부 기록해야죠. 어...? 방금!&n방금 미소 되게 좋았는데, 한번만 더&n웃어 주시면 안 돼요? 네? 아~ 한번만요~​

1001405356.english: It's really strange. There's information left about humans,&nbut the Commander is different from any record.&nIf I study why I fell for you, will I understand?&n...I'm going to take a blood sample.
1001405356.korean: 참 신기해. 인간에 대한 정보는 남아있지만,&n사령관은 그 어떤 기록과도 남달라.&n내가 왜 반하게 됐는지 연구하면 알 수 있을까?&n...혈액 좀 채취할게.​

1001405357.english: Um... doesn't it look strange? Although others styled me up, it doesn't really look like me... Savior, are you... uh, is that so... That's a relief...
1001405357.korean: 저... 이상하지 않은가요?&n다른 분들께서 꾸며주시긴 했지만,&n평소에 제 모습이 아니라서... 혹시&n구원자님께서는... 그, 그런가요... 다행이에요...​

1001405358.english: My name is Melite, Queen of Chocoland! You ask if Chocoland really exists? Hmph. I am Chocoland itself. In other words, as long as I exist, the Kingdom of Chocoland also exists!
1001405358.korean: 내 이름은 멜리테, 초코랜드의 여왕이다!&n초코랜드가 진짜 있냐고?&n흥. 내가 바로 초코랜드 그 자체인 것을.&n즉, 내가 있는 한 초코랜드 왕국 또한 실존한다!​

1001405359.english: "Making my husband happy is part of a queen's duties, after all.&nWe have plenty of money, so if there's anything you want...&nMe? I... hmm... this is a problem. Aside from my husband,&nI can't think of anything I want.&nBut since he's practically mine already... hmm..."
1001405359.korean: 낭군을 기쁘게 하는 것도 여왕의 일이지.&n돈은 충분하니 갖고 싶은 게 있다면 뭐든...&n나? 나는... 음... 큰일이군. 낭군 말고는&n갖고 싶은 게 떠오르지 않는다.&n그런데 이미 내 거나 마찬가지니... 음...​

1001405360.english: Merely a High Rank Angel, how dare I be alone with the Savior... Y-I'll go back, after all. I'll leave the High Rank Angels separately... Huh...? Savior, are you... disappointed?
1001405360.korean: 지품천사에 불과한 제가 감히 구원자님과&n단둘이... 여, 역시 돌아갈게요.&n치품천사님들에게는 제가 따로... 어...?&n구원자님, 아쉬워하고... 계시나요?​

1001405361.english: To establish a nation, you need vast territory... That's right! I will conquer, conquer, and conquer everything in sight!
1001405361.korean: 나라를 세우기 위해선 광활한 영토가 필요하지...&n그래! 눈에 보이는 모든 걸 점령하고, 점령하고,&n또 점령하는 것이다!​

1001405362.english: Before reaching my coming-of-age ceremony, I will transform Chocoland from a kingdom into an empire. With everyone's blessings, we will ascend the throne and spread Chocoland's prestige throughout the world!
1001405362.korean: 성인식을 맞기 전에 초코랜드를&n왕국이 아닌 제국으로 만들겠다.&n모두의 축복을 받으며 우리는 황위에 올라,&n전 세계에 초코랜드의 위명을 알리는 거다!

1001405363.english: What exactly is a date supposed to be... What is a date even in the first place? I know it means spending time together... but lovers? Me and you, Savior?! I, I don't have such blasphemous thoughts...! Just, just a little...
1001405363.korean: 데이트라는 건 뭘 하면 되는 걸까요...&n애초에 데이트란 뭘까요? 시간을 함께&n보낸다는 뜻은 알고 있는데...&n연인, 이요? 구원자님이랑 제가요?!&n저, 저는 그런 불경한 생각은...! 아주, 조금...​

1001405364.english: I’ve been in a great mood since this morning. Alright, it’s a festival! I don’t have to worry about money, so I’m going to throw it on the grandest and most spectacular note possible!
1001405364.korean: 오늘은 아침부터 몹시 기분이 좋군.&n좋아, 축제다! 돈은 걱정하지 않아도 되니&n최고로 화려하게, 거창하게 여는 것이다!​

1001405365.english: My dear! A new island has been discovered right ahead. Let's conquer it— Chocolate and snacks? For me? … Conquest requires full preparation, so I accept your proposal, my dear. Ah! How about we feed each other?
1001405365.korean: 낭군! 이 앞에 새로운 섬이 발견됐다.&n어서 점령- 초콜릿과 과자? 날 위해?&n…점령도 만반의 준비가 필요하지,&n낭군의 제안을 받아들이겠다.&n아! 서로 먹여주는 건 어떤가?

1001405366.english: When I get back, I should tell them that the Savior praised my clothes. The angels took care of me this morning too— huh...? This can't be... Why are their emotions here...?
1001405366.korean: 돌아가면 구원자님이 제 옷을 칭찬하셨다고&n전해 드려야겠어요. 오늘 아침에도 천사님들께서&n저를 챙겨- 어...? 이럴 리가 없는데...&n그분들의 감정이 왜 이곳에...?​

1001405367.english: Sweet candies on the ground, an endlessly rising chocolate fountain—these are all destined to become the famous landmarks of Chocoland. How about it, Admiral? You think you could become a founding father of the nation right now? I’ll give you plenty of time, so think it over carefully!
1001405367.korean: 바닥에는 달콤한 사탕, 무한히 솟아나는&n초코 분수, 모두 초코랜드의 명물이 될 것들이지.&n어떤가, 제독. 지금이라면 개국 공신이 될 수 있다고?&n시간은 넉넉히 줄 테니 곰곰이 생각해보도록!​

1001405368.english: "Making my husband happy is part of a queen's duties, after all.&nWe have plenty of money, so if there's anything you want...&nMe? I... hmm... this is a problem. Aside from my husband,&nI can't think of anything I want.&nBut since he's practically mine already... hmm..."
1001405368.korean: 낭군을 기쁘게 하는 것도 여왕의 일이지.&n돈은 충분하니 갖고 싶은 게 있다면 뭐든...&n나? 나는... 음... 큰일이군. 낭군 말고는&n갖고 싶은 게 떠오르지 않는다.&n그런데 이미 내 거나 마찬가지니... 음...​

1001405369.english: Are you okay? You rowed all by yourself, so I'll help. If you want me to leave it to you since it's a date... I guess I have no choice. Instead, let's take turns rowing on the way back. It's a bit cramped, so I'll have to sit on your lap, Savior... but it's a date!
1001405369.korean: 괜찮으세요? 혼자 노를 저으셨는데&n저도 도울게요. 데이트니까 맡겨 달라고 하시면...&n어쩔 수 없네요. 대신 돌아갈 땐 한쪽씩 저어요.&n자리가 좁아서 구원자님 무릎에 앉아야겠지만...&n데이트니까요!​

1001405370.english: A can of tuna? Don't you get it if you give Fatima a stone floating in the sea? Hmm... Speaking of which, Finance Minister Amphitrite is managing the treasury for my coming-of-age ceremony. Of course, I will invite the Admiral as well!
1001405370.korean: 참치캔? 바다에 떠있는 돌멩이를 파티마에게&n주면 받는 것 아닌가? 흐음... 안 그래도&n엠피트리테 재정부장관이 내 성인식을 위해&n국고를 관리하고 있지. 물론 제독도 초대하겠다!​

1001405371.english: Before reaching my coming-of-age ceremony, I will transform Chocoland from a kingdom into an empire. With everyone's blessings, we will ascend the throne and spread Chocoland's prestige throughout the world!
1001405371.korean: 성인식을 맞기 전에 초코랜드를&n왕국이 아닌 제국으로 만들겠다.&n모두의 축복을 받으며 우리는 황위에 올라,&n전 세계에 초코랜드의 위명을 알리는 거다!

1001405372.english: Ah...! Oh, no. Your heart... has completely flowed in... I can feel it all, so it would be unfair if you didn't know. So... if it's like this... you understand my heart too, right...?
1001405372.korean: 앗...! 아, 아니에요. 구원자님의 마음이...&n전부 흘러들어와서... 저는 전부 느낄 수 있는데,&n구원자님은 모르시면 불공평하겠네요. 그러니까...&n이러면... 구원자님도 제 마음, 아시겠죠...?​

1001405373.english: It has been quite some time since I joined the Admiral. Hehe, Chocoland is growing prosperous day by day... Yes, if I capture a suitable spot this time, I will bestow that land upon the Admiral. You will become the Admiral and Duke of Chocoland! And, and... if the Admiral doesn't mind, stabilizing the internal situation by becoming King through a marriage alliance is also...
1001405373.korean: 제독과 함께한 지도 꽤 지났군. 후후, 초코랜드도&n날이 갈수록 부강해지고 있고… 그래, 이번에&n적당한 곳을 점령하면 그 땅은 제독에게&n하사하겠다. 초코랜드의 제독이자 공작이&n되는 거지! 그, 그리고… 제독만 싫지 않다면,&n혼약을 통해 왕이 되어 내부를 안정시키는 것도…​

1001405374.english: My dear! A new island has been discovered right ahead. Let's conquer it— Chocolate and snacks? For me? … Conquest requires full preparation, so I accept your proposal, my dear. Ah! How about we feed each other?
1001405374.korean: 낭군! 이 앞에 새로운 섬이 발견됐다.&n어서 점령- 초콜릿과 과자? 날 위해?&n…점령도 만반의 준비가 필요하지,&n낭군의 제안을 받아들이겠다.&n아! 서로 먹여주는 건 어떤가?

1001405375.english: Eek...?! I-I'm sorry. My hat almost flew off...

1001405376.english: Hmm... I feel a bit strange treating you like a child, so please stop.
1001405376.korean: 으음...&n왠지 어린애 대하는 것 같아서&n기분이 묘하니 그만두거라.​

1001405377.english: As expected, my husband's embrace is the coziest... I never knew having a home to return to would bring such reassurance...
1001405377.korean: 역시 낭군의 품이 제일 아늑하군...&n돌아올 보금자리가 있다는 게,&n이렇게나 안심이 될 줄은...​

1001405378.english: Um, would it be alright if I cover with my hat...?&nThe Light may permit it, but thinking that not only&nthe Savior but also others might see... I feel so embarrassed...
1001405378.korean: 저어, 모자로 가려도 될까요...?&n빛께서도 허락하시겠지만... 구원자님만이 아닌&n다른 분도 본다고 생각하니... 많이, 부끄러워요...​

1001405379.english: Hmmhmm, very good.&nTo strengthen the bond of our trust even further,&ndo not stop petting me, Admiral!
1001405379.korean: 음음, 아주 좋군.&n우리의 신뢰관계가 더욱 굳건해지도록&n쉬지 말고 쓰다듬는 것이다, 제독!​

1001405380.english: As expected, my beloved's arms are the coziest...&nKnowing that I have a home to return to,&nI never imagined it would feel this reassuring...
1001405380.korean: 역시 낭군의 품이 제일 아늑하군...&n돌아올 보금자리가 있다는 게,&n이렇게나 안심이 될 줄은...​

1001405381.english: Hehe~♪ Ah, did you hear? I think I got a little excited&nbecause I felt my partner's emotions. Later,&nI'm already looking forward to our promised date.
1001405381.korean: 흐흐흥~♪ 아, 들으셨어요? 반려님의 감정이&n느껴져서 저도 좀 들떴었나봐요. 있다가&n데이트하기로 한 거, 벌써부터 기대돼요.​

1001405382.english: My beloved, did you steal my chocolates and candies again!&nYou promised you would brush your teeth before bed,&nyet you took them without permission...! According to the national law of Choco Land,&nthe punishment is... tickling!
1001405382.korean: 낭군, 또 내 초콜릿과 사탕을 가져갔는가!&n자기 전에 양치질 할 거라고 약속했는데&n멋대로 가져가다니...! 초코랜드의 국법에 따라&n간지럽히기 형벌이다!​

1001405383.english: I'm Dr. Man! I modified my body into a cyborg to master the pinnacle of science- Ahahaha, big brother, that tickles~ Stop, stop it~
1001405383.korean: 나는 Dr.닥터맨!&n몸을 사이보그로 개조해서 과학의 극의를-&n아하하핫, 오빠, 간지러워~ 그만, 그마안~​

1001405384.english: How is it, Master? They say this outfit drives away bad energy and attracts good things! Since they said the closer you are, the better, Hachiko of Castling will stick right by your side today!
1001405384.korean: 어때요, 주인님? 이 의상이 나쁜 기운을&n쫓아내고, 좋은 건 불러 들인대요!&n가까이 있을수록 좋다고 그랬으니까,&n오늘 하치코가 주인님 곁에 꼭 붙어있을게요!​

1001405385.english: Are the City Guards here too? It's been a while since we last met, so I thought I'd say hello first. Is Sadius here too? ...It's nothing. We used to be on the same team, and also... we have similar hobbies.
1001405385.korean: 시티 가드 애들도 여기 있어? 오랜만에&n만났으니 인사부터 먼저 하려고. 사디어스도&n여기 있지? ...별거 아냐. 옛날에 같은&n팀이기도 했고, 또... 비슷한 취미를 가졌거든.​

1001405386.english: Freeze! I'm arresting you! ...Look at this, you're a total repeat offender. Were you working overtime again? You've been sternly reprimanded more than once or twice; surely you aren't intentionally getting caught repeatedly, are you? You're facing aggravated punishment for contempt of court, Boss.
1001405386.korean: 꼼짝 마, 체포한다! ...이거 봐, 완전 상습범이네.&n또 추가 근무하고 있었어? 따끔하게 혼나는 것도&n한두 번이 아닌데, 설마 일부러 계속잡히는 건&n아니지? 괘씸죄로 가중처벌이야, 보스.​

1001405387.english: Hehehe, right now I am a true mad scientist! Another evil invention today—Huh? ...I don't know anything about that, my major is different!
1001405387.korean: 큭큭큭, 지금의 나는 그야말로&n매드 사이언티스트! 오늘도 사악한 발명품을-&n응? ...그건 전공이 달라서 모른다!

1001405388.english: Hachiko of Castling has learned how to tell fortunes! Here, just put your hand in the lucky pouch and pick one. Then, Hachiko of Castling will read the slip and tell you your fortune for the year!
1001405388.korean: 하치코, 점괘 보는 거 배워왔어요!&n여기, 복주머니에 손을 넣고 하나 뽑으시면 돼요.&n그러면 하치코가 제비를 보고&n올해 운세를 봐드릴게요!​

1001405389.english: It’s fine to be enthusiastic... but Boss, remember how the law changed by majority vote last time? Overwork is illegal now, too. I’ll let it slide with a warning this time, but next time I’m arresting you. Got it?
1001405389.korean: 의욕이 넘치는 건 좋은데... 보스, 저번에&n다수결로 법 바뀐 거 기억하지? 이젠 과로도&n불법이야. 한 번은 경고로 넘어가겠는데&n다음엔 체포할 거야. 알았어?​

1001405390.english: I came to ask for some advice. I just can't concentrate on my work whenever I think about what happened with you, Boss. I made sure there's no one around... so you'll hang out with me, right, Boss? You can't refuse.
1001405390.korean: 고민 상담 때문에 찾아왔어. 보스랑 있었던&n일만 떠올리면 일에 집중이 안 되더라고.&n주변에 아무도 없는 건 미리 확인해뒀으니...&n나랑 어울려 줄 거지, 보스? 거절은 안 돼.​

1001405391.english: Hehehe, Oppa. I've wanted to tell you this for a while... Why don't you help me with some research? You know we officially launched a Ph.D. program recently, right? I'll make sure to take good care of you. Okay?
1001405391.korean: 에헤헤, 오빠. 전부터 말하고 싶었는데...&n날 도와서 연구 좀 해보지 않을래? 얼마 전에&n우리 정식으로 박사과정 도입한 거 알지?&n내가 잘 챙겨줄게. 응? ​

1001405392.english: Happy New Year, Master! Hachiko of Castling has filled a lucky pouch with items said to bring good luck. Here you go! Do you like it?
1001405392.korean: 새해 복 많이 받으세요, 주인님!&n행운을 가져다 준다는 물건을&n하치코가 복주머니에 가득 담아왔어요.&n여기요! 맘에 드세요?​

1001405393.english: If you've done something wrong, you should be punished according to the law. Don't worry about public safety, Boss. As long as I'm here, I won't let anyone break the law.
1001405393.korean: 잘못을 했으면 법에 따라 처벌받아야지.&n치안은 걱정하지 마, 보스. 내가 있는 한,&n누구도 위법 행위를 저지르게 두지 않겠어.​

1001405394.english: Do you know there's a side the boss only shows me when we're alone? Just thinking about that look gives me the chills all over. I wasn't always like this. The boss made me this way.
1001405394.korean: 보스가 나랑 단둘이 있을 때만 보여주는 모습이&n있단 거, 알고 있어? 그 표정, 생각만 해도 온몸이&n오싹오싹해져. 내가 원래 이랬던 게 아냐.&n보스가 날 이렇게 만든 거야.​

1001405395.english: I'm Dr. Man! I modified my body into a cyborg to master the pinnacle of science- Ahahaha, big brother, that tickles~ Stop, stop it~
1001405395.korean: 나는 Dr.닥터맨!&n몸을 사이보그로 개조해서 과학의 극의를-&n아하하핫, 오빠, 간지러워~ 그만, 그마안~​

1001405396.english: Haa... Hah! This isn't the time to be doing this. Hachiko of Castling has to... stop... the bad energy coming toward you, Master... Ugh... Hehe... Masteryy. Please pet me a little more... Hwaaaang...
1001405396.korean: 흐아... 핫! 이러고 있을 때가 아니에요.&n하치코가 주인님에게 찾아오는 나쁜 기운을...&n우응... 막아야... 헤헤... 주인니이임.&n좀 더 어루만져 주세요... 흐아아앙...​

1001405397.english: It’s rare for a City Guard to be idle, but it’s quite peaceful here. At this rate, I could take it easy. It’s a shame I can’t enjoy my hobbies, though... You’ll help? Hmm... Can you handle it, Boss?
1001405397.korean: 시티 가드가 한가한 경우는 드문데, 참 평화롭네.&n이 정도면 쉬엄쉬엄해도 되겠어. 취미 생활을&n못 즐기는 건 아쉽지만... 도와준다고? 흐음...&n감당할 수 있겠어, 보스?​

1001405398.english: Freeze! I'm arresting you! ...Look at this, you're a total repeat offender. Were you working overtime again? You've been sternly reprimanded more than once or twice; surely you aren't intentionally getting caught repeatedly, are you? You're facing aggravated punishment for contempt of court, Boss.
1001405398.korean: 꼼짝 마, 체포한다! ...이거 봐, 완전 상습범이네.&n또 추가 근무하고 있었어? 따끔하게 혼나는 것도&n한두 번이 아닌데, 설마 일부러 계속잡히는 건&n아니지? 괘씸죄로 가중처벌이야, 보스.​

1001405399.english: Hehehe, Oppa. I've wanted to tell you this for a while... Why don't you help me with some research? You know we officially launched a Ph.D. program recently, right? I'll make sure to take good care of you. Okay?
1001405399.korean: 에헤헤, 오빠. 전부터 말하고 싶었는데...&n날 도와서 연구 좀 해보지 않을래? 얼마 전에&n우리 정식으로 박사과정 도입한 거 알지?&n내가 잘 챙겨줄게. 응? ​

1001405400.english: They say this lucky cat is famous for bringing good luck! Besides that, I filled it up with gold coins and fortune slips... but it still feels like something is missing. Ah! Should Hachiko of Castling go in here?
1001405400.korean: 이 복고양이가 행운을 가져오기로 유명하대요!&n그것 말고도 금화랑, 운세 제비랑 가득&n담았는데... 아직도 뭔가 부족한 것 같아요.&n아! 하치코가 여기 들어갈까요?

1001405401.english: Boss, how have you been? Here, take this. People have been sending me 'small tokens of goodwill' from here and there. Public safety? Not a problem at all! Don't worry. … You ask if I really got this as a gift? Boss, too much curiosity can be poison~
1001405401.korean: 보스, 잘 있었어? 자, 받아. 여기저기서&n'작은 성의 표시'를 해 주더라고. 치안?&n전혀 문제없었지! 아무 걱정 마.&n…정말 선물받은 거냐고? 보스.&n호기심이 지나치면 독이 될 수 있다구~

1001405402.english: I came to ask for some advice. I just can't concentrate on my work whenever I think about what happened with you, Boss. I made sure there's no one around... so you'll hang out with me, right, Boss? You can't refuse.
1001405402.korean: 고민 상담 때문에 찾아왔어. 보스랑 있었던&n일만 떠올리면 일에 집중이 안 되더라고.&n주변에 아무도 없는 건 미리 확인해뒀으니...&n나랑 어울려 줄 거지, 보스? 거절은 안 돼.​

1001405403.english: Hehehe, right now I am a true mad scientist! Another evil invention today—Huh? ...I don't know anything about that, my major is different!
1001405403.korean: 큭큭큭, 지금의 나는 그야말로&n매드 사이언티스트! 오늘도 사악한 발명품을-&n응? ...그건 전공이 달라서 모른다!

1001405404.english: Hmm~ Would you like to try drawing again, Master? The one next to that one! Let's see... Wow~ It's Great Fortune! This year will be full of nothing but good things, Master! As a reward, please pet Hachiko. Hehe, keep at it!
1001405404.korean: 으음~ 다시 뽑아 보실래요, 주인님?&n그 옆에 걸로요! 어디... 와아~ 대길이에요!&n올해도 좋은 일만 가득하실 거예요, 주인님!&n복채로 하치코를 쓰다듬어주세요.&n헤헤, 계속요!

1001405405.english: I knew this would happen. You're working secretly again. I feel like I've warned you several times already... I'm going to arrest you red-handed. What should be done about an outlaw who doesn't follow the rules? I suppose I should teach you a good scolding, right?
1001405405.korean: 이럴 줄 알았어, 또 몰래 일하고 있네. 벌써&n몇 번 경고한 것 같은데... 현행범으로 체포하겠어.&n규칙을 따르지 않는 무법자는 어떡해야 좋을까.&n따끔하게 혼내줘야겠지?​

1001405406.english: Do you know there's a side the boss only shows me when we're alone? Just thinking about that look gives me the chills all over. I wasn't always like this. The boss made me this way.
1001405406.korean: 보스가 나랑 단둘이 있을 때만 보여주는 모습이&n있단 거, 알고 있어? 그 표정, 생각만 해도 온몸이&n오싹오싹해져. 내가 원래 이랬던 게 아냐.&n보스가 날 이렇게 만든 거야.​

1001405407.english: Right... Even the most evil-looking villain needed this little warmth... Oppa, do more. Please?
1001405407.korean: 그래... 아무리 사악해 보이는 악당이라도,&n이런 작은 따뜻함이 필요했던 거야...&n오빠, 더 해줘. 응응?​

1001405408.english: Hwaaang...! Master... Hachiko of Castling, my heart is pounding...

1001405409.english: Boss~? Looks like you don't realize what happens if you move your hands carelessly... Should I correct you a little?
1001405409.korean: 보스~? 손 함부로 놀리면&n어떻게 되는지 모르나 본데...&n내가 좀 교정해 줘?​

1001405410.english: You seem genuinely happy these days. But you still have a long way to go. You were lost in thought just a moment ago, weren't you? I'm going to teach you a lesson thoroughly, Boss, so that you can focus only on me when you're with me.
1001405410.korean: 요새는 좀 진심으로 기뻐하는 것 같네.&n그래도 아직 멀었어. 방금 전에도 딴 생각했지?&n나랑 있을 땐 나한테만 집중할 수 있게...&n철저히 교정해 줄게, 보스.​

1001405411.english: Yeah... no matter how evil a villain might look,&nthey still need a bit of warmth like this...&nBig Brother, do more. Okay?
1001405411.korean: 그래... 아무리 사악해 보이는 악당이라도,&n이런 작은 따뜻함이 필요했던 거야...&n오빠, 더 해줘. 응응?​

1001405412.english: Hehe... Hachiko should be giving back,&nbut I keep receiving from Master... This time,&nmay Hachiko make Master happy instead?&nYes, Master?
1001405412.korean: 헤헤... 하치코가 보답해야 하는데,&n자꾸 주인님한테 받기만 하네요... 이번엔&n하치코가 주인님을 기쁘게 해드려도 될까요?&n네, 주인님?​

1001405413.english: Your reaction is much more satisfying than last time, but still...&nit looks like you're just humoring me a little...&nJust wait. Soon, I'll make you truly rejoice.
1001405413.korean: 저번보단 훨씬 만족스러운 반응이지만, 뭐...&n아직도 좀 맞춰주는 것 같아 보이는데...&n기대해. 곧, 진심으로 기뻐하게 만들어줄게.​

1001405414.english: These days you seem to be honestly happy.&nBut it's still not enough. Just now,&nyou were distracted again, weren't you?&nWhen you're with me, you should focus only on me...&nI'll thoroughly correct that, Boss.
1001405414.korean: 요새는 좀 진심으로 기뻐하는 것 같네.&n그래도 아직 멀었어. 방금 전에도 딴 생각했지?&n나랑 있을 땐 나한테만 집중할 수 있게...&n철저히 교정해 줄게, 보스.​

1001405415.english: How was it, Big Brother? Ehehe, fun, right!&nWhat should we do next time to play?&nMaybe it's fine to think about it later?
1001405415.korean: 어때, 오빠? 에헤헤, 재밌었지!&n다음에는 또 어떤 걸 하고 놀면 좋을까.&n그때 가서 생각해도 늦지 않으려나?

1001405416.english: Master, how was it? Something good happened today, right?&nHehe! Hachiko prayed sincerely&nso Master could be blessed! It came true, right?
1001405416.korean: 주인님, 어떠셨어요? 오늘 좋은 일이 일어났죠?&n헤헤! 하치코가 주인님이 복 받을 수 있도록&n정성껏 소원 빌었거든요! 이뤄졌죠?

1001405417.english: ...No, I just suddenly found it funny.&nI used to think I'd never fall deeply for someone.&nBut seeing you just now, Boss,&nI realized I was wrong.
1001405417.korean: ...아냐, 갑자기 우스워서. 내가 누군가한테&n푹 빠질 일은 없을 거라고 생각했었거든.&n그게 틀렸단걸, 방금 보스를 보고 깨달았어. ​

1001405418.english: "N2E-888 Arachne, the Spider Queen." Yes, that is exactly what you mean. I have reigned for unspeakable ages, yet I have never met anyone who dared to covet the throne. Will you give it a try?
1001405418.korean: "거미 여왕" 아라크네. 그래, 바로 이 몸을 뜻하지.&n이루 말할 수 없는 세월을 군림해왔지만&n아직도 왕좌를 넘보는 자는 만나보지 못했네.&n네가 한번 도전해보겠어?​

1001405419.english: How boring. There's nothing to play with, and nothing much to talk about... You'll have to take responsibility and entertain me, won't you? Before I get bored and start smashing something.
1001405419.korean: 따분하네. 가지고 놀 만한 것도 안 보이고,&n별다른 화제도 없으니...&n네가 책임지고 이 몸을 즐겁게 해야겠지?&n심심해서 뭐라도 부숴버리기 전에 말이야.​

1001405420.english: Toys deluding themselves into thinking they are strong. There is no game more thrilling than destroying them. When they realize their own weakness and submit to me... is there anything more intoxicating than that look on their face...!
1001405420.korean: 자신이 강하다고 착각하는 장난감들.&n그걸 망가뜨리는 것보다 짜릿한 놀이거리는&n없지. 자신의 나약함을 체감하고 이 몸에게&n굴복할 때... 그 표정만큼 황홀한 게 더 있을까...!​

1001405421.english: "N2E-888 Arachne, the Spider Queen." Yes, that is exactly what you mean. I have reigned for unspeakable ages, yet I have never met anyone who dared to covet the throne. Will you give it a try?
1001405421.korean: "거미 여왕" 아라크네. 그래, 바로 이 몸을 뜻하지.&n이루 말할 수 없는 세월을 군림해왔지만&n아직도 왕좌를 넘보는 자는 만나보지 못했네.&n네가 한번 도전해보겠어?​

1001405422.english: How boring. There's nothing to play with, and nothing much to talk about... You'll have to take responsibility and entertain me, won't you? Before I get bored and start smashing something.
1001405422.korean: 따분하네. 가지고 놀 만한 것도 안 보이고,&n별다른 화제도 없으니...&n네가 책임지고 이 몸을 즐겁게 해야겠지?&n심심해서 뭐라도 부숴버리기 전에 말이야.​

1001405423.english: Toys deluding themselves into thinking they are strong. There is no game more thrilling than destroying them. When they realize their own weakness and submit to me... is there anything more intoxicating than that look on their face...!
1001405423.korean: 자신이 강하다고 착각하는 장난감들.&n그걸 망가뜨리는 것보다 짜릿한 놀이거리는&n없지. 자신의 나약함을 체감하고 이 몸에게&n굴복할 때... 그 표정만큼 황홀한 게 더 있을까...!​

1001405424.english: Are all humans faithful to their desires? It’s an act that doesn’t excite me... but since it’s a rare treat, I suppose I’ll enjoy it.
1001405424.korean: 인간들은 하나같이 욕망에 충실한 거야?&n이 몸에겐 감흥 없는 행위지만...&n모처럼의 유희이니 한번 즐겨볼까.

1001405425.english: Humans are all faithful to their desires.&nIt's an act without meaning for me...&nBut since it's rare entertainment, I suppose I'll enjoy it once.
1001405425.korean: 인간들은 하나같이 욕망에 충실한 거야?&n이 몸에겐 감흥 없는 행위지만...&n모처럼의 유희이니 한번 즐겨볼까.

1001405426.english: Actually, I heard that my type wasn't exactly the most popular. I wore flashier fashion and makeup to hide that... but now it's different. I want to show the Commander a different side of myself every day. From now on, I'll only show you my cool side!
1001405426.korean: 사실, 나 같은 타입이 완전 잘 나가는 건&n아니었대. 그걸 숨기려고 더 화려한 패션과&n화장을 한 건데... 이젠 달라. 날마다 &n사령관에게 또 다른 매력을 가진 나를 보여주고&n싶어. 앞으로 더 쿨한 모습만 보여줄게!​

1001405427.english: ...Is there something on my face by any chance? You're always smiling whenever we cross paths, so I'm worried I might have looked clumsy. Do you mean because you like me...? I like you a lot, Commander, too.
1001405427.korean: ...혹시 제 얼굴에 뭐라도 묻었슴까?&n마주칠 때마다 웃고 계신데, 칠칠치 못한&n모습을 보였을까봐 신경쓰이지 말입니다.&n제가 좋아서, 말씀이심까...?&n저도 사령관님 많이 좋아함다.​

1001405428.english: Hmm~? What are you walking around with on your cheek? Being clumsy is cute, but if you keep going around like that, how will the other squad members see me? Come here. Where~ Hot! Is it because I like candles? I just... I couldn't help it.
1001405428.korean: 음~? 볼에 뭘 묻히고 다니는 거야?&n덜렁대는 점도 귀엽지만 그러고 다니면&n다른 대원들이 날 어떻게 보겠어. 이리 와봐.&n어디~ 핫! 초, 초 좋아해서 그런가.&n나도 모르게 그만...

1001405429.english: I have a lot of worries these days. I emphasize military discipline to the kids, but I feel like I'll let my guard down whenever I see you, Commander. Would it be okay if I set aside a day to let loose just once?
1001405429.korean: 요즘 걱정이 많슴다~ 애들한테 군인정신을&n강조하는데, 정작 제가 사령관님만 보면&n군기가 풀어질 것 같지 말입니다.&n언제 한번 날 잡고 풀어져도... 괜찮겠슴까?​

1001405430.english: I thought we would get used to each other the longer we spent together... but somehow, the more I see you, the more I like you. Don't you get super anxious if we're apart even for a moment? That's not cool at all~
1001405430.korean: 같이 있는 시간이 길어질수록 서로 익숙해질&n줄 알았는데... 어째, 볼수록 더 좋아지고 있어.&n잠시라도 떨어져 있으면 초 불안해지는 거&n아냐? 그건 쿨하지 못한데~​

1001405431.english: I used to hear a lot that I was like a tomboy, and while I didn't care back then, I don't care at all now. The person who matters most to me says they like me, so isn't it game over?
1001405431.korean: 선머슴 같다는 말을 옛날에 많이 들었는데,&n그 때도 신경 안 썼지만 지금은 더 상관 없지&n말입니다. 가장 중요한 사람이 저를 좋아한다고&n해주는데, 게임 끝난 거 아님까?

1001405432.english: Actually, I heard that my type wasn't exactly the most popular. I wore flashier fashion and makeup to hide that... but now it's different. I want to show the Commander a different side of myself every day. From now on, I'll only show you my cool side!
1001405432.korean: 사실, 나 같은 타입이 완전 잘 나가는 건&n아니었대. 그걸 숨기려고 더 화려한 패션과&n화장을 한 건데... 이젠 달라. 날마다 &n사령관에게 또 다른 매력을 가진 나를 보여주고&n싶어. 앞으로 더 쿨한 모습만 보여줄게!​

1001405433.english: ...Is there something on my face by any chance? You're always smiling whenever we cross paths, so I'm worried I might have looked clumsy. Do you mean because you like me...? I like you a lot, Commander, too.
1001405433.korean: ...혹시 제 얼굴에 뭐라도 묻었슴까?&n마주칠 때마다 웃고 계신데, 칠칠치 못한&n모습을 보였을까봐 신경쓰이지 말입니다.&n제가 좋아서, 말씀이심까...?&n저도 사령관님 많이 좋아함다.​

1001405434.english: Hmm~? What are you walking around with on your cheek? Being clumsy is cute, but if you keep going around like that, how will the other squad members see me? Come here. Where~ Hot! Is it because I like candles? I just... I couldn't help it.
1001405434.korean: 음~? 볼에 뭘 묻히고 다니는 거야?&n덜렁대는 점도 귀엽지만 그러고 다니면&n다른 대원들이 날 어떻게 보겠어. 이리 와봐.&n어디~ 핫! 초, 초 좋아해서 그런가.&n나도 모르게 그만...

1001405435.english: I have a lot of worries these days. I emphasize military discipline to the kids, but I feel like I'll let my guard down whenever I see you, Commander. Would it be okay if I set aside a day to let loose just once?
1001405435.korean: 요즘 걱정이 많슴다~ 애들한테 군인정신을&n강조하는데, 정작 제가 사령관님만 보면&n군기가 풀어질 것 같지 말입니다.&n언제 한번 날 잡고 풀어져도... 괜찮겠슴까?​

1001405436.english: I thought we would get used to each other the longer we spent together... but somehow, the more I see you, the more I like you. Don't you get super anxious if we're apart even for a moment? That's not cool at all~
1001405436.korean: 같이 있는 시간이 길어질수록 서로 익숙해질&n줄 알았는데... 어째, 볼수록 더 좋아지고 있어.&n잠시라도 떨어져 있으면 초 불안해지는 거&n아냐? 그건 쿨하지 못한데~​

1001405437.english: I used to hear a lot that I was like a tomboy, and while I didn't care back then, I don't care at all now. The person who matters most to me says they like me, so isn't it game over?
1001405437.korean: 선머슴 같다는 말을 옛날에 많이 들었는데,&n그 때도 신경 안 썼지만 지금은 더 상관 없지&n말입니다. 가장 중요한 사람이 저를 좋아한다고&n해주는데, 게임 끝난 거 아님까?

1001405438.english: Hey, wait a minute. What kind of face was I making...? Don't tease me! It's only natural to want to show only my pretty side in front of the Commander...
1001405438.korean: 자, 잠깐만. 나 어떤 표정 짓고 있었어...?&n놀리지 마아~! 사령관 앞에선&n예쁜 모습만 보이고 싶은 게 당연하잖아...​

1001405439.english: Hey, have you been working out lately? If it were the old days, by now... I-it's not that I dislike it. However... it's troublesome if it keeps coming to mind every time I see you, Commander...
1001405439.korean: 요, 요새 운동하셨슴까?&n예전 같았으면 이쯤에...&n시, 싫은 건 아님다. 다만... 사령관님 볼 때마다&n자꾸 떠오르면, 곤란하지 말입니다...​

1001405440.english: W-wait. What kind of face was I making...?&nDon't tease me~! In front of the Commander,&nof course I want to show only my pretty side...
1001405440.korean: 자, 잠깐만. 나 어떤 표정 짓고 있었어...?&n놀리지 마아~! 사령관 앞에선&n예쁜 모습만 보이고 싶은 게 당연하잖아...​

1001405441.english: H-have you been working out lately?&nIf it were like before, around this point...&nI-it's not that I dislike it. It's just... if I keep remembering it every time&nI see the Commander, it'll be... troublesome, sir...
1001405441.korean: 요, 요새 운동하셨슴까?&n예전 같았으면 이쯤에...&n시, 싫은 건 아님다. 다만... 사령관님 볼 때마다&n자꾸 떠오르면, 곤란하지 말입니다...​

1001405442.english: Were you waiting for me, Commander? You just arrived? Phew, that's a relief. I had so much to take care of that I didn't even realize how much time had passed. You're looking forward to the date itinerary I prepared, aren't you? It's going to be a truly special day!
1001405442.korean: 기다리셨어요, 사령관님? 방금 오셨다구요?&n휴, 다행이다. 신경 쓸 게 많아서&n어느새 시간이 이렇게 됐더라구요.&n제가 준비한 데이트 코스, 기대되시죠?&n정말 특별한 날이 될 거예요!​

1001405443.english: Oh! Captain, you're here? CoCo & WhiteShell and AC-6 Hussar forced me to wear this... It... looks weird, doesn't it? Can I go change?
1001405443.korean: 어! 대장, 왔어?&n코코랑 후사르가 억지로 입혔는데...&n이... 이상하지? 옷 갈아입고 와도 돼?​

1001405444.english: I also wield a shield like Frigga, but my role is different. My specialty is using the explosive leg strength derived from my bull genes to disrupt enemy formations and capture them alive. I am also confident in my paperwork skills, so please feel free to call me anytime if needed.
1001405444.korean: 저도 프리가 언니처럼 방패를 들지만&n역할이 다릅니다. 소의 유전자에서 나오는&n폭발적인 각력으로 적의 진영을 와해시키고&n생포하는 게 제 특기죠. 또 서류 업무에도&n자신 있으니 필요하면 언제든 불러주십시오.​

1001405445.english: It is said that I grew horns for a specific purpose. I do not allow anyone I do not trust to touch me... but I will permit it for you, Master. After all, I already belong to you.
1001405445.korean: 특정 수요를 위해 제게 뿔이 달렸다고 합니다.&n신뢰하는 사이가 아니면 손대게 하지 않지만...&n주인님에게라면 허락하겠습니다.&n이미 저는 주인님 것이니까요.​

1001405446.english: It's me, Orangeade! An elite dating expert who has read 10,000 romantic comedies! I'll make today's date the perfect one!
1001405446.korean: 저, 오렌지에이드! 1만 권의 러브코미디를 읽은&n엘리트 연애 전문가! 오늘의 데이트를&n완벽한 데이트로 만들어 보이겠어요!​

1001405447.english: Calling me pretty... Don't tease me, Captain. There are so many girls prettier and more feminine than me... Still... thank you.
1001405447.korean: 예쁘다니... 놀리지 마, 대장.&n나보다 예쁘고 여성스러운&n애들이 얼마나 많은데...&n그래도... 고마워.​

1001405448.english: I am not acting stiff on purpose. I was only trying to convey the necessary information to finish the schedule within the limited time, but if it came across as cold... I understand. I will try to be more friendly.
1001405448.korean: 일부러 딱딱하게 행동하는 건 아닙니다.&n한정된 시간에 일정을 끝내기 위해 필요 정보만&n전달하려던 건데, 차갑게 느껴지셨다면...&n알겠습니다, 좀 더 붙임성 좋게 행동하겠습니다.​

1001405449.english: Master, it is morning. You must begin your task... Ah?! ...No, you must get up. Last time you said just five minutes... Th-even if you look at me like that... Ugh...
1001405449.korean: 주인님, 아침입니다. 과업을 시작하셔야...&n앗?! ...안 됩니다, 일어나셔야 합니다.&n저번에도 5분만이라 하셨다가...&n그, 그런 눈으로 바라보셔도... 으으...​

1001405450.english: Hehe, today is usually a workday, but I like getting to play. Wait, is this part of the job too? I wish every field assignment were just like a date with the Commander—I could be happy or unhappy about it.
1001405450.korean: 헤헤, 원래 오늘은 일하는 날인데 놀게 되니&n좋아요. 아니, 이것도 업무의 일환인가?&n모든 외근이 더는 좋고 덜은 싫고&n사령관님과의 데이트만 같아라~​

1001405451.english: Huh? I can't spar? Then what about physical training? You're saying that's not allowed either? Then what on earth am I supposed to do... Ah! But I can still go stargazing, right?
1001405451.korean: 응? 스파링하면 안 돼? 그러면 체력 단련은?&n그것도 안 된다고? 그러면 대체 뭘 해야...&n아! 그래도 별구경은 가도 되지?​

1001405452.english: It is my ballpoint pen. Thank you for finding it. ...Do you mean the name tag? I always attach them to my belongings in case I lose them. The same goes for memos and records. Because I shouldn't lose them.
1001405452.korean: 제 볼펜이군요. 찾아주셔서 감사합니다.&n...이름표 말씀이십니까? 잃어버릴 걸 대비해&n항상 제 물건에 붙여 놓습니다. 메모도, 기록도&n마찬가지입니다. 잃어버려선 안 되니까요.​

1001405453.english: Are you awake? It’s nothing. I was just writing my name, just like last time. ...Are you saying it’s unfair? I see... Then I will write your name here, Master— You tell me not to? Hmm... For now, I will finish writing my name. Do not move.
1001405453.korean: 깨어나셨습니까? 별거 아닙니다, 저번처럼&n제 이름을 적고 있었습니다. ...불공평하다는&n말씀이십니까? 과연... 그럼 저도 여기에 주인님&n이름을- 그러지 말라고요? 흐음... 일단&n제 이름은 마저 적겠습니다. 움직이지 마십시오.​

1001405454.english: Wasn't that just too much of a movie, Commander? It's based on a manga that I really, really, really love, and to ruin it like this! Hmph, I just wanted to show you only the good stuff...
1001405454.korean: 방금 영화 너무하지 않았나요, 사령관님? 제가&n정말정말정말정말 좋아하는 만화가 원작인데,&n그걸 이런 식으로 망치다니! 힝,&n사령관님한테는 좋은 것만 보여드리고 싶었는데...​

1001405455.english: I didn't really like this outfit because it wasn't helpful in battle and just got in the way... but since the Captain said it suits me, I'm starting to like it for some reason. What should I wear for our next date? Huh, Captain?
1001405455.korean: 이 옷 전투에 도움도 안 되고, 거치적거리기만&n해서 별로였는데... 대장이 어울린다고 하니까,&n나도 왠지 맘에 들기 시작했어. 다음 데이트엔&n어떤 옷을 입고 나올까? 응, 대장?​

1001405456.english: Even as her younger sister, I can see that Frigga is outstanding, but she keeps treating me like a child... so she is a bit difficult to deal with. I guess I'll have to keep trying until she is recognized as a colleague.
1001405456.korean: 프리가 언니는 동생인 제가 봐도 뛰어나지만,&n자꾸 절 어린애 취급하셔서...&n조금, 대하기 까다롭습니다.&n동료로 인정받을 때까지 노력해야겠죠.​

1001405457.english: It is said that I grew horns for a specific purpose. I do not allow anyone I do not trust to touch me... but I will permit it for you, Master. After all, I already belong to you.
1001405457.korean: 특정 수요를 위해 제게 뿔이 달렸다고 합니다.&n신뢰하는 사이가 아니면 손대게 하지 않지만...&n주인님에게라면 허락하겠습니다.&n이미 저는 주인님 것이니까요.​

1001405458.english: Commander, Aww~ It's delicious, isn't it? It tastes even better since I'm feeding you, right? Hehehe! You're blushing! You're so cute. What? You're going to feed me too, Commander? Ah... ah... Aww~ I-I'm way, way more embarrassed than I thought. Still... it was super sweet.
1001405458.korean: 사령관님, 아앙~ 맛있죠? 제가 먹여드리니&n더 맛있죠? 에헤헷! 부끄러워하신다! 귀여우셔라.&n네? 사령관님께서도 먹여주신다구요?&n아... 아... 아앙~ 새, 생각보다 훠, 훨씬&n부끄럽네요. 그래도... 엄청 달콤했어요.​

1001405459.english: Captain, do you want to try connecting the stars I'm pointing to? That one and that one. Okay, then what do you see? Hehe, it looks like you to me. It's a constellation I made, the only one of its kind in the universe. I'm going to give it to you as a gift!
1001405459.korean: 대장, 내가 가리키는 별들을 한번 이어볼래?&n저거랑 저거. 응, 그러면 뭐가 보여?&n헤헷, 나는 대장으로 보이던데.&n우주에 단 하나밖에 없는, 내가 만든 별자리야.&n대장한테 선물할게!​

1001405460.english: ...Master, may I ask you a favor? It’s nothing difficult. Just hold my palm for a moment... As expected, writing my name makes me feel at ease. Thank you for your help. Huh? Can't I use a permanent marker?
1001405460.korean: ...주인님, 한 가지 부탁드려도 되겠습니까?&n어려운 건 아닙니다. 손바닥을 잠시...&n역시 이름을 적어놓으니 마음이 편하군요.&n도와주셔서 감사합니다.&n예? 유성 매직은 안 됩니까?​

1001405461.english: Master, it is morning. You must begin your task... Ah?! ...No, you must get up. Last time you said just five minutes... Th-even if you look at me like that... Ugh...
1001405461.korean: 주인님, 아침입니다. 과업을 시작하셔야...&n앗?! ...안 됩니다, 일어나셔야 합니다.&n저번에도 5분만이라 하셨다가...&n그, 그런 눈으로 바라보셔도... 으으...​

1001405462.english: The date course is, well, almost over. Ah, there is still... something left... but... you know... what the ending is... I'm counting on you until the very end... Commander.
1001405462.korean: 데, 데이트 코스가 거, 거의 다 끝났네요.&n아, 아직 남은 게... 있지만...&n그... 아시잖아요... 마지막이... 무엇인지...&n마지막까지 잘 부탁드려요... 사령관님.​

1001405463.english: I thought about it a lot. I wondered if there might be someone else who is a better fit for you than me... But that very worry was ignoring you, the one who likes me. I will never turn my eyes away from my heart again. I love you, Captain.
1001405463.korean: 고민 많이 했어. 나보다 대장과 어울리는&n애가 따로 있지 않을까, 하고... 그런데 그런&n걱정 자체가, 날 좋아해 주는 대장을 무시하는&n거였어. 다시는 내 마음에서 눈 돌리지 않을게.&n좋아해, 대장.​

1001405464.english: Being sociable is difficult. I don't think it will be easy to change in just one day. However, I will try my best to change as you said, Master. ...A reward? No, I haven't thought about it... Then, could you... pat my head?
1001405464.korean: 붙임성이란 어렵군요. 하루 만에 바뀌긴&n힘들 것 같습니다. 하지만 주인님의 말씀대로&n변할 수 있게 노력하겠습니다.&n...상이요? 아뇨, 생각해보지 않아서...&n그럼 머리를... 쓰다듬어 주실 수, 있으십니까?​

1001405465.english: Are you awake? It’s nothing. I was just writing my name, just like last time. ...Are you saying it’s unfair? I see... Then I will write your name here, Master— You tell me not to? Hmm... For now, I will finish writing my name. Do not move.
1001405465.korean: 깨어나셨습니까? 별거 아닙니다, 저번처럼&n제 이름을 적고 있었습니다. ...불공평하다는&n말씀이십니까? 과연... 그럼 저도 여기에 주인님&n이름을- 그러지 말라고요? 흐음... 일단&n제 이름은 마저 적겠습니다. 움직이지 마십시오.​

1001405466.english: Hehehe... What's wrong, Commander? We're still in the middle of a date...
1001405466.korean: 에헤헷... 왜 이러세요, 사령관님.&n아직 한창 데이트 중이잖아요...​

1001405467.english: Hey, wait, Captain. Don't touch me... Ugh, wearing these flowy, thin clothes makes me feel like I'm naked... I want to wear my original suit.
1001405467.korean: 자, 잠깐, 대장. 만지지 마... 으으,&n하늘하늘하고 얇은 옷을 입으니&n벌거벗은 거 같아...&n원래 입었던 슈트 입고 싶어.​

1001405468.english: There is still a scheduled workday remaining, Master. Please focus on your duties.
1001405468.korean: 계획된 일정이 남았습니다, 주인님.&n업무에 집중해 주십시오.​

1001405469.english: It's possible since cow genes are mixed in... but of course, it won't come out right now! Besides, that's... Master? Your gaze... Ah, no! Much earlier than the future schedule... No... The whole plan will be ruined...
1001405469.korean: 소 유전자가 섞여서 가능성은 있지만...&n지금은 당연히 안 나옵니다! 애초에 그건...&n주인님? 눈빛이... 아, 안 됩니다!&n미래 계획표보다 훨씬 이른...&n안 돼요... 계획이 전부 엉망이 돼버려요...​

1001405470.english: Eh-hehe... we're still on a daytime date, Commander...&nAre you saying you can't wait until the nighttime date?&nThen, even though it's still day...&nShould we just move straight into the night date?
1001405470.korean: 에헤헤... 아직 낮 데이트 중이잖아요, 사령관님...&n밤 데이트까지 못 기다릴 것 같으신가요?&n그러면, 아직 낮이지만...&n바로 밤 데이트로 넘어갈까요?​

1001405471.english: Boss, you're a bit different today. Somehow... it feels like&nyou've lost some composure. Normally you'd say&nthis outfit is uncomfortable and refuse to wear it...&nShould I wear it again next time?&nIf you want, just say the word!
1001405471.korean: 대장, 오늘은 좀 다르네. 뭔가... 여유가 없어진&n것 같아. 예전 같았으면 이런 옷, 불편해서&n안 입었을 텐데... 다음에 또 입고 올까?&n대장이 원한다면 말만 해!​

1001405472.english: M-master. You must finish the work you were doing...&nI-is this my fault? Still, this wasn't in the plan...&nPlease promise that once it's over, you'll focus on work.&nThen, just once... kyaa?!
1001405472.korean: 주, 주인님. 하던 일을 마저 하셔야만...&n제, 제 탓입니까? 그래도 이건 계획에 없는...&n끝나면 일에 집중하겠다고 약속해 주십시오.&n그러면, 한 번은... 꺅?!​
